name: Chris Pappas
subject: One dollar
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=3478%2E582294%2E78gD8J)
I’m writing this email to **[ask you for just $1.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251114_2_one.2Q95mk&refcode=em20251114-2&t=2&akid=3478%2E582294%2E78gD8J)**
That’s right — just one dollar can help me fight back against John Sununu, Donald Trump, and the MAGA billionaires who are doing everything in their power to flip this Senate seat.
How? Because I don’t accept any money from corporate super PACs, my campaign is standing up to the millions of dollars they’re planning to spend in New Hampshire with a grassroots movement of people like you.
By giving just $1, we can prove that people power can stand up to the GOP’s billionaires and corporate special interests. **We can prove that the Granite State is not for sale.**
**[So I really hope you join us, by chipping in $1 or more today. Your donation will help send me to the Senate to continue fighting for New Hampshire.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251114_2_one.2Q95mk&refcode=em20251114-2&t=3&akid=3478%2E582294%2E78gD8J)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251114_2_one.2Q95mk&amount=5&refcode=em20251114-2&t=22&akid=3478%2E582294%2E78gD8J)**
With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251114-2&t=23&refcode2=3478_582294_78gD8J&akid=3478%2E582294%2E78gD8J)**

name: Angela Gonzales-Torres
subject: Senate Democrats are caving. Working people are going to pay the price.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Angela for CA-34**
body:
What just happened in Washington is a disgrace.
#
**Eight Senate Democrats broke ranks and joined the GOP to end the government shutdown,** and in doing so, they guaranteed higher healthcare premiums for millions of working people. There’s no way around it: **_Those eight Senate Democrats sold out millions of Americans. Many of them are the very constituents they swore to protect._**
**[If you’re as fed up as I am, add your name to send a message: we deserve leaders who fight for us. Leaders who won’t bend to the will of Republicans or Trump.](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22062?t=1&akid=1344%2E2118727%2EZqpUqz)**
**[Add Your Name ››](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22062?t=2&akid=1344%2E2118727%2EZqpUqz)**
This is what happens when Democrats bargain with extremists instead of standing with the people.
It should never have even had to come to this. Healthcare should never be a bargaining chip in the first place. It should be guaranteed for all Americans.
Instead of fighting for Medicare for All, Senate Democrats caved to protect a broken system: one that delays care, drives up costs, and keeps corporate insurers in charge.
Establishment Democrats will say _“now isn’t the time.”_ That we need to _“wait our turn.”_ But tell that to the family rationing insulin, or the single mom who can’t afford a specialist visit. Tell that to the people losing loved ones because Congress is more afraid of upsetting the health insurance lobbyists than it is of failing the American people. Tell that to families like mine who were struggling to survive, where one health emergency would’ve shattered our fragile equilibrium.
**We need a new generation of leaders who won’t trade our health for political convenience.** Leaders who will fight for Medicare for All — no premiums, no copays, no loopholes. It’s long overdue.
That’s why I’m running. Because I refuse to let billionaires, lobbyists, and party bosses decide who gets to see a doctor.
If you believe every person deserves guaranteed healthcare, I need you with me today.
**[Add your name to learn more about how you can support my campaign and help us build a Congress that puts people before profit.](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22062?t=3&akid=1344%2E2118727%2EZqpUqz)**
**[Add Your Name ››](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22062?t=4&akid=1344%2E2118727%2EZqpUqz)**
In solidarity,
Angela Gonzales-Torres
**Paid for by Angela for CA-34**
---

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=6&akid=1344%2E2118727%2EZqpUqz)

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23618%2E4449941%2EwuN21D) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23618%2E4449941%2EwuN21D) [**BREAKING FROM _NEWSWEEK:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70047?t=3&akid=23618%2E4449941%2EwuN21D) [**_“Donald Trump to Have Airport Named After Him Under New Proposal”_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70047?t=4&akid=23618%2E4449941%2EwuN21D) [**Tell Us: Do you approve of Republicans' plan to rename a U.S. airport after Donald Trump?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70047?t=5&akid=23618%2E4449941%2EwuN21D) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70047?t=6&akid=23618%2E4449941%2EwuN21D)

Team, this is RIDICULOUS!!

Just last week, a Republican lawmaker from Florida proposed legislation to rename the Palm Beach International Airport after Donald Trump.

[**It would make Donald Trump one of only nine American presidents to have an airport named after him.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70047?t=10&akid=23618%2E4449941%2EwuN21D)

We simply can’t let this happen, team! He’s one of the worst presidents in history!

So in response to this breaking news, we’re launching an EMERGENCY POLL to Top Democrats to see what they think about renaming a U.S. airport after Donald Trump.
[ **We still need [1,098] more local responses in the next [60] minutes to validate our data. Please, team, step up today before it’s too late → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70047?t=11&akid=23618%2E4449941%2EwuN21D)
**↓↓We need to know↓↓

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy.
**I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life.** But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today.
Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research.
We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it.
**And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool.**
None of this will be easy. But in the words of my grandfather, I'm doing this "Not because it is easy but because it is hard."
[Together, we can build a new Congress and a New York City that works for everyone. Will you join our movement today by splitting a donation of any amount between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119310661/582634628/-2024098675?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_111425_SCHLOSSBERGSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjY0NjU5My1iNmMxLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YRMt_r36PYLaAweJUYWKWVptFtggKvPeBfsgClhhTf0=)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = = It's official... I'm running to represent NY-12 in Congress! This is the district where I was born and raised, and the place that five generations of my family have called home. Hi, Peter, I'm Jack Schlossberg, and my grandfather, President Kennedy, is my hero. In high school, I spent hours watching his speeches. He taught us all that politics isn't about serving yourself — it's about serving others. And that's exactly why I'm running for Congress. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to Jack Schlossberg and the Democratic Party of Georgia immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = I've always been passionate about politics — you can probably gather as much if you've seen any of my social media posts :) I pride myself on my hot (correct!) takes. But public service has always been my driving force. I come from a long legacy of public service, from my great-great-grandparents to my mother, Caroline Kennedy. I have big shoes to fill. I've known it all my life. But this is even bigger than living up to my family name. This is about serving the people of New York — the city that shaped me into the person I am today. Right now, our country is in crisis. Donald Trump and his buddies (my cousin RFK Jr. — to name just one) are tanking the economy, attacking free speech, and sowing distrust in decades of scientific research. We need to revive empathy and effort. I want to be excited and feel hopeful about our future, and I want my fellow New Yorkers to feel the same way. I believe in a politics that works for the people it was intended to serve, and I'm ready to fight for it. And Peter, I happen to think caring is cool. None of this will be easy. name: Haley Stevens
subject: This retired Teamster told me something I won't forget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
it doesn’t have to be this way.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8839?t=2&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8704?t=3&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
Hi null, it’s Haley.

I’ll never stop saying this because it’s true: **I’m in this Senate race for Michigan’s working people.**
That's why I’m proud to have earned the support of unions across our state – from UNITE HERE! Local 24, to Teamsters Local 243, to Pipefitters 636. And I’m the only candidate in this race with multiple labor endorsements.
They’ve got my back, and I’m asking you to join them today: **[Will you chip in $5 now to help us hit our $175,000 mid-month goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8704?t=4&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8704?t=5&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
---
I’ve spent my career standing up for Michigan workers – from helping lead President Obama’s auto rescue to fighting for fair wages and protecting manufacturing jobs in Congress. **I know the pride, sacrifice, and grit Michigan workers bring to the job every single day. And what’s at stake if we don’t stand with labor.**
This is personal to me. I’ve talked to nurses, steamfitters, hotel staff, and hospital techs – and walked picket lines with many of them – because I believe every worker deserves dignity, safety, and a living wage.

One retired Teamster told me his pension barely covers his rent. After a lifetime of work, he’s struggling just to get by. That hit me hard. Because it doesn’t have to be this way.
We can rebuild an economy where workers come first, and it starts right here in Michigan.

But Trump and his MAGA allies want to weaken labor, silence workers, and let billionaires call the shots. They’re targeting this seat, and we can’t afford to fall behind.

That's why I'm reaching out personally: **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help me defend unions, win this race, and deliver for Michigan’s working families?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8704?t=6&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)**
_Use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8705?t=7&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8706?t=8&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8707?t=9&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8704?t=10&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
---
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8796?t=11&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8709?t=12&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=13&akid=1354%2E49239%2EmoIx-y)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

My Mamaw said that working people made this country what it is. That our strength comes from faith, family, and fighting for what's right. She didn't need a Harvard degree to know the truth: America and her people should be put FIRST by folks in D.C., not last. And now more than ever, we need leaders who believe that in their bones. Unfortunately, Establishment hacks on both sides are trying to derail President Trump's America First agenda. That's why I'm asking you to take my Official America First Priorities Survey. Hey folks,
Back again with my favorite Republican-turned-Democrat friend, **Joe Walsh** for another weekly episode of _**Welcome to the Party, Pal!**_ --and this one is a gut punch. We get deep into the Epstein files, Trump's role, the MAGA crack-up, and what it means for a Democratic Party that actually has to _deliver_ for people, not just tweet at them. If you care about accountability, democracy, and whether any of this still matters, tune in.
* [**00:01:07**] I break down why Epstein isn't a side show--it's the new Wall Street crash: a story of elites abusing kids, avoiding prison, and reinforcing the belief that there's one justice system for them and another for everyone else.
* [**00:07:00**] Joe walks through how the right spent years screaming "release the files," why Trump and J.D. Vance promised to expose the deep state, and how those same guys are now doing everything they can to keep the truth buried.
* [**00:13:10**] We get into the Matt Gaetz reporting, Megyn Kelly's wild "actually he's not a pedophile" defense, and how far this movement will go to bend reality rather than admit what's right in front of them.
* [**00:19:05**] We connect Epstein to affordability, security, and corruption--how Trump protects rich predators, why independents are disgusted, and what Democrats _must_ do to actually earn power and make it possible to buy a home on one income again.
* [**00:25:10**] We zoom out to the coming crack-up of MAGA, float 2028 nightmare tickets (yes, including Tucker), and then land on something healthier: football, nature walks, taking a breath, and remembering you're allowed to step away for a minute.

This episode is for anyone furious about impunity for the wealthy, exhausted by the gaslighting, and still stubborn enough to believe politics can be about protecting kids and improving real people's lives. If you value honest, unvarnished conversations like this--where we name names, talk strategy, and still make space for a little humanity--help me keep them going.
**[Become a paid subscriber to Endless Urgency today»](https://substack.com/redirect/56c57e0c-ada4-4f56-b40e-bacea9f2725f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

If you value honest, unvarnished conversations like this--where we name names, talk strategy, and still make space for a little humanity--help me keep them going. ** With urgency, --Mike | A guest post by| Walsh is a former U.S. Congressman and conservative talk radio host who waged a Republican primary challenge against Donald Trump in 2020. He is currently the director of The Social Contract and host of the "White Flag with Joe Walsh" podcast. Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Democrats.org
subject: We are counting on Democrats from Cresco
body:
---
Derek, This might be surprising to hear, but a HUGE number of contributions to the DNC come from emails just like this one. Grassroots donations are a critically important component of how we fund our work — the work that elected Democrats by astounding numbers in the 2025 elections and the work that will make the same outcomes possible in 2026. **But to take back Congress in the midterms and put a major check on Trump’s power, we need to expand the infrastructure we built in New Jersey, Virginia, California, Pennsylvania, and New York this year to every state in the country.** We _know_ we can do this — but it will be expensive, and it will require all hands on deck. When thousands of Democrats across the country chip in, we build the necessary resources to fund and expand our work to minimize Trump’s power. But the truth is that not everyone chips in. That’s why we’re looking for donations from Cresco today. **And you are one of the Cresco Democrats we need.** [**Can we count on you to chip in $7 today to help us reach our goal? Grassroots donations are a critically important component of how we fund our work — the work that elected Democrats by astounding numbers in the 2025 elections and the work that will make the same outcomes possible in 2026. But to take back Congress in the midterms and put a major check on Trump’s power, we need to expand the infrastructure we built in New Jersey, Virginia, California, Pennsylvania, and New York this year to every state in the country. We know we can do this — but it will be expensive, and it will require all hands on deck. When thousands of Democrats across the country chip in, we build the necessary resources to fund and expand our work to minimize Trump’s power. But the truth is that not everyone chips in. name: Brianna For Colorado
subject: Noteworthy November 🍂
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e10a1633939c/noteworthy-november?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=db57541444&e=8249791cac)
| | | | | | | | | | | | Hello everyone and happy November! I can’t believe this year is almost over, with the 2026 Legislative session starting two months from today! Which means my office and I have been very busy prepping.
This month’s edition will discuss upcoming [community](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=b1a73aa2ea&e=8249791cac) events and in case you missed it headlines. But first, let’s talk about some stuff I have been up to!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | On November 3rd, I attended the Get Out To Vote rally for Propositions LL and MM at the Colorado State Capitol. I am so proud of Coloradans for passing these very important pieces of legislation.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | On November 4th, I traveled down to El Paso County to be a panelist for the Manitou Springs High School Voting Workshop. Some fellow colleagues and I taught students how to advocate for/against a bill to legislators and the importance of getting involved in politics. Thank you so much to the students at Colorado College for organizing this awesome event!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | On November 5th, I was honored at [NEWSED’s](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=000b6a62d0&e=8249791cac) Civil Rights Awards Gala, alongside Anaya Robinson of the ACLU and Maya Blasingame of the Denver Food Rescue. Thank you so much for honoring me NEWSED!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | On November 9th, Jefferson County legislators joined together to host a food drive for the community. With everyone’s help, we were able to collect 3,541 pounds of food and 962 pounds of hygiene products. Way to go JeffCo!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | On November 13th, my aide Izzy and I volunteered at [Justice Necessary](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=07a0e3dce0&e=8249791cac) to assist with packing hygiene kits that will be delivered to local food banks and shelters. I always love partnering with this organization and am so grateful for the work they do in our community.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | And finally, also on November 13th, I traveled down to Colorado Springs to join Starbucks workers on the picket line for Red Cup Day. You can learn more about the purpose of the strike and how to support the workers [here.](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=29ad424d01&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# [UPCOMING CONSTITUENT EVENTS]()
---
| |
**NO CONSTITUENT EVENTS IN NOVEMBER**
Due to the holidays, I will not be hosting any constituent events this month. However, I am still available to meet and hear your needs! If you would like to schedule an “office hour” with me, you can do so using the link below.
---
| | [**Virtual Office Hours**]()**** 💻
---
| | We have a simple sign-up process to schedule some one-on-one time with Rep. Titone at YOUR convenience, either via Zoom or phone.
[**Sign up here**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=360fbc46df&e=8249791cac)**on Calendly!**
---
|
---
| | _Can't make it to any of my scheduled events? Don't hesitate to reach out if you have something on your mind or need help finding local resources. I'm just an email or phone call away!_
[_brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov_](mailto:brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov?subject=&body=) _| cell: 720.213.6660 | office: 303.866.2962_
---
| |
# [ IN THE DISTRICT]()
---
| |
## ARVADA
---
| | **FREE LEAF RECYCLING**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | | **Nov. 8th-22nd, 9-2pm at Stenger Sports Complex **
Drop off is available Monday through Saturday. If you participate in the City's waste hauling program, you can purchase bag tags or an extra cart for leaf bags that won't fit in your trash can
[Learn more on the leaf recycle webpage](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=9648038126&e=8249791cac) or call 720-898-7070
---
| |
**ARVADA PD & KIWANIS SANTA HOUSE**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | | Arvada PD is teaming up with the Kiwanis Santa House to bring holiday cheer to local children of families in need! For the past 18 years, the Arvada-Jefferson Kiwanis Foundation’s all-volunteer Santa House has provided gifts to children in need during the holidays. APD is collecting new, unwrapped toys and gifts (for ages 0–12) at PD headquarters and community stations through Nov. 28.Learn more about Santa House and see other donation sites on the [Santa House webpage](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=b2a163464f&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---
|
---
| | To find events coming up in Arvada, check out [**Visit Arvada**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=7320f84fbd&e=8249791cac)!
---
|
---
| |
## GOLDEN
---
| | **LIGHT THE LIGHTS CONTEST**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | | One lucky Golden kid will be chosen to join Santa on Friday, December 5, to flip the switch and light the lights along Clear Creek for the holiday season.
To enter, your child must be from Golden and under 12 years old. Visit The Golden Mill at 1012 Ford Street anytime between Nov. 1 and Nov. 30 to fill out an entry form. Only one entry per child will be accepted. The winner will be announced on Monday, Dec. 1
---
| | **HOLIDAY COOKIE DECORATING PARTY**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | | Parents, get ready for some sweet holiday fun! Join us for a Holiday Cookie Decorating Party on December 4 at the Golden Community Center, where you and your kids can unleash your creativity with frosting, sprinkles, and plenty of cheer.
All supplies are provided--just bring your sweet tooth and holiday spirit! Parents must stay with your children, and cookies may contain gluten
[Register once per family](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=a23762ef80&e=8249791cac) to secure your spot, and let us know how many kids you are bringing.Cost: $10 Residents / $12 Non-resident (per family, not per person)
---
|
---
|
---
| | For a list of upcoming Golden events, check out the [**Visit Golden website**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=5d0ddbdaf7&e=8249791cac)**or the City’s**[**Community Calendar**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=f4b5ffaa35&e=8249791cac)**.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello everyone and happy November! I can’t believe this year is almost over, with the 2026 Legislative session starting two months from today! Which means my office and I have been very busy prepping. This month’s edition will discuss upcoming events and in case you missed it headlines. But first, let’s talk about some stuff I have been up to! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On November 3rd, I attended the Get Out To Vote rally for Propositions LL and MM at the Colorado State Capitol. I am so proud of Coloradans for passing these very important pieces of legislation. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On November 4th, I traveled down to El Paso County to be a panelist for the Manitou Springs High School Voting Workshop. Some fellow colleagues and I taught students how to advocate for/against a bill to legislators and the importance of getting involved in politics. Thank you so much to the students at Colorado College for organizing this awesome event! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On November 5th, I was honored at Civil Rights Awards Gala, alongside Anaya Robinson of the ACLU and Maya Blasingame of the Denver Food Rescue. Thank you so much for honoring me NEWSED! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On November 9th, Jefferson County legislators joined together to host a food drive for the community. With everyone’s help, we were able to collect 3,541 pounds of food and 962 pounds of hygiene products. Way to go JeffCo! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | On November 13th, my aide Izzy and I volunteered at to assist with packing hygiene kits that will be delivered to local food banks and shelters. I always love partnering with this organization and am so grateful for the work they do in our community. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | And finally, also on November 13th, I traveled down to Colorado Springs to join Starbucks workers on the picket line for Red Cup Day. You can learn more about the purpose of the strike and how to support the workers | | | | | | [UPCOMING CONSTITUENT EVENTS]() | | NO CONSTITUENT EVENTS IN NOVEMBER Due to the holidays, I will not be hosting any constituent events this month. However, I am still available to meet and hear your needs! If you would like to schedule an “office hour” with me, you can do so using the link below. | | [Virtual Office Hours]()** 💻 | | We have a simple sign-up process to schedule some one-on-one time with Rep. Titone at YOUR convenience, either via Zoom or phone. Calendly! | | | Can't make it to any of my scheduled events? Don't hesitate to reach out if you have something on your mind or need help finding local resources. I'm just an email or phone call away! mailto:brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov?subject=&body= | cell: 720.213.6660 | office: 303.866.2962 | | [ IN THE DISTRICT]() | | ARVADA | | FREE LEAF RECYCLING | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Nov. 8th-22nd, 9-2pm at Stenger Sports Complex Drop off is available Monday through Saturday. If you participate in the City's waste hauling program, you can purchase bag tags or an extra cart for leaf bags that won't fit in your trash can or call 720-898-7070 | | ARVADA PD & KIWANIS SANTA HOUSE | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Arvada PD is teaming up with the Kiwanis Santa House to bring holiday cheer to local children of families in need! For the past 18 years, the Arvada-Jefferson Kiwanis Foundation’s all-volunteer Santa House has provided gifts to children in need during the holidays. APD is collecting new, unwrapped toys and gifts (for ages 0–12) at PD headquarters and community stations through Nov. 28.Learn more about Santa House and see other donation sites on the | | | | To find events coming up in Arvada, check out ! | | | GOLDEN | | LIGHT THE LIGHTS CONTEST | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | One lucky Golden kid will be chosen to join Santa on Friday, December 5, to flip the switch and light the lights along Clear Creek for the holiday season. To enter, your child must be from Golden and under 12 years old. Visit The Golden Mill at 1012 Ford Street anytime between Nov. 1 and Nov. 30 to fill out an entry form. Only one entry per child will be accepted. The winner will be announced on Monday, Dec. 1 | | HOLIDAY COOKIE DECORATING PARTY | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Parents, get ready for some sweet holiday fun! Join us for a Holiday Cookie Decorating Party on December 4 at the Golden Community Center, where you and your kids can unleash your creativity with frosting, sprinkles, and plenty of cheer. All supplies are provided--just bring your sweet tooth and holiday spirit! Parents must stay with your children, and cookies may contain gluten to secure your spot, and let us know how many kids you are bringing.Cost: $10 Residents / $12 Non-resident (per family, not per person) | | | | For a list of upcoming Golden events, check out the the City’s. | | [ ICYMI!]() | | | BRIANNA IN THE NEWS Colorado Public News: Colorado House Democrats: Colorado House Democrats: | | STATE & LOCAL NEWS Denver Post: Denver Post: Denver Post: Denver Post: Denver Post: Denver Post: | | NATIONAL STORIES Wired: ProPublica: NPR: Stateline: Stateline: | | GOOD NEWS 🎉 | | | FIND ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA! Follow me to stay up to date with news, photos, bill details, events, community resources, and much more! 📲 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The legislative session is over, but my work for you doesn’t stop. This summer, in addition to researching my next round of bills, I’ll be starting my campaign forstate treasurer! If you like the work I do, please consider a donation to my campaign or host a fundraiser in your community. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Representative Brianna Titone (she/her/hers) Chair, Joint Technology CommitteeVice Chair, Finance CommitteeAppropriations CommitteePension Review CommissionChair, LGBTQ Caucus mailto:brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov?subject=&body=303.866.2962 office | | | | | | | | | | A Message From Representative Brianna Titone, 2025 Want to change how you receive these emails? **Just minutes after** announcing his support for a bipartisan deal to end the government shutdown, Sen. **Tim Kaine** (D-Va.) beelined toward Sen. **Katie Britt** (R-Ala.) on the Senate floor to shake her hand.

**Britt had spent** the last few days quietly working to secure White House support for Kaine’s push to reverse the administration’s mass layoffs of federal workers during the shutdown. The White House got on board, even endorsing back pay for federal workers.

On Monday, November 10, the Montgomery Regional Chamber hosted its latest Washington Brief luncheon featuring U.S. Senator Katie Britt, who joined virtually from Washington, D.C., as the Senate moved through the critical funding vote. Senator Britt’s remarks centered on advancing Montgomery’s federal priorities and emphasized how federal action directly impacts regional economic growth, workforce readiness, and quality of life.

“What happens in Washington has a direct impact on what happens here in Montgomery—especially on the projects and priorities the Chamber is advancing to keep our region competitive,” Britt said.

On Monday evening, President Donald Trump endorsed the U.S. Senate’s breakthrough to reopen the federal government, calling it a “very good” deal and vowing to “abide by the deal” as the package moves to the House.

The Senate approved the measure 60-40, ending the nation’s longest shutdown after more than 40 days, with eight members of the Senate Democratic caucus crossing over to join a unified GOP conference minus one.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. **I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come.** Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. **This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.** Will you stand with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | Just minutes after announcing his support for a bipartisan deal to end the government shutdown, Sen. Tim Kaine (D-Va.) beelined toward Sen. Katie Britt (R-Ala.) on the Senate floor to shake her hand. Britt had spent the last few days quietly working to secure White House support for Kaine’s push to reverse the administration’s mass layoffs of federal workers during the shutdown. The White House got on board, even endorsing back pay for federal workers. | | On Monday, November 10, the Montgomery Regional Chamber hosted its latest Washington Brief luncheon featuring U.S. Senator Katie Britt, who joined virtually from Washington, D.C., as the Senate moved through the critical funding vote. Senator Britt’s remarks centered on advancing Montgomery’s federal priorities and emphasized how federal action directly impacts regional economic growth, workforce readiness, and quality of life. “What happens in Washington has a direct impact on what happens here in Montgomery—especially on the projects and priorities the Chamber is advancing to keep our region competitive,” Britt said. | | On Monday evening, President Donald Trump endorsed the U.S. Senate’s breakthrough to reopen the federal government, calling it a “very good” deal and vowing to “abide by the deal” as the package moves to the House. The Senate approved the measure 60-40, ending the nation’s longest shutdown after more than 40 days, with eight members of the Senate Democratic caucus crossing over to join a unified GOP conference minus one. | | | | | | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come. Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: We need a consumer advocate to tackle the cost crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Katie Porter is the champion families need right now.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40417%2E3422442%2EKoNFO8)
Peter,
Katie Porter’s life’s work has been fighting to help families and workers who are struggling to make ends meet. Nobody in this race has taken on powerful special interests like she has.
That’s exactly why we need Katie to tackle the cost-of-living crisis as California’s next governor. To make sure she wins, **[we’ve set a goal of raising $20,000 before our mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow. Can you chip in today?**](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251114_2_ak.gCyNFa&refcode=em20251114-40417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40417%2E3422442%2EKoNFO8)
Katie has the experience to get the job done. As California’s independent monitor of big banks during the foreclosure crisis, Katie helped thousands of Californians save their homes or climb out of debt. In Congress, she became a national figure for her hearings where she called out the cost crisis with prescription drugs, child care, and housing.
**We’ve seen how hard Katie fights, and she’ll bring that same grit to Sacramento.**
But that’s not all. Katie also has the lived experience that grounds her in the reality facing working families. A minivan-driving single mom of three kids, she doesn’t need talking points about affordability. She knows the struggle of stretching grocery dollars with coupons and worrying about repair costs for the minivan adding up.
These are the same challenges so many Californians face, and that perspective matters. It’s why she’s running, and why she’s the champion families need right now.
**[We can only elect Katie with grassroots support. Can you chip in $5 to help us hit our $20,000 mid-month goal and tackle the cost crisis statewide?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251114_2_ak.gCyNFa&refcode=em20251114-40417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40417%2E3422442%2EKoNFO8)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251114_2_ak.gCyNFa&refcode=em20251114-40417&t=23&akid=40417%2E3422442%2EKoNFO8)
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251114-40417&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40417_3422442_KoNFO8&akid=40417%2E3422442%2EKoNFO8)**
---

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: REMOVING Trump?! (VPP)
subject: This changes everything.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Answer Democrats’ call >>>
| **__“It’s Time He Be Removed.”__
Democrats Renew Call to Invoke 25th Amendment** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251114_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=6&akid=21866%2E878179%2EEtX3H2) [**We need to know if Democrats in your state agree: Should the 25th amendment be revoked to REMOVE Donald Trump from office? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251114_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=7&akid=21866%2E878179%2EEtX3H2) | [YES, ADD MY NAME: DEMAND THE 25TH AMENDMENT BE INVOKED TO REMOVE TRUMP FROM THE WHITE HOUSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251114_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=8&akid=21866%2E878179%2EEtX3H2)
---
* * *
**Donald Trump is ramping up his abuse of power:**

❌ Weaponzing the DOJ to BLOCK California’s new maps.
❌ Threatening to ARREST Democratic Governors who stand up to him.
❌ Claiming the American people _“want a king.”_

[**We need to act FAST before our democracy is GONE! Will you join 5,999 local Democrats in demanding the 25th Amendment be invoked to REMOVE Trump from the White House? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251114_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=9&akid=21866%2E878179%2EEtX3H2)
[YES, ADD MY NAME: DEMAND THE 25TH AMENDMENT BE INVOKED TO REMOVE TRUMP FROM THE WHITE HOUSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20251114_EMPET_E5_T0_AC&t=10&akid=21866%2E878179%2EEtX3H2)

The Voter Protection Project

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21866%2E878179%2EEtX3H2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21866%2E878179%2EEtX3H2).**

name: President Fatima Heyward via ActionNetwork.org
subject: YDA Winter Meeting & DNC Meeting Updates
body:
Hotel Block Deadline Extended & Schedule Available! | | |
Hello Derek, I am excited to announce that we are able to extend the deadline for the hotel room block! We want to ensure that young Democrats from across the nation have the opportunity to attend our meeting at an affordable hotel rate. **The final deadline to book your room is November 22nd.** Don't miss out on the opportunity to:
* Hear from organizers and leaders about building Democratic power in red states.
* Take home practical tools: a new canvassing program, a fresh chapter strategy, or at the very least, a Runza.
* Connect with young Democrats nationwide.

We are thrilled to have the 2025 Winter Meeting hosted by the Nebraska Young Democrats. Join us in Omaha, Nebraska from December 5th to 7th! See below for additional details. 📍 **Where** : Omaha, Nebraska
🏢 **Hotel** : Hilton Omaha and CHI Health Center
📅 **When** : December 5–7, 2025
i️ **Registration** : [Click here
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39ispmPgnyBeLzstfRs0GcNMmQ8i0Uu7JlJXUCxxrJCmdAhrI3WMZ3WpZtbbn7FJUzDR-wqJvu7BY5RrY0zoNnxL3tBJAgTITGQRzh0p1d-t--26c2EhIWJBZ8FhDvVfCmrcUi2w_xIw01rPFRkzMQyJKLpIeZ1iWZ2m136n4psdadL-1NQHE_eI8XXLvrZvaHqvUpBQHICpt_oGt6uJFXYsZPOI9oaxoiXqS7132Y0Xhwk3TMXiEm1Bhj2lT_BI7YeZ7Dokk-xqJiXXnia2oyr03SxOEpW-edeChH3M7e8a1QBwQyc21Wq8LOR3_SBiiDmxIldenZdBJE7uWxqBt-NBZFdRdgV4GESKvWJqbYxAg/4lm/TySI1rHQRwivcBSD08lvqw/h0/h001.rt_FFosrJ6eBRDhcy_PlSjP1e6FtMCb0Ur9Oh5pbBNw)**🏢Stay:** clean_body: Hotel Block Deadline Extended & Schedule Available! | | | Hello Derek, I am excited to announce that we are able to extend the deadline for the hotel room block! We want to ensure that young Democrats from across the nation have the opportunity to attend our meeting at an affordable hotel rate. The final deadline to book your room is November 22nd. Don't miss out on the opportunity to: Hear from organizers and leaders about building Democratic power in red states. Take home practical tools: a new canvassing program, a fresh chapter strategy, or at the very least, a Runza. Connect with young Democrats nationwide. We are thrilled to have the 2025 Winter Meeting hosted by the Nebraska Young Democrats. Join us in Omaha, Nebraska from December 5th to 7th! See below for additional details. 📍 Where : Omaha, Nebraska 🏢 Hotel : Hilton Omaha and CHI Health Center 📅 When : December 5–7, 2025 i️ Registration : 🏢Stay: Book your hotel room 📋Schedule: Now available! . The next DNC Meeting will take place from December 11 to 13 in Los Angeles, CA. If you plan to attend, please let us know by completing this . Additionally, the DNC Meeting room block closes for the InterContinental Los Angeles Downtown Hotel tonight! To book your room, please go . For questions, please email Stephanie Campanha Wheaton at dncmember1@yda.org and Stephon Moore at dncmember2@yda.org. subject: Republicans are trying to repeal Prop 50.

body:
Have you seen this urgent Prop 50 update?
GOP Immediately Sues to Block California’s Voter-Approved Congressional Map
After Californians overwhelmingly voted to pass Prop 50 last Tuesday, Republicans immediately filed a lawsuit to undo the election results.
Peter, this is ridiculous.
First, Republicans tried to interfere in California’s election by attempting to ban vote-by-mail and intimidating voters with election monitors.
Now, they’re trying to override the will of the voters in court, despite 63.9% of Californians voting YES last Tuesday.
Zoe Lofgren refuses to stand by as Republicans attack our democracy in order to cling onto power, but we need your help to fight back. Peter, will you stand with Zoe by chipping in a donation to our campaign, so she can protect Prop 50 from this illegitimate attack and continue fighting to block Trump’s midterm power grab? >>

This fight is going to take all of us, so we need you with Zoe. Thank you.
-Friends of Zoe Lofgren

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Final push before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend -

I want to pause the noise of the political fight for a moment and just say thank you.

I know how easy it is to feel overwhelmed by the grim headlines from Washington, with extremists trying to gut our nation's security and hold essential programs hostage. But you are the reason I am grounded in this fight every day. Your dedication proves that hope is more powerful than their hunger for power.

We are so grateful for everyone who has chipped in so far, but I need you to look at your watch. Our critical end-of-week fundraising deadline is just hours away, at MIDNIGHT tonight.

We are still short of our goal to raise the necessary funds to fight back and hold the GOP accountable for their political games. This isn't about hitting an arbitrary number—it’s about proving we have the grassroots power to stand up to the people who would rather burn it all down than govern responsibly.

Don’t wait. We only have hours left to hit this crucial mark.

FINAL CHANCE: Chip in $5 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/esca-14-email-nov2025-fr-november?refcode=E16164-20251114-FinalPush-SB-DeadlineOther&amount=5]

Thank you for refusing to back down. We’re in this together.

— Eric

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

name: Jared Hudson
subject: He wanted you to receive this message from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
body:
That’s why I need you to read this

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z08vo722ehs8qmf6fqblstt6jjql9lt4a67ohq48_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | My name is Jared Hudson.
I’m a former Navy SEAL and Christian conservative running for U.S. Senate.
I’m pro-God, pro-gun, and 100% pro-Trump.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zolg5p9nn7qpk822t6lol4bape2uv1e12u8cbvbo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)
---
| | You’ve probably heard those words before, but too often, it’s just rhetoric from RINOs who’ll say anything to stay in power. They don’t mean what they say. Their words have no integrity.
**_That’s not who I am._**
Because this isn’t politics to me. This is a mission.
The radical Left hates folks like us. They hate God. They hate America.
And it’s not just the activists or media pundits. It’s the Hollywood elite, DC shadow insiders, and career politicians. I’m talking Obama, Soros, and Clooney – all spending MILLIONS to crush grassroots campaigns like mine before they can take off. Before they can resonate with people.
And it’s even more serious now for two reasons.

1. We have REAL MOMENTUM that they’re scared of. A new poll put us at the front of the race for Alabama’s Senate seat, showing that my message is striking a chord with voters. On top of that, conservative champions like Senator Tim Sheehy and Riley Gaines are backing this campaign. We’ve got all the makings of a successful movement.
2. The Socialist Blueprint is taking over the Democratic Party. We saw it this past Election Day, where proclaimed Socialists made considerable, scary gains across the country – none more evident than Zohran Mamdani seizing New York City. And now that the old guard, like Pelosi, are stepping aside, you bet they’re passing the torch to other Socialists.

**Taking all of that, not only does this campaign prove a real threat to the Left’s agenda, but especially to the woke, Socialist branch that’s consuming the Democratic Party.**
So you bet now they’re trying to silence us more than ever.
But I’m not running from the fight. I never have, and I never will. I won’t give up on America and Alabama like that.
I’m asking you to stand beside me in this one.
Because while my fate is in God’s hands, my campaign is in yours.

---
| | [DONATE 10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdoq51hregir8591qa9erobu1pm41bh5hook4mqg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)
---
| [DONATE 25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpmpvejetul0vr03cs8sn0d13ogs86d8k8kvlv7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)
---
| | [DONATE 50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfroe6lmb1mu0gmaimjdqjsllm28mni91f2obs2g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)
---
| [DONATE 100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4gir3sdsj52ivtpqu8lrauita2mkl11qnv1sef8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)
---
| | Your support today will protect this mission to defend faith, family, and freedom in the U.S. Senate.
With the spirit of a soldier and the will of a warrior,
Jared Hudson

---
| | |
---
| | **_A MESSAGE FROM JARED HUDSON:_**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z22qvae49ts9n24olls3ra3cd8v0m5hmi56ln688_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)
---
| | It’s Jared Hudson.

I’m running for U.S. Senate in Alabama, and I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself.
**_[I hope that by the time you finish reading this message, you’ll consider standing with me in this fight by making a donation of any amount.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z522g8i5rokesqf1cktjudmllpfequ7kor8uuovo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)_**

I’m a former Navy SEAL Sniper, law enforcement officer, business owner, husband, father, and follower of Christ.
I’ve deployed in support of the Global War on Terror, and I’ve led the charge in combatting human trafficking.
I’ve been to some of the darkest corners of the world, looked evil in the eye, and seen how faith, courage, and conviction can overcome anything.
Now, I’m entering a new battlefield: **I’m running for U.S. Senate to stand with President Trump and to be the tip of the spear that’ll defend our Christian values, protect the principles we hold dear, and end the Woke agenda.**
If you believe in God, country, the Constitution, and standing with President Trump, I need your support on this mission.
**_[Will you join me in this fight for our country’s future by pitching in a donation of any amount today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk43fjfhnbp0dek1fvj116djs6iej4lnhn8cf0oo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g62ob2cth2bs)_**

I’m not a politician, I’m a warrior. And with your help, I’ll fight every day in Washington to put America - _and you_ \- first.
Thank you,Jared Hudson

---
| |

---
| Paid for by Hudson for Alabama
---
|

---
| | Hudson for Alabama – PO Box 100 Gardendale, AL 35071
_Jared Hudson is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.___

Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

[**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1909a5945ef0c3b0fcf3b89e11c97e9be43c871f5b10e18da2013bce4c54ac2cf8385a3c140427672708cecc106dd9bb287321d6c4d09d57381fe3dd58b1b090) The best part is... _**This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!**_ It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria - up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses - up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts - up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 200+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1909a5945ef0c3b0fcf3b89e11c97e9be43c871f5b10e18da2013bce4c54ac2cf8385a3c140427672708cecc106dd9bb287321d6c4d09d57381fe3dd58b1b090) **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. "No question... beats the competition. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others."_ _**Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time."_ _**Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water."_ _**Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious."_ _**Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you."_ _**Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day."_ [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=1909a5945ef0c3b0fcf3b89e11c97e9be43c871f5b10e18da2013bce4c54ac2cf8385a3c140427672708cecc106dd9bb287321d6c4d09d57381fe3dd58b1b090)

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zij286j6cjm9aqmdagvotsbm526vepk0kf17ss08_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
Friend,Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today.Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze74e0flrtqqu4ju7skhuae85081j79ibmh0a7sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️To give you perspective, Friend...Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp4abghbri45lg2t0t65dcncg72sqhpidh88mou8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
He always believed this day would come.He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America.And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.**Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: **✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhbljlcq66anmr91mjcq06mb30m94e32sj49vq8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0lq83658vk288p3cmjmpphbf0gerhg1sjha6hmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziaqn7m2261s2p38tjcs4638gtk1tslb5fo9im3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3hb7544slhquseaiuq1ief4vpnafga0k9cjthc8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zblcabls79rdcg51g88e5e7fc6bcinebcq0qdcf8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsh3gm9q5t9q1ud5ukbk5c3f8abirf7hj1q5ec8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt41ag1cofr8qc8hvhqeqdla2q4n71dpv9ng7hi0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
Also...**Here 's one more powerful thing you can do:**📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter...**Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqu4v1hp4nt7sj03ta1uj6mohlcpfes2duvousqo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)** Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated...If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week...If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...**Thank you.** We can never say it enough.If you've read this far, we want you to know this...**You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. **God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers.Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor...And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible.**Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztd3p5abtt8lo8iu8adlcdiq4oobee093eqlkahg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c9g61o36clh2bs)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Friend.**God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.**Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: **✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. If you've already donated...If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week...If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...**Thank you.** We can never say it enough.If you've read this far, we want you to know this...**You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. **God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers.Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission...
