name: INGOP
subject: Shutdown Ends, Indiana Moves Forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Dear Hoosier Republicans, No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-td/) _**Shutdown Ends, Indiana Moves Forward**_ Dear Hoosier Republicans,With the longest government shutdown in history finally over, Hoosiers can breathe a sigh of relief--but the chaos in Washington made one thing painfully clear: Democrats in Congress view themselves as servants of their party first and their constituents second. Republicans were clear from the beginning, negotiation is impossible when one side of the aisle holds seniors, veterans, and federal workers hostage. We stayed united behind a clean funding extension that protects our military, keeps our economy stable, and puts American families first. Our unity paid off, and now the Democrats are ruthlessly going after their own for breaking ranks.Here at home, Governor Braun continues to deliver results that actually matter to Hoosiers. This week, he announced Indiana's winter-readiness plan alongside INDOT, State Police, and Homeland Security, ensuring our roads and communities stay safe as temperatures drop. He also advanced his healthcare affordability agenda with the approval of a major hospital merger, a move designed to expand services and lower costs for Hoosier families.As always, thank you for being a part of our team, and please feel free to reach out if there's any way I can be of assistance.Yours in service, Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman _**Governor Braun Readies Indiana for a Safe Winter Season**_ Governor Braun announced Indiana's coordinated plan to ensure a safe winter season, joining INDOT, State Police, and Homeland Security to highlight statewide readiness efforts._" Our INDOT crews, State Police, and first responders are fully equipped and ready to tackle the season's challenges. I am urging every Hoosier to do their part: prepare your homes, plan your travel, and always give our dedicated crews the space they need to keep our state moving safely."_ \- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-r/) _**Governor Braun Advances Healthcare Goals with Hospital Merger**_ Governor Braun announced a Certificate of Public Advantage for Union Hospital and Terre Haute Regional Hospital to merge, requiring strict conditions to expand services, improve outcomes, and reduce prices in communities that have long needed greater access._" The result of this merger will be lower prices and more healthcare services available to residents of Terre Haute and Vigo County because of the strict operating terms and conditions that Union accepted. This will bring long-term improvement to the community's health outcomes.__"_ \- Governor Braun via a [press release](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-y/) **Congress of Counties 2026** [Click Here for More Information](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-j/) [Click Here to Register](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-t/) **Randolph County** _**Indiana GOP is Hiring Interns for the Spring Semester**_ **📱 _News You Can Use_ ** **Governor Mike Braun **[extended](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-i/) his sympathies to the family of the Delaware County Sheriff's deputy who lost his life in the line of duty this week, saying, "Maureen and I are praying for his loved ones and all who wear the badge across Indiana."**Lieutenant Governor Micah Beckwith** [visited](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-d/) the National FFA headquarters in Indianapolis, meeting with agriculture leaders and local FFA students to hear their ideas for the future. He highlighted the strength of Indiana's next generation of farmers and emphasized the importance of providing them with the necessary resources.**Secretary Diego Morales **[delivered](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-h/) a heartfelt keynote at a Statehouse naturalization ceremony, welcoming nearly 100 new Americans and reflecting on his own path to citizenship. He urged Indiana's newest citizens to embrace their rights--especially voting--and invited them to register immediately after the ceremony.**Treasurer Daniel Elliott **[met](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-b/) with Noble County leaders to discuss local priorities and the impact of SB1 on smaller communities. He emphasized continued collaboration with county officials to ensure strong fiscal stewardship across Indiana.**Attorney General Todd Rokita **[attended](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-n/) the Randolph County Lincoln Day Dinner, honoring the legacy of Charlie Kirk and paying tribute to Corporal Blake Reynolds, who was tragically killed while aiding a stranded motorist. He highlighted the courage of law enforcement, veterans, and first responders, calling the evening a powerful reminder of Hoosier strength, unity, and gratitude.**Senator Todd Young **[voted](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-p/) for legislation to end the federal government shutdown, stressing that Hoosiers sent him to keep the government functioning, not to close it. He urged the House to advance the bill, which reopens the government through January 30, 2026, so Congress can continue work on full-year funding for remaining agencies.**Senator Jim Banks **[praised](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-x/) the President's efforts to rebuild critical U.S. supply chains, saying it marks a major step toward ending America's dependence on China. He framed the move as a clear win for American workers and a strong example of "America First" leadership.**Congressman Rudy Yakym **[announced](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-m/) that Congress ended the Democrat-led shutdown to ensure vital programs like SNAP and WIC stay funded. He emphasized that the measure also protects pay for troops, federal employees, and air traffic controllers.**Congressman Marlin Stutzman **[praised](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-c/) Republicans and President Trump for reopening the government after 43 days, calling the shutdown a result of Democrat obstruction. He said he was proud to vote in favor of ending the hardship for families and workers and against what he described as "hostage-style politics."**Congressman Jim Baird **[voted](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-q/) to reopen the government after the 43-day Democrat-led shutdown, saying his priority was restoring essential services and paying federal workers. He criticized Democrats for causing unnecessary hardship and noted that the bill supports veterans, farmers, and military families while allowing Congress to return to regular order.**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[offered](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-a/) her condolences following the tragic loss of Corporal Blake Reynolds, a National Guard veteran and Delaware County Sheriff's Deputy who died in the line of duty. She extended heartfelt sympathy to his family and the entire Sheriff's Department.**Congressman Jefferson Shreve **[voted](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-f/) to reopen the federal government, saying Hoosier families suffered needlessly while Washington stalled. He emphasized the importance of restoring stability and getting government services back on track after weeks of delay.**Congressman Mark Messmer **[praised](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-z/) the House vote to reopen the government after a 43-day Democrat-led shutdown, saying it inflicted needless hardship on families and vulnerable Americans. He noted his consistent support for funding measures and expressed relief that troops, federal workers, and SNAP recipients will now receive the pay and assistance they depend on.**Congresswoman Erin Houchin** [celebrated](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-v/) passage of the Continuing Resolution to reopen the government, saying Republicans delivered relief after a 42-day Democrat-led shutdown. She reaffirmed her commitment to fighting for Indiana and getting the federal government back to work. **_Upcoming Events_****November 15:[Blackford County GOP Breakfast](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-e/)****November 17: [Kosciusko County GOP Hall of Fame Banquet](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-s/)****November 22:[Indiana Federation of Republican Women Holiday Brunch](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-g/)****November 25: [Shelby County Republican Fall Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-w/)****November 29:[Hancock County, Meet Gary Achor](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-yd/)****December 4: [Vigo County Christmas Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-yh/)****December 4:[Howard County Quarterly Breakfast Club Meeting](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-yk/)****December 6:[Hendricks County Family Christmas Party](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-yu/)****December 6: [Clark County Republican Women's Annual Christmas Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-jl/)****December 13:[St. Joseph County Winter Fest](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-jr/)****December 13:[Hancock County Annual Christmas Party](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-jy/)****December 18:[Adams County Christmas Reception](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-jj/)****December 18:[Wells County Christmas Celebration](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-jt/)****February 20: _[Congress of Counties 2026](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-ji/)_****February 28: [Carroll County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-jd/)****April 10: [Dearborn County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-jh/)****June 19: _[Indiana Republican State Convention 2026](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-jk/)_** [Click Here to Learn more about Governor Braun's Administrative Orders, Policy Proposals, and Leadership Appointments](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-ju/) [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-tl/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-tr/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-ty/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-tj/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-tt/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-ti/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-qujiylk-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-th) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-u-qujiylk-hhlljjcji-tk/)

body:
Govt officials send chilling warning

FBI Warning: U.S. Water Systems Are Under Attack | **SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY** [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22169/6374453/3563f48b36d9ac781796b0aba0313459c588627b/dc22987d080b20791e886d9de614d95aa7f786c1) **FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share! Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22169/6374453/3563f48b36d9ac781796b0aba0313459c588627b/dc22987d080b20791e886d9de614d95aa7f786c1) **5X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water** [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22169/6374453/3563f48b36d9ac781796b0aba0313459c588627b/dc22987d080b20791e886d9de614d95aa7f786c1) **But hurry – we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** Order today you'll also get a FREE Bonus Package with 7 FREE Gifts worth $263.75!
* **FREE Gift #1:** FREE Aqua-Tote Collapsible Water Container ($16.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #2:** FREE Personal Water Filter Straw ($24.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #3:** FREE "Water Solutions" Online Class ($149.00 Value)
* **FREE Gift #4:** FREE Water Survival Digital Guide ($9.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #5:** FREE "What's in your Tap Water" Digital Guide ($9.95 Value)
* **FREE Gift #6:** $25.00 Savings Certificate
* **FREE Gift #7:** FREE Shipping and Handling

[**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22169/6374453/3563f48b36d9ac781796b0aba0313459c588627b/dc22987d080b20791e886d9de614d95aa7f786c1) The best part is... _**This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!**_ It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. One court. Nine justices. 10 decisions that changed America.

The story of America can't be told without the Supreme Court.

From free speech and religion to civil rights, education, immigration, and abortion, the Court's rulings have shaped American history and defined the freedoms we enjoy today.

PragerU's Supreme Court 101 video series takes you inside America's highest court and explores the 10 landmark cases that changed American history and continue to shape our country.

---|---
| |
# **🚨 The Senate is Not Moving Forward With Redistricting🚨**
---
|
---
**This moment is because of every Hoosier who showed up, called or emailed demanding that our elections not be rigged to please one man.** Over the course of more than three months, Hoosiers never once relented, and now the message is clear. We won't be strong-armed into passing overtly racist maps that target our most diverse counties and work to silence the families who call those counties home. I urge every Hoosier who feels like their voice doesn't matter to remember this moment. Just because our legislature is a supermajority, it does not mean every outcome is predetermined. Though the odds are often stacked against us, good is always worth fighting for. We must continue that work. Session 2026 is still right around the corner, and we know too many Hoosiers are struggling to afford groceries, their power bills, health care and more. I am committed to fighting for policies that work to see Hoosiers not just get by, but thrive--we need Hoosiers to keep showing up to get us there, and I know they will.
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | Org Day is this upcoming Tuesday, November 18.

Which begs the question: **What is Org Day?**

Organization Day is the first official meeting of the Indiana General Assembly each legislative year. Think of it like the start of the school year! It's when we, as lawmakers, get organized, set goals, and lay out the groundwork for the year ahead.

But what does Org Day mean for you?

It's when we start looking at bills and proposals that impact __**your**__ life. We're talking about affordable housing, health care, utilities, and so much more.

This makes this upcoming week the _perfect_ time to reach out to lawmakers to let them know what matters to you and what you would like to see them work on this session.

Just yesterday, the **[President Pro Tem of the Senate announced that the Senate would not be moving forward with mid-decade gerrymandering](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cfd8b6ef463126b64d650168c71aa4af4742bf67496b4bae68bcb8bf51366a2de7f5fbac168f95164a10d531aa1e74c7c11b200b57a0a668 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.indystar.com/story/news/politics/2025/11/14/indiana-senate-wont-meet-to-redistrict-resisting-trumps-calls/87274761007/__;!!FlTQaCg!gVEM3t8Rkqs6M_VqX7AHyg_k726vHERK8cKfZTqW5FDjvCx16Y9VgWezEJ2mm35c3aTLTqYTBabubrWka0QZcPz97fU$")** , and we will be convening for a session the first week of January.

Once session arrives, you can follow legislative updates, watch committees, find your legislators, and more at **[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cfd8b6ef463126b624bb34f271b2024dd2e1d44f05376ba789c4ee2a982f90ed1cb1a58ece7cc0614d3d4b37da3495c7cb01bbacfd1e9ab3 "http://iga.in.gov")**.
* * *
---
|
---
### Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program
The Energy Assistance Program's (EAP) application is now live until April 20, 2026. You can apply [online](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cfd8b6ef463126b68ec2b9a3d218eb29ba51250384c15812a7328aca7d4eb9ad0da116de1cd2acd1448a807fc022375c0b27948056c5ae74 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$"), by mail or in person. To apply in person or request a paper application form, applicants must contact their local service provider (LSP). For more information on which LSP serves an area, be sure to check the map available on Indiana's [LIHEAP site](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cfd8b6ef463126b68ec2b9a3d218eb29ba51250384c15812a7328aca7d4eb9ad0da116de1cd2acd1448a807fc022375c0b27948056c5ae74 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$").

In addition to this program, Indiana's utilities have financial assistance programs available, as well as other tools that can help customers manage their bills. You can find _[AES's program here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cfd8b6ef463126b6bd7891ee04b49d2600e7cad4435a5e0f0865606ce8a26f721172fb758399a7fe11e396fa5f7d97ec06c15b646fb9a289 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.aesindiana.com/payment-assistance__;!!FlTQaCg!jwpfitqHKx4bP-5cnhYvoAX1m8Q0kv3P901-pv7dMHXQdpRgas_bRhhF66AOaSuHe8tMuc2p6moGi_XjArAanOEmX3Q$") [.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=cfd8b6ef463126b6a28795e845848a75978787819705db7667632fe3d01dcf40e70155d444ce4d5dd7f8132cf1e95524b966531b9ca6f1d1 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.nipsco.com/bills-and-payments/financial-support__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHfV2_ol6Q$")_

As a reminder, the winter moratorium runs from December 1 through March 15 and prevents disconnection of residential energy utility service to any customer who is eligible for and has applied for the Energy Assistance Program. Moratorium protection applies once a household submits an application and allows the Local Service Provider time to determine eligibility.

Utility bills continue to rise, and what should be an essential service has become an overwhelming burden for many families. If you're eligible, please take advantage of the available resources so you don't have to choose between keeping food on the table and keeping the lights on.
---

* * *
---
# **Thank You for Showing Up **
---
| | |
---
| | **Our government works best when folks make their voices heard. **

Thank you to everyone who came out to my town hall on the West Side of Indy a couple of weeks ago, and to everyone who showed up to the redistricting town hall in Beech Grove hosted by Recenter Indiana.

It is when passionate folks come together to solve the problems facing their communities that we make change. I am always so honored to work alongside you in that pursuit.
* * *
---
| | |
# **🏛 ️ Statehouse visit with Irvington Preparatory Academy! 🏛️**
---
| | |
---
**I was so impressed by this group of students from Irvington Preparatory Academy. **

Their knowledge of our state government and their continued curiosity inspired me!

Any time I get to stand in front of a group of students makes my teacher heart happy and always serves as a highlight of my day.

Thank you to every teacher who helps foster a culture of civic engagement in the classroom. Whether it is discussing the importance of voting or bringing your students to the Statehouse, you are making a difference.
* * *
---
| | |
# **Her Health, Our Future**
---
| | |
---
**I was so grateful to speak at the Her Health Event at Martin University.

We know we are in a health crisis when it comes to women's health in our state, **but we will not let the current state of things define our future. We have been told time and time again that we will have to advocate tirelessly, every day, to ensure that our daughters inherit a world where they have a better future and more rights than we do. **So, here 's what we are going to do: **
* We are going to advocate for ourselves first and foremost
* We are going to build coalitions
* We are going to demand policy changes

This event was a milestone in achieving real change, and I am confident the health professionals, students and community leaders in that room will change our state for the better.
* * *

---
### **Full List of Interim Committee Assignments**
---
|
---
| | |
* * *

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | 🚨 The Senate is Not Moving Forward With Redistricting🚨 | This moment is because of every Hoosier who showed up, called or emailed demanding that our elections not be rigged to please one man. Over the course of more than three months, Hoosiers never once relented, and now the message is clear. We won't be strong-armed into passing overtly racist maps that target our most diverse counties and work to silence the families who call those counties home. I urge every Hoosier who feels like their voice doesn't matter to remember this moment. Just because our legislature is a supermajority, it does not mean every outcome is predetermined. Though the odds are often stacked against us, good is always worth fighting for. We must continue that work. Session 2026 is still right around the corner, and we know too many Hoosiers are struggling to afford groceries, their power bills, health care and more. I am committed to fighting for policies that work to see Hoosiers not just get by, but thrive--we need Hoosiers to keep showing up to get us there, and I know they will. | | | | | | Org Day is this upcoming Tuesday, November 18. Which begs the question: What is Org Day? Organization Day is the first official meeting of the Indiana General Assembly each legislative year. Think of it like the start of the school year! It's when we, as lawmakers, get organized, set goals, and lay out the groundwork for the year ahead. But what does Org Day mean for you? It's when we start looking at bills and proposals that impact your life. We're talking about affordable housing, health care, utilities, and so much more. This makes this upcoming week the perfect time to reach out to lawmakers to let them know what matters to you and what you would like to see them work on this session. Just yesterday, the "$" , and we will be convening for a session the first week of January. Once session arrives, you can follow legislative updates, watch committees, find your legislators, and more at "". | Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program The Energy Assistance Program's (EAP) application is now live until April 20, 2026. You can apply "$", by mail or in person. To apply in person or request a paper application form, applicants must contact their local service provider (LSP). For more information on which LSP serves an area, be sure to check the map available on Indiana's "$". In addition to this program, Indiana's utilities have financial assistance programs available, as well as other tools that can help customers manage their bills. You can find "$" "$" As a reminder, the winter moratorium runs from December 1 through March 15 and prevents disconnection of residential energy utility service to any customer who is eligible for and has applied for the Energy Assistance Program. Moratorium protection applies once a household submits an application and allows the Local Service Provider time to determine eligibility. Utility bills continue to rise, and what should be an essential service has become an overwhelming burden for many families. If you're eligible, please take advantage of the available resources so you don't have to choose between keeping food on the table and keeping the lights on. Thank You for Showing Up | | | | | Our government works best when folks make their voices heard. Thank you to everyone who came out to my town hall on the West Side of Indy a couple of weeks ago, and to everyone who showed up to the redistricting town hall in Beech Grove hosted by Recenter Indiana. It is when passionate folks come together to solve the problems facing their communities that we make change. I am always so honored to work alongside you in that pursuit. | | | 🏛 ️ Statehouse visit with Irvington Preparatory Academy! 🏛️ | | | I was so impressed by this group of students from Irvington Preparatory Academy. Their knowledge of our state government and their continued curiosity inspired me! Any time I get to stand in front of a group of students makes my teacher heart happy and always serves as a highlight of my day. Thank you to every teacher who helps foster a culture of civic engagement in the classroom. Whether it is discussing the importance of voting or bringing your students to the Statehouse, you are making a difference. | | | Her Health, Our Future | | | I was so grateful to speak at the Her Health Event at Martin University. We know we are in a health crisis when it comes to women's health in our state, but we will not let the current state of things define our future. We have been told time and time again that we will have to advocate tirelessly, every day, to ensure that our daughters inherit a world where they have a better future and more rights than we do. So, here 's what we are going to do: We are going to advocate for ourselves first and foremost We are going to build coalitions We are going to demand policy changes This event was a milestone in achieving real change, and I am confident the health professionals, students and community leaders in that room will change our state for the better. Full List of Interim Committee Assignments | | | | News Around Our State | | | "$" "$" "$" "$"_ COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Cracked Eggs in Karachi, Big Dreams
body:
Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fZq7bqeyRnz_kSuB4mOpFT7e5skrXHydsA9LbLOm3u7C1h5z49hSzYsEZRICWQCotNJe-BWPooehsT4ndm3TuSq3PKbzP_H7j-NRHuAZZnsH2PaB1obwIS-jy-XtVdEa4gi8y5vsrWfsq2X8SS_xKOSfXiO1EuUFfa5ZQ7FInfRHAWtizerhvpL9dmdicyu1eklnWR8VkUE4vj5twwvCgcBpqJyec7DN&c=WEVWahM0YCPPTtNnUk0oRnmb4aFSCarp4ig9Lk6P30U7BhPYHa59Lg==&ch=8jSHYJA2OuFDTSVHxmLHv_mij6RmE-mpfH_vF--lL8Jn4c8vJXV5Lg==)
---
|
Peter,
My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury.
He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fZq7bqeyRnz_kSuB4mOpFT7e5skrXHydsA9LbLOm3u7C1h5z49hSzYsEZRICWQCotNJe-BWPooehsT4ndm3TuSq3PKbzP_H7j-NRHuAZZnsH2PaB1obwIS-jy-XtVdEa4gi8y5vsrWfsq2X8SS_xKOSfXiO1EuUFfa5ZQ7FInfRHAWtizerhvpL9dmdicyu1eklnWR8VkUFGtfWvQZ-Mna0bR5KqY3Rn&c=WEVWahM0YCPPTtNnUk0oRnmb4aFSCarp4ig9Lk6P30U7BhPYHa59Lg==&ch=8jSHYJA2OuFDTSVHxmLHv_mij6RmE-mpfH_vF--lL8Jn4c8vJXV5Lg==)
---
After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream.
When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fZq7bqeyRnz_kSuB4mOpFT7e5skrXHydsA9LbLOm3u7C1h5z49hSzYsEZRICWQCotNJe-BWPooehsT4ndm3TuSq3PKbzP_H7j-NRHuAZZnsH2PaB1obwIS-jy-XtVdEa4gi8y5vsrWfsq2X8SS_xKOSfXiO1EuUFfa5ZQ7FInfRHAWtizerhvpL9dmdicyu1eklnWR8VkUG34EvnS8uHnbeysdCjusk_&c=WEVWahM0YCPPTtNnUk0oRnmb4aFSCarp4ig9Lk6P30U7BhPYHa59Lg==&ch=8jSHYJA2OuFDTSVHxmLHv_mij6RmE-mpfH_vF--lL8Jn4c8vJXV5Lg==)
---
| From him, I learned three important lessons:

* Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance.

* Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.)

* The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it.

That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday.
With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever.
[Will you make a contribution of whatever you can spare to help me keep fighting for opportunity, education, and the belief that every family deserves a fair shot?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fZq7bqeyRnz_kSuB4mOpFT7e5skrXHydsA9LbLOm3u7C1h5z49hSzYsEZRICWQCoHLRooxVB9XaEJVcSZnBcL5fopOhXRBVVFQHCqz0xLRYA-gfw_RyYBfJQ_TFH2WgNXKiMjC8WkfLvbiXl3xa05RZYdQzZRXiKmuemOmkeEZ0KAY9mxXUTDzbNkQc03rqPDfh5ORKomkC5-27vlpSnaaisFsS0a6ywslOhqTMZi1g=&c=WEVWahM0YCPPTtNnUk0oRnmb4aFSCarp4ig9Lk6P30U7BhPYHa59Lg==&ch=8jSHYJA2OuFDTSVHxmLHv_mij6RmE-mpfH_vF--lL8Jn4c8vJXV5Lg==)

clean_body: Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test. | | | | | == | Peter, My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury. He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English. | == After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream. When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into. | | == | From him, I learned three important lessons: Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance. Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.) * The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it. That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday. With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Gratefully, | | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Troy Downing
subject: I never thought in a million years I'd be sending you this final message pleading for your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I hoped & prayed for a huge response, but it wasn't enough.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTExNV80Uy1ORi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTI4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMTVfNFMtTkYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzUyODEwLTI4OTkifQ/a3Nu4J01RmJYW-umfNWdSw)**This is the email I've waited all my life to send.**
I put so much hope into my last message - but it didn't work.
I hoped & prayed for a huge response, but it wasn't enough.
**Peter, I'm Troy Downing.** I bet you've never heard of me, but that's OK. I never thought in a million years I'd be sending you this final message pleading for your help.
I'm a combat veteran. A God-fearing Christian. A husband & a proud dad.

**[I'm also the conservative Republican running for re-election for Congress in Montana in the biggest race on the map.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTExNV80Uy1ORi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTI4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMTVfNFMtTkYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzUyODEwLTI4OTkifQ/_njBZUa9ejvXEzm_mYhxgA)**

Phony Republicans & the DC swamp have sold you out. That's NOT me. I'm making a simple promise to everyone reading this message:******I'll always tell the truth. ****
****I'll always put America First. ****
****I'll always have a backbone.** This is exactly why the lefties in Washington will smear me in the media, lie about me & end my run. They already have a $40 million in cash on hand to destroy every Republican like me.
I am swallowing my pride & pleading for your help. I'm not used to asking like this, so here it goes: [Do you have the heart to chip in just a few bucks to help me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTExNV80Uy1ORi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTI4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMTVfNFMtTkYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzUyODEwLTI4OTkifQ/NItid4cWFxnGyTedfSNPCg)****[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTExNV80Uy1ORi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTI4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMTVfNFMtTkYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzUyODEwLTI4OTkifQ/sZVanmwmXMUhOv7zmz5XkA) I don't have the flashy campaign slogans or the high-tech stuff - I'm taking a leap of faith & praying that a few people read this message & are willing to stand with me.

Most people will count me out, but if we WIN this race it will bring the Radical Left to its knees.

I'm praying for a comeback, Peter - [will you help a combat vet like me?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTExNV80Uy1ORi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTI4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMTVfNFMtTkYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzUyODEwLTI4OTkifQ/PjPZGLVetZZPzql8OxySrg)****[ENLIST TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTUwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTExNV80Uy1ORi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTI4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTExMTVfNFMtTkYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzUyODEwLTI4OTkifQ/rIbN5zgRIoDYSz_urTAmng) I'll never forget you helping me today.
Thank you & God bless.
Troy Downing****| |

| FBI Warning: U.S. Water Systems Are Under Attack | **SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b1eb29dde11931d1b0e7a4ddf58b79224129d53042027ec6d17cfe15a97faf253a90c39c7821bd620a846dbb6eedda5b8ca56ff585d6a447f05a2f6c2704eb1b) **FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Life-Threatening Viruses - up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts - up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 200+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=b1eb29dde11931d1b0e7a4ddf58b79224129d53042027ec6d17cfe15a97faf253a90c39c7821bd620a846dbb6eedda5b8ca56ff585d6a447f05a2f6c2704eb1b) **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. "Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water."_ _**Carol B.**

"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you."_ _**Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 11.14.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-quykljy-didthutlhu-yd/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,Democrats are in disarray following the shutdown. After causing 43 days of suffering for Americans across the country, they failed to gain anything. Now, with nothing to show for the immense pain they caused Americans, they're struggling to find anything to appease their far-left base.Meanwhile, Republicans have shown they're more united than ever. Going into 2026, it is important that Republicans keep up the fight and remain united. Get involved today by joining your local party [HERE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-y/).-Team WisGOP **Good News for Wisconsin Republicans in 2026** Marquette Law School recently released a [poll](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-j/) that shows some good news for Republicans in Wisconsin. In the Governor's race, Republican candidates have higher name recognition and enjoy higher favorability within the party compared to Democrats who are less fond of their own field of candidates. The Supreme Court race also shows promise as conservative Maria Lazar and liberal Chris Taylor are virtually tied in name recognition and favorability despite Taylor starting her campaign over 4 months before Lazar. **Governors Race**
* Republican candidates average a +14 net favorability rating within the party, showing party unity. Democratic candidates averaged only +8 net favorability.
* The leading Republican candidate had a 13 point advantage over the leading Democrat in name recognition, highlighting a weak Democratic primary field.
* Far-left Francesca Hong leads the Democrats in polling, but is unlikely to win a general election as she said of Socialist NYC Mayor-elect Mamdani's victory, "It gives me a lot of hope."

**Other Results**
* Conservative Maria Lazar and liberal Chris Taylor have similar polling numbers and Lazar leads in net favorability even though Taylor's campaign had a 4-month head start. This shows that Lazar's campaign has more momentum behind it.
* The Republican Party holds a 14-point advantage in net favorability compared to the Democratic Party in Wisconsin - a good sign for 2026.
* 69% of Wisconsinites are very concerned about the cost of living and it ranks as the #1 issue among voters. This is good news for Republicans as economic data is showing lower inflation and higher wages since the start of President Trump's 2nd term.
* Wisconsin's Republican-led legislature continues to deliver popular policies as Sen. Jacque and Rep. Penterman move forward a proposal to ban the Chinese Communist Party from owning WI farmland, a policy supported by [88%](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-t/) of Americans.

**Good News for the Economy** As Americans continue to rank inflation and cost of living as a top issue in 2026, economic data is looking good for Republicans. President Trump has continued to deliver on his promise to bring prices down and wages up, especially as we approach the holidays!
* The cost of a family Thanksgiving meal has actually [fallen](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-i/) since last year!
* Inflation-adjusted private sector wages are up by [$1,151](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-d/) since Trump took office after seeing a $3,000 decline under Biden.
* The inflation rate under President Trump has averaged [2.5%](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-h/) compared to 5% during Biden's term.
* Average rent has also fallen by [0.9%](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-k/) this year and gas prices are approaching a [4-year low](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-u/).

**Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-o/) **Become a Poll Worker!**
Every two years, the Republican Party of Wisconsin submits poll workers to municipalities across the state. These 2 year appointments will be critical to keeping the 2026 elections safe and secure. Learn more about being a poll worker by signing up for a training below! [BECOME A POLL WORKER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-b/)
# **Worth the Read**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-n/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-a/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-f/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-z/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-v/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-e/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-g/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-quykljy-didthutlhu-w/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-quykljy-didthutlhu-yh/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-quykljy-didthutlhu-yk/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-quykljy-l-yu)
---|---|---
**PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE Republican Party of Wisconsin | 148 E. Johnson Street | Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-quykljy-931243C5-didthutlhu-jl) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-u-quykljy-didthutlhu-jr/)

# Saturday, November 15, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1777, [the Articles of Confederation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOpDAQQE9jMpA_GNjAwSZkvemGyNhFUyPjQnY1qG8_mtHcYC7wnt77_1geHhPm5z9_gOONlgx3TcAMZaETimekXOnFO5RcT_DloLpoqW2rVKvsEj2m99I30W0AGkwDTo2D0bIfjWx2Z4fJjKv2kw0QjNkgThBh1WoCu8Y_a4Pui6aUskpJq4fODpMOsg9-DcGOoxe9hIhMpfsgzLzDlt50QekCHU1yO_NZhfkr9Cz0fN9350vY8YLaPekSej4wQWXK0EYKrwMyV6FnXxhDgtrS1gbKG8Sf2Ka4eN6YEtZhFL18Hh7Tt4t_Nehy-jMAAP__2SZ9rQ) were adopted, establishing a weak national government that linked sovereign states in a "league of friendship." It was in effect from March 1, 1781, until 1789, when the present-day Constitution came into force.

Do you miss TV variety shows? At one time, they were a staple on every network, headlined by some of the world's biggest entertainment stars—though the biggest variety show of all was hosted by Ed Sullivan, a former newspaper columnist. ## US Launches Operation Southern Spear
The Pentagon announced the launch of Operation Southern Spear, a military [mission targeting narco-terror networks](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOozAQBOCngc4IGwxpXFxDl2uvRMYs8Z5sL1pvwuXtT_mL_wX-eqTRfPPnvt49JiyP3z6Dk4PWAldNIAK80gnsBalUekoELvUEz5nqanpjldZK23X3mN7r2O7uADAwtOD0PA2mH-ehb6MLBnbYx-D97WYHfWgfdqPnsG3HZoL1LbpPm9baat1bM3V2upnQj8FvIdh59s3Yw45C3P0lLBLhSG96AXeBcptcFDlrM_xqzNKY5bqu7qB_H8Unb8xyUkLBUBuzRHhUkKh8KfQsAar6JiqGTC9QxXMgJcBMjFWqOpiyoierCBnrGYGhZbefF6aEdZqbsX9kj-lrjfzowpcz_wMAAP__ZPuLlg) across the Western Hemisphere. The announcement comes as Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Joint Chiefs of Staff Chair Dan Caine and other senior military leaders [briefed President Trump this week](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGngY0IjsHEA8NdvOWuHS2CDzEtBgtOE-Xtq0TqE3T-pJ_0_z4uy8WnnMrtv9_RUaxLwUfPSIRtqQc2T6mWXr9pw1b6gb7ttS8gwQilhDLL6lN-LpqvLiICDhydsuMAUttB8s3pQcJ5ivZqwK5axuHq9dmqaTIaZDCWJ_fSlFJGKWlgPJnxDEHq4K8hGGs90xLXRLWdPmsqtGHMz3rHdgp159ltREdnwz8GM4OZNtxSzq-NwXzUnMKTwbxixNKRwWxGaeSkxNsS5PuXiLUFFL-R4l3JYObNrccj5Zz6aJmWt92nN8zpT0_dHfwEAAD__03QfKI) on the region, including potential land strikes against Venezuela. Also this week, the U.S. military conducted its 20th lethal strike against an alleged drug-trafficking boat, making a total of at least 80 people killed since the counternarcotics campaign began in early September. Here’s a [map of the current U.S. deployment](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCnsTcs-I0hHRi6ZEvXjhaG3_HfYmMBCfLbV47UvkD3052--7yNN0uBtvuHXdGUOY4b1hywFExj3DHZQnHL8VEWTFve0aY15hE4DEwIJobRWwrHKFtvZkTAvkUjtOqBS93zdjGzAnBSqt7LN47azZPjMCnPL3KatJxbMmebEGIQgg-gukFdwHHp7OTcoLVtJEdPJabuK9JWFpzDEZ-YOhfXNpillD03_XsD1wautdbuJFTE7zPQwPWPwX4d7AVhq91ZXmLN7JHZSoGKTQfzuId4oGdCcKl5L9pk_F4pBMpKN5LfV0vhNV7-9djTwE8AAAD__3hZgjo) of ships and aircraft in the region.
## New Prosecutor Takes Over Trump Georgia Case
A new prosecutor has been selected [to take over the Fulton County, Georgia, election interference case](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMZmR3WA8Fzg46UQ2l5xOGyLTNOCVcSPbM6P5-xX7CxuXVKpXH_fp7kMMafvrD3J15SnRq0SqlfLEJ2VfA6fCj7pTTuUknw8uEygwUmupzbT4EN9T3yxuJQLqGnLaDh2o3naq2Z0BbdWsZ03oDWqwvwBNT4sZ5tsNYW2Cu9q01kZrZWBozXADVD36GdFY60WvaAmVc_vJIdWd1vjmJ-UW-Wii22s9i-h-CxgFjH7GS9BufMUCxv__BIyJXvLMXAgflbPEnQsluRHnLXgJCpSkSHhZZUiV8kqZEpJEX0jAWCrnt-jGsIjujwZroFedarJbzleIMZTBil5thw_xe1X90ZVPB18BAAD___CCiE8) against President Trump and others after District Attorney Fani Willis' disqualification. Peter Skandalakis, the director of the agency tasked with finding the replacement, said he had [chosen someone new: himself.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO4yAQBOCnwR0RrI35_4LiGnf_tVdaBC_2njBYsCTK25-SV7h6pE8z8-dn_fGUKO-__YmOY1kzPltCZqxrubB6ppJb6Xxgze1CX8_SVlBgpNZSm3XzlF7rNGwuIgKOAzpt5xHUZEc1HC5s8ctomCcN1vo7jiHOo55HjIjbFPVA7q1prY3WysB8M_MXBDUFfw_BWOvFpHAjLvX2t1DmA2N6lQfWWyjnkNzBfDUx_hKwCFj4wINSemcClop7T58JApZQemV598wJm4DFzMrY72_ZLgzkk7xqaRg6lyp9a7Rn3CQXybWflwQFSu5Y6k5eYsLwRmXwDeWT-JA9B6zsKcvYuVcUsAzVbdeTUqI2WzGp_fT0KTbwfz39cPAvAAD__8lbliU) He said he was unable to find any other prosecutor willing to take the case. _“Several prosecutors were contacted and, while all were respectful and professional, each declined the appointment,”_ he said. Skandalakis was facing a Nov. 14 deadline to appoint someone new or the case would face dismissal. Now he has full control over how it should proceed, from moving forward aggressively to seeking to dismiss the indictments.
## List: America's Most Visited Websites
Google continued its run as America’s most-visited website with 16.2 billion visits in July, according to the [most recent data](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOpC9YJMULq5Jl2uvRBt7gT0ZjOwNKG__i7zC300x-mb0_XuOT-TI2_wXV3IypXGjs0QSoTymnTIKp62ktyyUt7IT5jWVERSYRutGmzEgx8_Y18FNREBdTU4PtgPVD52qF9f7cDfBBAqBOrA3oADKDpMFeyd8hZrdRdNaG62VAdsaewOveo8v780wYNUrCiwpt_8Tb7LQFD_poNz6tNbRLSJ7qbo_FTwqeJzn2R5c3hg97iwYuchVrOCBK2X2WJo1FWkOLiwUmpNeVygNb8115Ivp5pTmSOPB83a5qLML-8kxcrFD1at5RY7fffmVtMPBTwAAAP__dgKD2w).

YouTube was the second most-visited site at 5.7 billion, followed by Facebook at No. 3 with 2.6 billion visits, Amazon at No. 4 with 2.5 billion, and Reddit rounds out the top five with 2 billion visits. ChatGPT solidified itself as the most popular AI platform in the U.S., cracking into the top 10 for the first time, tallying 864 million visits. _The New York Times_ fell 2.6%, the only site in the top 20 to see online traffic fall. body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
Shutdown Showdown Ended for now
Dear Nebraska Republicans,
We did it. After 43 grueling days, the government shutdown--engineered by Senate Democrats under Chuck Schumer's leadership--has ended. Funding is restored, federal workers are back on payroll, and essential services are resuming. This wasn't just a budget fight; it was a stark reminder of what happens when partisan spite overrides responsibility.
Schumer's strategy was clear: hold the entire nation hostage to block President Trump's border security priorities. But let's pause and ask the uncomfortable question: How long would Senator Schumer have let this drag on? Another week? A month? Until air traffic controllers walked off the job en masse, until national parks became permanent trash heaps, until Social Security checks stopped arriving for our seniors? And how much damage would he have allowed--billions in economic losses, shattered public trust, families unable to pay rent--before declaring "victory"?
The answer lies in the poison of spite. Schumer didn't just target Republicans; he targeted America. Spite is a fire that burns both ways. It scorched federal employees who missed paychecks, small businesses near shuttered parks, and travelers stranded by TSA chaos. But it also consumed Schumer's own party--exposing their willingness to weaponize government against citizens for political points. History will remember this not as leverage, but as self-inflicted sabotage.
Nebraska knows better. We balance budgets. We show up to work. We don't torch the barn to spite the mule. This shutdown's end is a win for pragmatism, for our state's values, and for the 800,000 workers who deserved better than being pawns in Schumer's game.
Stay vigilant. The fight for fiscal sanity and secure borders continues. Onward.
Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---

body:
I will never take your sacrifice for granted.

[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwA9hbuIi0ctJcijRRKou1x2sUAyuM2bu3j1glfa4YaYpf3-j75-fb9Gbd7sL9u_U0zMVN6ZjWFH3e6BZzjj6u_mMjm_IEAjSXkktdQ7JZhnkxCA0NsjMIQqOCZhuMunU3REmkb1qBsUph38vLBQWuIPrGDZUkpXyNEu1KYtXqArOU0pjOMCXOx2IzHe0cw0Gp2OwKuRBi3WJo5-ibfdhyfhwMvzAYGYwHzWei9ulCoqUmGIzFFfrNk_X2eFr_wdeYeNxcZDCGmIlXU5434i9DfqwVhWOqqOTCneE1p5MYGOvjGTLDK2oG5sx-mq1_WHcPDK9_fXD6-o3_-tFK2UOnpyw7LXowHA0gA0PvU3bLf8ffz1Dq_cLn4vi_ypo0LI-n23d3mI4pcffW7a8-8iffVwb4EwAA__8xJZ9S) Politics today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks.
But I want to cut through the noise for a moment.
[I'd like to tell you a quick story.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwA9hbuIi0ctJcijRRKou1x2sUAyuM2bu3j1glfa4YaYpf3-j75-fb9Gbd7sL9u_U0zMVN6ZjWFH3e6BZzjj6u_mMjm_IEAjSXkktdQ7JZhnkxCA0NsjMIQqOCZhuMunU3REmkb1qBsUph38vLBQWuIPrGDZUkpXyNEu1KYtXqArOU0pjOMCXOx2IzHe0cw0Gp2OwKuRBi3WJo5-ibfdhyfhwMvzAYGYwHzWei9ulCoqUmGIzFFfrNk_X2eFr_wdeYeNxcZDCGmIlXU5434i9DfqwVhWOqqOTCneE1p5MYGOvjGTLDK2oG5sx-mq1_WHcPDK9_fXD6-o3_-tFK2UOnpyw7LXowHA0gA0PvU3bLf8ffz1Dq_cLn4vi_ypo0LI-n23d3mI4pcffW7a8-8iffVwb4EwAA__8xJZ9S)
I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwA9hbuIi0ctJcijRRKou1x2sUAyuM2bu3j1glfa4YaYpf3-j75-fb9Gbd7sL9u_U0zMVN6ZjWFH3e6BZzjj6u_mMjm_IEAjSXkktdQ7JZhnkxCA0NsjMIQqOCZhuMunU3REmkb1qBsUph38vLBQWuIPrGDZUkpXyNEu1KYtXqArOU0pjOMCXOx2IzHe0cw0Gp2OwKuRBi3WJo5-ibfdhyfhwMvzAYGYwHzWei9ulCoqUmGIzFFfrNk_X2eFr_wdeYeNxcZDCGmIlXU5434i9DfqwVhWOqqOTCneE1p5MYGOvjGTLDK2oG5sx-mq1_WHcPDK9_fXD6-o3_-tFK2UOnpyw7LXowHA0gA0PvU3bLf8ffz1Dq_cLn4vi_ypo0LI-n23d3mI4pcffW7a8-8iffVwb4EwAA__8xJZ9S) That's why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." ** ** It's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. ** ** So whether you've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: ** ** [THANK YOU, Friend!](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwA9hbuIi0ctJcijRRKou1x2sUAyuM2bu3j1glfa4YaYpf3-j75-fb9Gbd7sL9u_U0zMVN6ZjWFH3e6BZzjj6u_mMjm_IEAjSXkktdQ7JZhnkxCA0NsjMIQqOCZhuMunU3REmkb1qBsUph38vLBQWuIPrGDZUkpXyNEu1KYtXqArOU0pjOMCXOx2IzHe0cw0Gp2OwKuRBi3WJo5-ibfdhyfhwMvzAYGYwHzWei9ulCoqUmGIzFFfrNk_X2eFr_wdeYeNxcZDCGmIlXU5434i9DfqwVhWOqqOTCneE1p5MYGOvjGTLDK2oG5sx-mq1_WHcPDK9_fXD6-o3_-tFK2UOnpyw7LXowHA0gA0PvU3bLf8ffz1Dq_cLn4vi_ypo0LI-n23d3mI4pcffW7a8-8iffVwb4EwAA__8xJZ9S) ** ** We're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. ** ** I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were [ONE ELECTION AWAY](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwA9hbuIi0ctJcijRRKou1x2sUAyuM2bu3j1glfa4YaYpf3-j75-fb9Gbd7sL9u_U0zMVN6ZjWFH3e6BZzjj6u_mMjm_IEAjSXkktdQ7JZhnkxCA0NsjMIQqOCZhuMunU3REmkb1qBsUph38vLBQWuIPrGDZUkpXyNEu1KYtXqArOU0pjOMCXOx2IzHe0cw0Gp2OwKuRBi3WJo5-ibfdhyfhwMvzAYGYwHzWei9ulCoqUmGIzFFfrNk_X2eFr_wdeYeNxcZDCGmIlXU5434i9DfqwVhWOqqOTCneE1p5MYGOvjGTLDK2oG5sx-mq1_WHcPDK9_fXD6-o3_-tFK2UOnpyw7LXowHA0gA0PvU3bLf8ffz1Dq_cLn4vi_ypo0LI-n23d3mI4pcffW7a8-8iffVwb4EwAA__8xJZ9S) from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. ** ** President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. ** ** That's why this race means so much. ** ** So if you've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. ** ** And if you haven't given yet - [and you're able to spare even $1 today](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkbGO3CAQhp8Gd1gwA9hbuIi0ctJcijRRKou1x2sUAyuM2bu3j1glfa4YaYpf3-j75-fb9Gbd7sL9u_U0zMVN6ZjWFH3e6BZzjj6u_mMjm_IEAjSXkktdQ7JZhnkxCA0NsjMIQqOCZhuMunU3REmkb1qBsUph38vLBQWuIPrGDZUkpXyNEu1KYtXqArOU0pjOMCXOx2IzHe0cw0Gp2OwKuRBi3WJo5-ibfdhyfhwMvzAYGYwHzWei9ulCoqUmGIzFFfrNk_X2eFr_wdeYeNxcZDCGmIlXU5434i9DfqwVhWOqqOTCneE1p5MYGOvjGTLDK2oG5sx-mq1_WHcPDK9_fXD6-o3_-tFK2UOnpyw7LXowHA0gA0PvU3bLf8ffz1Dq_cLn4vi_ypo0LI-n23d3mI4pcffW7a8-8iffVwb4EwAA__8xJZ9S) - I'd be honored to have you on my team. clean_body: I will never take your sacrifice for granted. Politics today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. That's why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." It's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That's why this race means so much. So if you've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. Every single gift, no matter the size, fuels this must-win fight. Always grateful, Vivek Ramaswamy If the election were held today, we 'd come up just short.** We can't afford to lose this ground -- not now, not after everything we've built. Your support right now makes the difference between a comeback and a collapse. | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| After a landslide victory in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election last Tuesday, Defend Our Courts is already getting back to work.
Why?
Because in 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states--Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019rXEcBT3eP283jtIP8-Bthi2oiKJvmQwaCFf0mfAfuztTJLB-JgS5p8gKCatcHqVU-Z8370OwGkkrDF5vyMeXSsBA4CarS4DefirGf6rCH6DxJlIRDMDheDB43FfcYcDzYzsidq6N7ECnWj5d_kXuDHSJVC6djv51FgIQulE0EfSp77U0Z_irDEzZ374i7e3uYrEzTqGY7OBkWXUcG9xs-Yfbjz5PQ1V&c=0EZstL9LNFXPfPezuHSnB5BzL0Swt-1kcRZ4klGbcVF_AZBFqjwnLg==&ch=K5b9Du88FVFkUa_R-kJnYehSeQ3Q-Gd7_NLjY54OG0cs3lN_m7yKyQ==)
---
The stakes will be the same as PA for these elections--MAGA seizing control of these courts will give them control over election laws in each respective state, allowing them to issue decisions that could suppress Dem votes, and tilt the odds in MAGA's favor in future elections. This would all but make the Democrats path back to the White House impossible in 2028.
So our team is already looking ahead, crunching the numbers and identifying the Democrats that we need to turn out in each of these states to prevent a MAGA takeover.
But we haven't fully turned the page on PA despite our best efforts--we spent every last penny we had to fuel Tuesday's massive blowout victory. We have bills and staff to be paid first before we can go full steam ahead in AZ, GA, and MI.
We know we've asked a lot of you recently, and we wouldn't have had the success we did without your support. But that's also why we are planning to triple down, and take our winning formula to defend three more crucial courts in '26.
[So we're asking you today: Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to help us pay our team, close the books on PA, and move on to leading the defense of courts in GA, AZ, and MI?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019rXEcBT3eP283jtIP8-Bthi2oiKJvmQwaCFf0mfAfuztTJLB-JgS5p8gKCatcHqVU-Z8370OwGkkrDF5vyMeXSsBA4CarS4DefirGf6rCH6DxJlIRDMDheDB43FfcYcDzYzsidq6N7ECnWj5d_kXuDHSJVC6djv51FgIQulE0EfSp77U0Z_irDEzZ374i7e3uYrEzTqGY7NxWUTB2BhtOtVaqBKVNuWL&c=0EZstL9LNFXPfPezuHSnB5BzL0Swt-1kcRZ4klGbcVF_AZBFqjwnLg==&ch=K5b9Du88FVFkUa_R-kJnYehSeQ3Q-Gd7_NLjY54OG0cs3lN_m7yKyQ==)

clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | After a landslide victory in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election last Tuesday, Defend Our Courts is already getting back to work. Why? Because in 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states--Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan. | == The stakes will be the same as PA for these elections--MAGA seizing control of these courts will give them control over election laws in each respective state, allowing them to issue decisions that could suppress Dem votes, and tilt the odds in MAGA's favor in future elections. This would all but make the Democrats path back to the White House impossible in 2028. So our team is already looking ahead, crunching the numbers and identifying the Democrats that we need to turn out in each of these states to prevent a MAGA takeover. But we haven't fully turned the page on PA despite our best efforts--we spent every last penny we had to fuel Tuesday's massive blowout victory. We have bills and staff to be paid first before we can go full steam ahead in AZ, GA, and MI. We know we've asked a lot of you recently, and we wouldn't have had the success we did without your support. But that's also why we are planning to triple down, and take our winning formula to defend three more crucial courts in '26. == | | | | | == | == | == | == We truly appreciate all that you do for us and for Democrats everywhere. name: Holy war
subject: Boebert believes God gave her “permission” for fascist rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:

| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lyP4J82-4j1JkWxZJ80bxVitLZ-n6zoVfnABH3HfUyP3U4M2INFdni-te_kIaJRYYLcbMfrbfctcm_dNxwxp7mYK4iN5aWt7NQ9derAw8ZwvKffufV0lIBxqwby61Yqebxt0dws2lq63q8O_kSBKCRFZ1lto4758MtME93SC6HPVgT-AJ1XhZ-RWwwaN0eV3CO55WZaOmRXzl_KBTz9H7WeXfk0xAPyDV201MUlSnKQ=&c=51KKBDJ6uEfePpEHuOZcb5CSL926suGIyfp2igXMCigCaxYd38z1oA==&ch=5sdnC-oGrKXnl_ftrj8W5G7gibe_8XY7CKhYyg92Jbz0BHVdDuSrdA==)

In the months following the Charlie Kirk assassination we have seen an unprecedented power grab and wave of massive escalation from the right.
They are now using Kirk's martyrdom as a way to claim that God is granting them permission to implement theocratic fascist rule by any means necessary and with an iron fist.
And of course, Lauren Boebert is leading the charge and amplifying this rhetoric:

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: School Rankings, Feral Pig Encounters, and Texas vs. Georgia
body:
Children At Risk’s annual Texas [public school rankings](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQRp_G7rBgjP8KijTubtqUFobBHi0GC8h69-0jb5InuPWMjs75fn0tX5o8he2nPlCVl4tLwCt7LAXTks0eo086PChs2WHS_qQNg1mAQ8eEYKJbrCb_XmRt1crtJGpUYuhb4CMfu3pXKFGYAa3Uo0O3GqedGVrd9yNM1vSmJnXDhBCdAC5ANlPr7DpxdMMkO4lDJTlaKjE1ZceCL52df8cnpsbEo_ZqL-XMVfujgrmC-bquxsUX9Hv8nUsM91MF811VwWx28jZhYInyI7MPjf3NZP87GXCQDDq2Yi7_jpmVeLITk4vpoLAxS7kkMiWzhE_UHm2dlD0v8p5yfztvhyb_USzfG_ap4E8AAAD__9rhkeM) were released this week for the 2024-25 school year, showing academic progress across the state and especially for economically-challenged schools.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUb3OnDAQfBrTcfIPhqOgSITovlSRUlrGXrjVZ2Nkm-Pu7SM46jRpZ0Y7P_vnS31pdLjMv7SHLr-moBbYk4OcIapkHiG4qJdvXOY0QdRuxRkWozjlsmSsZFJZje6tqsJ2I7UtK6BjTS04vdO7LB5dxfR4l3Vrp7pum4mPlo363jJqR6kBTIHdcYwxJhmnjFe3Vkx2bClMTVvJChpSUbCYQ7zlB2R46TS5d3hCvJngC9c9cl4TET8IHwgf9n2_jZCywVnHNaKBdOgIH06ktBjB5BDfhA9J-9VBTOVJJcIHt722-C6TD9-QSkY_TGmCc2AyhqXkspGCHl5iSNoBWiJ63nJRNYTXW_YqhS0aIKL_fWQl_OfwiXvRHixunogevEZ3gUb7VeO8ENGfDdVVUS3hCX6EeC5-iU_Lf8nEEGEioq81rYvY2XVH5zDVx5Tz4Xoul__v38-O_w0AAP__aaPDVg) | |
# Saturday, November 15, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1836, [Lorenzo de Zavala](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OgzAQQOHTmA7kMT-GwsU2dNl2S-TgMViZeCLbgiSnX2WvsBd4n_R-LsvFBgpx-7Z3NOXpeYl4ZsJSMC153Zkp2XgLccsek6VH2DCui5KqrwFq6BdnA72WrnLmKt0EFRrQQ6vkKMe-2k23DtpPLXhEANl7OQ3gx1Z7PYIeUVbBfGIA0IOSoLpmar27ThK9nrq-Qy06iS4UTk3ZseDTZk8vPjA1K98rMnspjyzaL6FmoebzPJuSd8uRQsSG0ybUvNvorsw3oWaMJQXMQs1ve1iyNXHC-ObaYZWMe5yBKOTho253G-gPKf9bcxj1GwAA__9nHXku), the first vice president of the Republic of Texas, died near present-day Houston after contracting pneumonia. In our _Et Cetera_ section today, we report on a new way to travel without leaving Texas. A new Texas-themed ship from MSC Cruises allows you to hit the open seas with all the feelings of home around you. You can read [about it here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupCAUxvGn0Q4DKIMUFNvYzbZbmiMc9WQQDLDjzNvfzLzCrb_kn1--f_f5DhQobn_hQFtfa5ojXiVgrZjn4vaUQob4oLiVFTOEkzaMbpZcKiYEE2r2QOE9D623C_dGtGiFvvWSj3xU7W6XBfvRGQ18VEoLXL0E0LBq53VvbmNL9hMTQighuZBDZ_rVL4bjqs2gBtTNwNFTTbmrO1Z8QVnDOz0xdy4dbbB7rWdp-j-NnBo5XdfV1eTh_VkbOT3JY2rktGFlEBnFQh5ZSOnBoLKjOObyfypY2DfN6o4HelYQioMTWdnpZFJJrrRQ2pi-zdafF4VA5faxbQdQ-FLq7w58WvkTAAD__53Ehd0). _**Mistake Tracking:** In Friday's edition, we mistakenly wrote that Mack Rhoades resigned as Baylor University's athletic director. In fact, Mr. Rhodes [took a leave of absence](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQBb8GZ4yAgfE6ILjE2V56odWGxkbbQ1uAxjt_f_KFl27-VHpVfz6XT8iUy_Ybnuj7d-Kl4NkIe8e6tLAzU4XylcvWElagI29YwmKUcVJrqd0SIdN7sUP0q4qTHtDr8XE36kN9uGH3MSk048M8wLowuhQmNZnkrF1h1ErZIfsLprV22iht7G26p7hOCtM4WWdxFFZhzJ3rre_Y8Rtaoje_sN4CPwfye-9HE_dfwszCzOd53sLa2sG1t2shzByYCDeUibmvQCTMfFkKM6_wJq4S-k7Yc5AxVwydq3xC-JJ1Z4jYJCG8UHKSsDYsAWXreBy5bDLyWeT_eHkQvDklGXbIVZh5qD4eZybK7XHpbE_I9O99_1nzlzd_AwAA__8g1Zqu) from his role as athletic director "amid a university investigation," while stepping down and being replaced for a separate role as chair of the College Football Playoff Selection Committee. ## New Public School Rankings Released
Children At Risk’s annual Texas [public school rankings](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQRp_G7rBgjP8KijTubtqUFobBHi0GC8h69-0jb5InuPWMjs75fn0tX5o8he2nPlCVl4tLwCt7LAXTks0eo086PChs2WHS_qQNg1mAQ8eEYKJbrCb_XmRt1crtJGpUYuhb4CMfu3pXKFGYAa3Uo0O3GqedGVrd9yNM1vSmJnXDhBCdAC5ANlPr7DpxdMMkO4lDJTlaKjE1ZceCL52df8cnpsbEo_ZqL-XMVfujgrmC-bquxsUX9Hv8nUsM91MF811VwWx28jZhYInyI7MPjf3NZP87GXCQDDq2Yi7_jpmVeLITk4vpoLAxS7kkMiWzhE_UHm2dlD0v8p5yfztvhyb_USzfG_ap4E8AAAD__9rhkeM) were released this week for the 2024-25 school year, showing academic progress across the state and especially for economically-challenged schools. Dallas Independent School District (ISD) schools took top honors for high schools and middle schools in the state, with Carroll Elementary of Carroll ISD rated as the top elementary school. Children At Risk measures test performance, student growth, equity, and college readiness in its analysis, and the company’s CEO, Bob Sanborn, emphasized that the [statewide improvements](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOnDAQxvGngc4re2wWXFCkobu0KdHgGYMVg5HtHLdvH7HJG1z7jfSXfvPrY_7AEMOx_sSdx_rl03zwVSLXynkubkspZjx-h2MtnjPGM6x8uBkkdEIpobqZMMTXbFoaF0lWtTyq_qlBDnLo2m2E59MNVhGyssah01rLXpKyS6c19L4N4x1TSnUKpALzsNrTYiX73prOcN8YyRRqyo-6ceUvLD6-0ifnh0t7G8et1rM0-kcDUwPTdV2PyyPexwYmzDW4yA1Mt6uBiemPwxrScU8p1028k2LhUsU_cPk_ZT5TrmJNkUQOy5IOsYV1E3sgiiw48s5HxfxqYIKhF4bQ68H0Qi-GhTGGxILWC4XW6cEAEQ9tHum8QoyhPG_ZumOIb0j93vs_R_gbAAD__2Ipmd8) came without additional state funding. The rankings also include a Gold Ribbon list, recognizing high-poverty schools (at least 75% of students below the poverty line) that earned A or B ratings. You can see the [full rankings here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp_G3mLBNdhmYOjiLV07IgwX-yoEIkD5efsq2Tr3Ab5z9J2fszlbipT2b3tF3Z4hm4SPGrE1LKa6I-dYbLpQ2mvAYuONdkzOAAN54vzEpfGW4suI3uuNecV71HyeRmALW2R_6HGxTo0qOOGCUFYtMywyyGmTbJuXae5Jv2Gcc8mBcRCDGoPfFMMwKyEFzp1g6KnlMrQDGz5tDfGV71gGl6991Edrt9qNXx2sHazuoOgLJtsK1cuQy97BCgzE6a35zP_e6mDti_a3B8VIdXrr9qul-KG3_zW5a_gNAAD__9Kndbw).
## Feral Pig Encounters on the Rise in Texas
Residents in suburban areas across Texas are having more encounters with [feral pigs](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAQhp8Gs7YAZdSA4BKzvfRCq4VWqUWwgB1n3v6KeYVNOumu_r_v__e1fKHzLux_8SRdXltcAt3ZUymUlmyOGH3C8O3CnjdK6C-3UzCL5FKBECDUYtH599I3Vq_cTqIhLYZHJ_nIR9Ucmh44dWrdBjWi4N0wcWWoE8rYddhGYxqn6zMhhBKSC9m3U7fZdeK0DVOvehpYz8m6ElNbDir0wrz5d3xSak08G6-PUq7Muj9MzkzO93233xlLXTI5VxsmZx8NeibnGsXkLEQdPZMzJoKPGFxuz2Di6cIOJQJCILcfa0xHjBYCYYJ3_IEPAOAJ9LooFbjrVYYrFgrFoQeDP5lqZpO0vW7nvcuPKrGf6PyHufyu6aeW_wMAAP__3auTww), according to Texas A&M researcher Jay Long, with encounters expected to rise as weather cools. [Researchers agree](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAQgJ_G3rA4_IM9MHTJlq4dLQKHQb2ABTRO3r5y1Dfo9ulO-vTdfV3Xqw4U4vap76jq06U14lEIa8W8FuNToqzjd4hbcZg17WHDaFbBxcgAGIyr1YFe69BadeN2gRYVyKkXfObz2HoFy7yYZRpuiDhJ2TvH9eiMAGP0LKexDeqUAcAIgoMYuqV39rZwdHIZxgFlM3C0oabcVY8Vn7o4eqUH5s6ke0vK17qXpv9oxKURl-M4OuNziue2ERcKDs9xIPuHOtdg6KS3jL3vYj5thZlElrmcYmXlJ2_IBIAQIGW3-73Nyu5HIAplOqO2uw70bqj_-9xDid8AAAD__62dgz4) that, while feral pigs have long been a costly problem in rural Texas, metropolitan areas sprawling into the pigs’ habitat is causing the uptick in suburban encounters. Pigs can be hunted year-round without a bag limit, but according to Long, HOA and city ordinances can make traditional mitigation measures difficult, and the feral pig concern is likely to continue rising as a result.
## Matthew McConaughey Inks AI Voice Deal
Iconic Texas actor Matthew McConaughey has signed a deal with AI firm ElevenLabs, which will allow the company to [replicate McConaughey’s voice](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOpDAQRU8DWbVsN4YhcNBJa5NZaaINUWEXuLTGRrYHum-_Yq8wWZW-9PTf__M5fSIHjutv3MjU15KmSGcJVCvlqVifUsgY_3Jcy0IZw84rRTspoTRICVJPDjm8p651ZhZulC0ZOfR3JT7Eh269sePs8D5rpwanerFoFD3qUQxWjTSjaNlcMCmllkpI1d3G--LmUdAyjJ3uaGg6QY5ryrfqqdILyxLe6aB8s2lrg_G17qW5Pxr1bNTzPM_bVuKVNepJEb5Lo55bOpiu47K7fqzV0wmbtSni9-rpDRgdbGw9UgCLHAkKrxEcYSiwpAzIcCS2BJn2wBYLnFw9UKCDYsD5AmOGx0N-0a-vvs3G7SeHwKW_JNYNOfzvXH-29GHUvwAAAP__toGViw) for any given text. McConaughey has been an investor in ElevenLabs since its founding in 2022, and he is now using the technology to launch a Spanish-language version, in his voice, of his newsletter, _Lyrics of Livin’_. The company also signed a deal to use British acting legend Michael Caine's voice on products. ElevenLabs has said they developed technology to better block [cloning celebrity voices](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL0O3CAQhJ_G7jgBBv8UFGmuu7QprTUs9iprsAzx3b195LxCuhmNNPpmfr3mFxBTWn_Cjq5-Yp4TvgtjrXjOxW858wnpN6W1RDyBD1ox-VlLbYVSQtk5APF3Nm1wiwyTatGpoe-0HOVo282BtGaMywihM4NU2i5RazB98GB0lKEld5cppazSUmnzmLoYlkliHCZjDQ6NkRio5vNRN6z4gRL5my88Hz7vLbut1qM03Y9GPxv9hOMecEe3OSt5xluRuDJ5FJ5zwiJ28hsgCw-UUOxQ64ZvsXufE_xZN_wKZLwwMSxFwCT7OCntjZVyiQidXWwXDQQ54Gj69nTheBMzlf7GXXcg_kdX_-_Ty-m_AQAA__9Vn4vl) without consent after someone used ElevenLabs software to mimic Joe Biden’s voice in a call sent to New Hampshire voters in 2024.

body:

------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Nov 14, 2025 04:04 pm
A man fell from the roof of a bus onto the Maine Turnpike on Friday after hoisting himself aloft to ‘get some air.’ Derrick McDuffy 35, of New York, a passenger on the bus, at one point decided he was feeling “overheated,” Maine State Police reported. McDuffy “opened the bus’s emergency roof access hatch before [...]
