name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Literally MAGA’s #1 target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3115a801-a76c-4426-99cf-a9c81f0853a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than $10 million on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous. Why so much money, this far from Election Day? Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. That is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign. _And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back._ If Jon is going to defend this seat, we really need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens. [Can Jon Ossoff count on you to contribute $5, $50 or whatever you can afford to help him lay the foundation for a winning Senate reelection campaign here in Georgia? Your donation will be split between his reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T333a67d7-e0c7-4cf7-ad62-53ef9abcecd2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5daa56bb-b555-4420-8424-36d2f4051423/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but Citizens United opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections. That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections. And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations _from the very start._ Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending. So here’s the truth: Jon needs our help today, Peter. _He is literally MAGA’s #1 target._ They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book. So yes, this election will be tough. But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before. Let’s do it again. [Please, use this link to support Jon’s reelection campaign and Blue Amp Action. Every donation counts. Every donation sends a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight and win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T396622cc-0623-4015-9b8d-9dc4949f8965/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd13a0e1-3068-4722-961a-27c67238d796/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d5247e7-188c-45d7-8bb3-a4c9e5ad7802/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te42ab0de-1a99-446c-926e-eb26c267b670/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you! \- Team Ossoff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba23d929-d553-453d-8576-5b47cf5884c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)| Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| |
| **Blue Amp Action**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251115_ossoff-pummeled_b1_f1_s1_c1_warmup_rs-t0?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e2b110a-01a1-4be3-852f-e22658eaa14e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=97e94b8d-4766-4f38-89fe-21798a297d70&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=97e94b8d-4766-4f38-89fe-21798a297d70&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Action
subject: The most powerful gift wrap in America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
They won't forget the gift... or what it was wrapped in

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkUGu3CAMQE9DdhkFDAlZZFE1itTF_9sukQOeDGoCFMjM9au00wP8nWW_Z8v2zw_zgX73YfvEgyb79CYXUx90xFJTfFG-n_vm7_WVMflgRCdUy3nL1cXxxk3W9SAamvjQg-j0KIfmMXGw44ojcq1XtHocxEro9DrcO6tW6Bo_XZ0454oLrqS8ISkJ0oEi1ytyisnuTA4rlZuNoVB-YvVP8iHEK4rhZuPR7NOj1lQYfGNiYWIpZM9MNwzkYr0IJpaa0F4CEwtwxFG4tdXk-lbCCK3W49rKOwEMo9bKKQZLiWe2ZGx0xGD-_uNzUAIEE_1ZD3OQ8-fBYKYD_f5O_jMYzA_MDssvg_b3u2TxSOi3wGCuCY0czHXK5MNmEibK_7EYKoXKYMYmTy69_L770g9Mdts16O-69esPek7iTwAAAP__qj-gLA)
---
Friend,
---
At Turning Point Action, we don't chase headlines. We chase victories. Real ones -- in the field, in battlegrounds, with every door we knock and every ballot we chase. 2024 proved that our machine works. _The 10 states we chased ballots in? _ We won every single one of them to help put Donald J. Trump back in the White House. _And now, we're building something even bigger..._ To guarantee our America First movement wins again and again for years to come. subject: Boebert believes God gave her “permission” for fascist rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V_oWcH6hOgcH5vMjDmrKBXJjYGxNi30m6nuiKYsb3FwX0_XuSzoYtdGM4mOb3qwMd9lu68wBxxRNW01Sp_fpKAkMg8Zdo06gFRSphDuJ3b92J7fGLhn9u-Dfp5PDVosnyTfRBrfMm8bt4GnJpglbfmef_PKX9EO0tO1UmxUlca3WBdUZHRPS1Aeu2MHdQtQpsy3f4C82TG5f6QCDu3MUiVspYoPHwahI&c=LjlKSW-EP0LyLMNcWnjbN26_sFOwzIKKD4FjXvGdC-6U9EM1dJmN6A==&ch=8bx-EfSNNaw4olRC9pjQbpNfcgW4jE6GFVb4OgbNaWFwwy3Y6Z3R6A==)
---
|

Peter,
In the months following the Charlie Kirk assassination we have seen an unprecedented power grab and wave of massive escalation from the right.
They are now using Kirk's martyrdom as a way to claim that God is granting them permission to implement theocratic fascist rule by any means necessary and with an iron fist.
And of course, Lauren Boebert is leading the charge and amplifying this rhetoric:

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V_oWcH6hOgcH5vMjDmrKBXJjYGxNi30m6nuiKYsb3FwX0_XuSzoYtdGM4mOb3qwMd9lu68wBxxRNW01Sp_fpKAkMg8Zdo06gFRSphDuJ3b92J7fGLhn9u-Dfp5PDVosnyTfRBrfMm8bt4GnJpglbfmef_PKX9EO0tO1UmxUlca3WBdUZHRPS1Aeu2MHdQtQpsy3f4C82TG5f6QCDu3MUieFJaL4Ct9Jj&c=LjlKSW-EP0LyLMNcWnjbN26_sFOwzIKKD4FjXvGdC-6U9EM1dJmN6A==&ch=8bx-EfSNNaw4olRC9pjQbpNfcgW4jE6GFVb4OgbNaWFwwy3Y6Z3R6A==)
---
Boebert's retweet endorsing far-right pundit Matt Walsh's assertion that the Kirk killing has given the right divine permission to rule as they see fit.
---
Lauren Boebert is a Christian fundamentalist who in the past has said that "God is sending a holy army to save Colorado from the left" -- now her views are becoming mainstream.
Trump has three years left and if this is how bad things are getting we can only imagine what our nation will look like in 2028.
We need to ensure that Boebert does not get another term in Congress where she can continue to push far-right religious extremism. She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late.
[Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running to unseat Lauren Boebert and 2026 could be our last chance to beat her before she is able to start the holy war that she is begging for. Can you rush a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 to help us remove her from Congress before it is too late?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V_oWcH6hOgcH5vMjDmrKBXJjYGxNi30m6nuiKYsb3FwX0_XuSzoYtdGM4mOb3qwMUK5lclfWwdNQnwSRj9nDd0SSZrQWxM1wTingk9Th1xu7kuVFZcNEPLaYfSkFm4BmFzYR0_3-s--BBr38BxuzMyIfwx_A1_-eZo8Ya1HkATgReJM-Rb0GREx3u2zcMqu58ZXDQ9SlCFCaHf_LpUCNmK1JEYJWG-qm7vNsxrSGcGFJT3bdKuUZwA==&c=LjlKSW-EP0LyLMNcWnjbN26_sFOwzIKKD4FjXvGdC-6U9EM1dJmN6A==&ch=8bx-EfSNNaw4olRC9pjQbpNfcgW4jE6GFVb4OgbNaWFwwy3Y6Z3R6A==)

clean_body: She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late. | | | | | == | Peter, In the months following the Charlie Kirk assassination we have seen an unprecedented power grab and wave of massive escalation from the right. They are now using Kirk's martyrdom as a way to claim that God is granting them permission to implement theocratic fascist rule by any means necessary and with an iron fist. And of course, Lauren Boebert is leading the charge and amplifying this rhetoric: | == Boebert's retweet endorsing far-right pundit Matt Walsh's assertion that the Kirk killing has given the right divine permission to rule as they see fit. Lauren Boebert is a Christian fundamentalist who in the past has said that "God is sending a holy army to save Colorado from the left" -- now her views are becoming mainstream. Trump has three years left and if this is how bad things are getting we can only imagine what our nation will look like in 2028. We need to ensure that Boebert does not get another term in Congress where she can continue to push far-right religious extremism. She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == The time to beat Boebert is now. ---
| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

This wasn’t part of any planned launch or official demo.

No crowd. No narration. No visible controls.

Just the truck—stationary at first—before it initiated autonomous movement.

The observers were silent, watching intently.

What followed wasn’t a pre-programmed stunt or a malfunction.

It was a real-time demonstration of advanced capabilities — something that exceeded all expectations.

Industry leaders are replaying the footage and discussing what it means for automotive AI.

Once you’ve seen it, you’ll realize: the future of AI-driven vehicles is here already.

[Watch the full clip today and see the technology in action.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=745a09420a9d4566b7083e288312f9b8&_e=QJlveAw-SB6OgxLYpD8EeE5X_tylWR6Ko1mKlEw6la-e2GpN4SZ7HP6MCfjM72Prren0MeebR4b9JJRk69Fa8J3FObRtcaz17gW2qnPWVHtphltN-4YaoNFRIDxU3xuJfG0G0P0Ns7LLOPMD1q4xvju0eHVIOc4YMO68uhaFKKl5dtukYLDDvAWfjJfOiyToR4_SU_D3JkqFyrrdYec6DdKw2JkqQdFT_ptFYWrOF-MnGbIB5ZzgM-L6GMDymMdWy1PB7ZkUUy2_ELg_VY6ki_EjeDOYuI9zqUuO8uISJIKqIiH1TG_dgRb8KHCbTqa5K0J02U7rxyKqMeg1PTxUYvlQ8nlElznAYCcSuvys3D3iqQSxLaRW_sZ25ReD1wKcjCXyhiGfaBnNzLLFtunFPejIoQUKKZ_vP89VF6xcE9leTr-bwT5-Ck9GW7KQUqNVBVQkiX43Yfsc-1WWspBmloJjGshLas71ql-0nC56QKRrNeouAf9iNNykNPqXLdAAgTkxYq_lNQaSarstQoPfmETnLfL5ogHJ6NKK3h3j2rBdhCdJ9Q2zRFeZeP-xLfnbtqvr5SLjbVLBGh41k0DZjQ%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. body:
#

Peter,
We told you that MAGA would use every lie and dirty trick in the book to try to replace Jon with a far-right loyalist who will just do whatever Trump says.
Well, here’s Exhibit A:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251115-1-subs&t=1&akid=1089%2E5691347%2EymMpzD)
Jon’s MAGA opponent created an AI deepfake of Jon with fake information and words he **_never**_ said. We’ll explain more in a moment, but first: [**Can you chip in $5 to help Jon fight back and set the record straight?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251115-1-subs&t=2&akid=1089%2E5691347%2EymMpzD)
_This is what we’re up against, Peter._ They know that they can’t attack Jon on his record, so they resort to literally making things up and hoping people don’t realize it’s fake.
**It’s pathetic and creepy.**
_Peter, MAGA is stooping to these depths because _they view Jon Ossoff as a threat._ They want him defeated and gone and replaced with a far-right lackey who will not only allow but actually _support_ Trump’s corruption. _
That’s why they’ve already spent $10 MILLION on this race alone, and it’s why they’re resorting to lies and deception like this fake video.
**We can fight back and win, just like we did in 2021. But Jon can’t do it alone.**
[**Will you please make a donation to Jon’s reelection campaign today? Even $5 or $10 will go a long way toward helping us fight back against this AI deepfake and set the record straight.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251115-1-subs&t=3&akid=1089%2E5691347%2EymMpzD)

Thanks for having Jon’s back, especially right now.
Team Jon Ossoff

subject: Mississippi Voters Demand Universal School Choice – New Poll Shows Overwhelming Support
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/schoolchoicepolls?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
Big news on School Choice this week! A fresh poll shows massive support in Mississippi to have **families, not government, control their child’s education. Mississippi voters say they’ll reward lawmakers who make it happen.**

The brand-new statewide survey (October 27-30, 2025) conducted by The Tarrance Group shows rock-solid support for expanding education freedom. There is massive bipartisan support across every region, race, and political affiliation.
---
|
---
_Pick a side: President Trump or Randi Weingarten?_
| **Any little cliques that try to derail school choice need to know what they are going to be up against.** Either they can support School Choice and President Trump, or they can side with leftwing teacher unions - and lose, as some anti School Choice lawmakers in Texas found out.

**Here’s what Mississippi voters are saying - loud and clear:**

* **86%** support parents, **not government** , choosing the best school for their child (58% _strongly_).
_Support spans demographics: 87% White, 83% Black, 93% Republican, 83% Independent, 76% Democrat._
* **75%** support **Education Savings Accounts (ESAs)** for **all families** —no income caps, no district restrictions.
_75% of K-12 parents agree. 83% of Republicans, 73% of Independents, 65% of Democrats._
* **79%** are **more likely to vote** for legislators who expand ESAs **statewide and universally** (+58 net favorability).
_Even 71% of Democrats say they’re more likely to support pro-ESA lawmakers._
* **78%** agree that when **funding follows the child** , schools become **more accountable** (35% _strongly_).
* **77%** support letting dissatisfied families **switch schools and take their funding with them**.
* **Bonus boost:** **66%** say President Trump’s strong support for universal school choice makes them **more supportive** (+34 net).

Mississippians see progress and according to the poll, 58% say K-12 education is heading in the right direction - and 65% of parents agree.
---
|
---
_75% of Mississippi voters support Education Savings Accounts that give families control over their child’s share to the education budget._
| **Wanting School Choice is not fringe – it’s the mainstream position in Mississippi.**

With your help, we’ll hold lawmakers accountable and deliver the education freedom Mississippi families deserve.

Thank you for being part of this movement.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=43944626e9&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Onward,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: Meet Me in Tennessee and Texas
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/meet-me-in-tennessee-and-texas?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# Meet Me in Tennessee and Texas
Dear Friends and Supporters,

I am writing this letter a few days before our road trip to visit family, so please let me wish you an early “Happy Thanksgiving!”

I am truly grateful for all that America has provided me. Only in America could someone like me come here 37 years ago with nothing, build a life for myself, raise a family, start a home business, and eventually become a Republican nominee for the U.S. Congress in New Hampshire.

Happy Veterans Day vets! 11/11/2025 was Veterans Day. Thank you! This is our family photo from 2012 when my second son just finished basic training at Ft. Benning and my oldest son was attending the Air Force Academy. I am a very proud mother of two veteran sons.

**Oct. 29 - Lily on Fox News**
I was on _Fox & Friends_ to discuss President Trump’s trip to Asia.
Trump was in South Korea to meet with Xi Jinping of China for high-stakes talks
| Fox News Video [https://www.foxnews.com/video/6384234638112](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=4c6e92fcc2&e=c338950e03)

**My Upcoming Travel - Come and Meet me!**
Nov. 18 - Knoxville, TN at 7pm
Nov. 19 - Loudon, TN at 9am
Nov. 22 - Austin, TX at 7pm

If you are a current supporter, or wish to get involved to support my campaign and live near one of these locations, I would love to meet you in person. Please respond to this newsletter if you are interested in coming.

I am so thankful to count you as one of my supporters as I campaign hard to win in 2026. Thank you and God Bless!

[https://www.lilytangwilliams.com/congress/donate/](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=d21da7f0b9&e=c338950e03)

subject: Rise and shine, friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
I'm sounding a wake-up call to every single member of our people-powered team.
| | |
---
Good morning, friend!
I know I'm up early for a weekend, but after yesterday's call with my campaign manager, Ben, I needed to write this email to you.
Last night, Ben told me that at the rate grassroots donations were trickling in, **our team was on track to come up** **12% short of my $30,000 mid-month goal by the cutoff at 11:59 p.m. tonight.**
So, before you go fix a second cup of coffee, I first have to ask: **[Can you please chip in $3.50, or anything at all, ahead of this can't-miss deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119329407/582713825/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=3.50&refcode=jtk985-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2VkYzgxMi0yY2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuhIj3WonPmsdP2aTZt0FjP0zdyDshIc1iPBybtNRrQ=)**
| | [Donate $3.50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119329410/582713827/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=3.50&refcode=jtk985-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2VkYzgxMi0yY2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuhIj3WonPmsdP2aTZt0FjP0zdyDshIc1iPBybtNRrQ=)
---
See, we're now less than one year out from Colorado's gubernatorial election and halfway through the last quarter of 2025. As such, tonight's the biggest mid-month deadline we've seen to date, so we can't afford to fall flat.
Because if we fall behind on our year-end fundraising numbers, we won't enter 2026 with the resources we need to win. And as soon as that data goes public, our opponents and national GOP megadonors alike _will not hesitate_ to capitalize on any perceived weakness.
Of course, we have a lot of time until then. **The worst thing we could do now is squander it. **
And reaching tonight's goal isn't just key to closing 2025 ahead of all my opponents in fundraising strength. It's how we're going to hit the campaign trail in 2026 with the strongest possible _people-powered_ lead.
**So with less than 17 hours left to close the gap, I'm sounding an early-morning wake-up call to every single member of our grassroots team. **
**[Will you help me lay the groundwork for victory by rushing just $3.50 – less than a regular black coffee – or anything you can right away? I can't cross the finish line as governor-elect next November without your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119329411/582713828/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=3.50&refcode=jtk985-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2VkYzgxMi0yY2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XuhIj3WonPmsdP2aTZt0FjP0zdyDshIc1iPBybtNRrQ=)**

clean_body: I'm sounding a wake-up call to every single member of our people-powered team. | | | Good morning, friend! I know I'm up early for a weekend, but after yesterday's call with my campaign manager, Ben, I needed to write this email to you. Last night, Ben told me that at the rate grassroots donations were trickling in, our team was on track to come up 12% short of my $30,000 mid-month goal by the cutoff at 11:59 p.m. tonight. So, before you go fix a second cup of coffee, I first have to ask: = | | = See, we're now less than one year out from Colorado's gubernatorial election and halfway through the last quarter of 2025. As such, tonight's the biggest mid-month deadline we've seen to date, so we can't afford to fall flat. Because if we fall behind on our year-end fundraising numbers, we won't enter 2026 with the resources we need to win. And as soon as that data goes public, our opponents and national GOP megadonors alike will not hesitate to capitalize on any perceived weakness. Of course, we have a lot of time until then. The worst thing we could do now is squander it. And reaching tonight's goal isn't just key to closing 2025 ahead of all my opponents in fundraising strength. It's how we're going to hit the campaign trail in 2026 with the strongest possible people-powered lead. So with less than 17 hours left to close the gap, I'm sounding an early-morning wake-up call to every single member of our grassroots team. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = I hope you enjoy a restful weekend – and that I can count on your help today. Thanks for everything, Michael | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Deadline be damned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1309671/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3Yva2NWcG16R0hVZg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMTU/LbmNseDFCdFkzZA/qP2hpZHM9bmMxRG9oYWoxc3laS0Vscw/gaRiMwg/s7la2b425cc)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
Of all the things the Deep State did to me – _raiding my home, arresting me, holding me in the most violent jail in America, pushing me to the brink of bankruptcy..._
---
_...The worst thing they did was**DISBAR** me._
---
As the Bible says, earthly possessions will always fade, money comes and goes, but there are greater _priceless_ treasures.
---
_You see, I used my law license to defend the innocent, to take down bad guys, and to uphold our Constitution._
---
Truth be told, I didn’t make much money with my law license. But I _did_ make a difference. It was my legacy of justice – and it’s worth more than gold.
---
**_And the Left has STOLEN that from me._**
---
__Not only that, but I can no longer use my law license to defend myself from the Democrats’ lawfare.__
---
**Right now, I am facing a DEADLINE on 11/21 that will determine whether the Democrats’ last remaining RIGGED TRIAL against me proceeds or is thrown out for good!**
---
And because it’s in _state_ court, the President _cannot_ save me with a _federal_ pardon...
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, and no money for a top-notch legal defense team, I’m running out of options.**
---
**_BUT DEADLINE BE DAMNED, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM UNTIL THE VERY END!_**
---
_That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust._YOU_ truly are my final hope._
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund before the 11/21 TRIAL DEADLINE so that I can keep fighting to ensure my TRIAL IS DROPPED.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---

---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
---

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Republicans are breaking health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
America’s health care crisis is here – and Congress must act.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119331236/582719563/1438484806?refcode=EM_F_251114Shutdown_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWRiZmI5Mi0yZmMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6537oLwyQyRiDZyfagt0xObGxSnB5y4uYDuG4StM2j8=) Peter,

On Wednesday, after the longest shutdown in U.S. history, Republicans passed a spending bill that locks in massive health care price increases that will cause millions of people to lose coverage.

The bill passed funds the government only through January 30, 2026, with NO legislative action to extend the Affordable Care Act tax credits. The Republican-led House Rules Committee _rejected_ a Democratic amendment to extend the credits for three years.

**Trump’s greed and Republican cuts are breaking health care in America.** Ohio cannot afford Trump’s agenda, and House Republicans simply do not care. 38,000 people in my district alone will see their premiums skyrocket: **America’s health care crisis is here – and Congress must act.**

For seven weeks, I stood firm with the people I represent who wanted to see health care protected, and I will continue to fight. There’s still time for Trump and Republicans in Congress to do the right thing, and we must keep up the pressure.

In this together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?
---

body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119331395/582719829/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_251115Fwd_N_AP_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjZGJmYjkyLTJmYzItZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i3dBVRnBEXyRY6qThVKiWrameyrRDoZ01sD5qKdhF2g=)
---
Peter – did you see this message?

Despite Oklahoma being one of the worst states in the nation for women in almost every way, the Republican frontrunner for governor, Charles McCall, released a BANANAS ad that panders to the most extreme and focuses solely on gender being “god-given.”

**Here is our endorsed candidate, Cyndi Munson’s response:** “Instead of focusing on lowering costs—a real concern & issue we’re all facing—Charles McCall is choosing to marginalize & demonize people to pander to the most extreme in his party for power.”

[**Here’s the latest: Cyndi needs our immediate help to fund her own ad responding to her opponent’s unbelievable video (you can watch it here). Voters deserve to see that they have an alternative, and Cyndi needs help spreading her message of affordability, lower healthcare costs, safety for women, and SOLUTIONS. Help us fund Cyndi Munson’s response ad by rushing a split $20.25 or more contribution today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-cyndiad/?refcode=EM_F_251115Fwd_N_AP_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25)

We’ve seen Democratic governors win in “red” states, and if anyone can turn the tide in Oklahoma – it’s Cyndi.

Together,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

National studies continue to rank Oklahoma as one of the worst states (if not THE worst state) for women. Oklahoma has the highest rates of domestic violence and the worst maternal death rates nationwide. They have one of the strictest abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions for rape or incest. Most recently, in the aftermath of Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,” more than half of Oklahoma's rural hospitals are at risk of closing.

Despite all of that, the Republican frontrunner for Governor of Oklahoma – Charles McCall, who is currently the GOP Speaker of the Oklahoma House of Representatives – has decided that the biggest issue he’d like to address with voters is that “gender is god-given, and there’s only two of ‘em.”

See below for his, truly, BANANAS, ad. You have to see it to believe it.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119331396/582719831/1126729394?refcode=EM_F_251115Fwd_N_AP_90DO_5_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNjZGJmYjkyLTJmYzItZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=i3dBVRnBEXyRY6qThVKiWrameyrRDoZ01sD5qKdhF2g=)
---
In addition to this horrifying ad, McCall’s campaign website brags about his record of passing the **_strongest anti-choice law_** in the nation, supporting legislation that attacks vaccines, holding an A rating from the NRA, banning sanctuary cities, erasing Critical Race Theory from schools, and much more.

**THE GOOD NEWS is that, if McCall wins the Republican primary, he will have a formidable and qualified Democratic WOMAN as his opponent. Her name is Cyndi Munson, and she is running a strong, well-organized campaign to be the GOVERNOR of Oklahoma. Her Bold Move is honored to support her.**

**Unsurprisingly, Oklahoma is among the states with the lowest women’s representation in its state government – less than 20%. As outlined above, this underrepresentation is reflected in the state’s dangerous and draconian policies for women:** [**Now is the time to block men like Charles McCall from passing even more harmful legislation – and bullying his own constituents. Will you help Her Bold Move bring pro-women leadership to Oklahoma by rushing a split donation of $20.25 or more today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-cyndiad/?refcode=EM_F_251115Fwd_N_AP_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=20.25)
---

As Governor, Cyndi will repeal Oklahoma’s abortion ban. As she’s been meeting with thousands of voters across her state, she’s found that voters on both sides of the aisle feel that the current anti-abortion laws do not meet their values and instead prevent women from getting the care they need.

Additionally, according to the 2024 March of Dimes report, 51.9% of Oklahomans do not have access to maternity healthcare, and an additional 18.2% have low/moderate access to healthcare. As Governor, Cyndi wants to increase access to maternity healthcare for women across the state and fully eliminate these healthcare deserts. Her plan is to introduce legislation that would increase funding for hospitals and assist in the recruitment of doctors who specialize in women’s healthcare.

**Here’s the thing:** Cyndi flipped a _majority_ _Republican_ district and has kept it for the last 10 years – she’s actually increased her win margins election after election. She accomplished this by knocking on doors, having honest conversations, and staying true to her values. Now, she needs our help to keep up that momentum.

We’ve seen Democratic Governors win in “red” states – despite having Republican supermajorities in their State Houses and Senate chambers. Kentucky and Kansas, for example, have both elected popular Democratic Governors. **If anyone can do it, it’s Cyndi Munson.**

[**As women across Oklahoma endure harsh conditions inflicted on them by their majority-male government, we can help make an actual difference – and ensure men like Charles McCall do not get to govern women’s bodies. Please rush critical early support to our efforts by chipping in a split $20.25 or more contribution between Cyndi’s campaign and Her Bold Move today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-cyndiad/?refcode=EM_F_251115Fwd_N_AP_90DO_5_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: The 3:00 a.m. phone call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4bf60ae64c124d3d88ad5f9b6306a168&_e=0YEYwIfgmDtYhsvefoGki-65y8aC7Aa16h3ZFz7VCoHoKpfDMbqwLMAzrLOiYGLmDSj0akjF5hiObVRHXpPmVfDON2L-vUMSxF6IR3bMSxbOPslv8Pi5fnRgKf_sNK8bwEDfacCvsy-5I_i4sES-U_OaPK7-AdCtWlirxklr-4NiBYud1dDxtPfWQBKh5lKTlfdB4ZsIgwuVGVKGC59ZeZBnXsdiQdvFmzRroErceWQWr6Dl79BAvrsm44qJUzgNru7r9aoE7JBhOIZGa1BhkhLDh004UhWkWwsYdtQXJVlRaSqSIXy09djVt4dpf0PCzAnuUCgQXFrT3vph-uJiCzwCrfahRdKInF2mmAHUVbTLwTLdovJr0mG-h7xRZP2pSd5D4rbt4hq5WTjNkdIUa6nD4zJhr3F5h0yb3iqnTlzbv4xE1zC5laEpcCUmeGxdlwCfyU1m15Dj27MVVmXE6BIeJAoi3FsivIQOLA3oH7kLE5K5nw3oS7gznrf6svCvBghKGwbSqmmphNPfQszAedaWDZZMfjMq2S1IihtojlGnK9AixJpHcRh3ra0r4eoU1gaXaSitgpI0QNtXWlTMexzq7bQs5aeLkm87t7WyY8yV4FNXQA9l9M0Ate587DCHrIY6AVxA_HhATUM0ii08z4Hp_4GZzfgn7NJtTeIXnDRzqM30aXGjdUSENDXEDM3ETZrTH2eBQwwXrLr_NBHAQ31UmRIFaqJRwE8MmAejnx8%3D)

---
Peter,

Imagine, for a moment, **switching shoes with an active-duty Navy SEAL.**

The satellite phone rang at 3:00 a.m. local time.

You’re in a 20-foot shipping container turned command post, somewhere in the Horn of Africa you never see on a map.

_**No staff. No teleprompter. No second chances.**_

One of our teams was pinned down.

Bad guys closing in.

Decision time: **extract now and risk the helo, or hold and risk the men.**

You make the call. You get every American home.

_**That’s what a real 3 A.M. decision feels like.**_

_[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4bf60ae64c124d3d88ad5f9b6306a168&_e=0YEYwIfgmDtYhsvefoGki-65y8aC7Aa16h3ZFz7VCoHoKpfDMbqwLMAzrLOiYGLmDSj0akjF5hiObVRHXpPmVfDON2L-vUMSxF6IR3bMSxbOPslv8Pi5fnRgKf_sNK8bwEDfacCvsy-5I_i4sES-U_OaPK7-AdCtWlirxklr-4NiBYud1dDxtPfWQBKh5lKTlfdB4ZsIgwuVGVKGC59ZeZBnXsdiQdvFmzRroErceWQWr6Dl79BAvrsm44qJUzgN3j2LtY5C94Iny2zBfGHYK0IHJDoafQW5DHzEHOYFZnHdCVswddGzz4MHqFAK34HA5CsABcFXWAg83o8-WSVp7FjD6Qpehc4lg4uN1ltbPbM6L4d3osfgaZ9JNZLLlU6dn-wm_ZI8yakmGzT0Li2gFr_Gl5MhmVzDooj-qO5cI9DVKhZ_7VV88u3ojbiswuR0FnQZ9flO0yyyWjyCbi73j1Ov4mj3b2iam60LZj4SUy07HGHSi9EFlKk1bQXnf0gwNM6ZKYIgJrYUgMazKgpPvu0cymcvjnVO1zjuNZwskQCVL1g3zZJ0XZG2Fbdczmcc14GIzSZAPgOat3mN5HLMDeUyjkr0WSJvUy8XMQxLWC-bKJJDu5K-f2uE3Mcm7FHuBKlurhHnvZ_c9gJn5i0Ex755-i9k2OdplZ7CE4SvWsHkrQVS7tAUcX5ne0eiGugnfu7bi3BT5TUiFLE_eihyVUg0eBinPriD-Ftd2aKOF48%3D)_
Now, Minnesota faces its own 3 A.M. moments—only the phone is ringing in **Minneapolis, St. Cloud, Duluth.**

1. **_A 74% spike in carjackings since 2020._**

2. **_Illegals with criminal records released into our neighborhoods because Walz-Flanagan sued to defund ICE detention._**

3. **_Small-town hospitals are closing because state mandates crushed rural budgets._**

But this isn’t just happening in Minnesota - it’s happening all across the country. In big cities, small towns, and in state capitals, with out-of-touch career politicians leading the charge.

_**That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - because Americans need a battle-tested former Navy SEAL, like me, ready to take the tough 3:00 a.m. calls that are commonplace at the highest levels of government. **_

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4bf60ae64c124d3d88ad5f9b6306a168&_e=0YEYwIfgmDtYhsvefoGki-65y8aC7Aa16h3ZFz7VCoHoKpfDMbqwLMAzrLOiYGLmDSj0akjF5hiObVRHXpPmVfDON2L-vUMSxF6IR3bMSxbOPslv8Pi5fnRgKf_sNK8bwEDfacCvsy-5I_i4sES-U_OaPK7-AdCtWlirxklr-4NiBYud1dDxtPfWQBKh5lKTlfdB4ZsIgwuVGVKGC59ZeZBnXsdiQdvFmzRroErceWQWr6Dl79BAvrsm44qJUzgNRmwxXfRSW9Xf38HGWDDOLGxX43s-uQpWe3kdSHJY53lOqzeUlrKIqqzrkC0x1WTQnDiWuZh-3IzcLje0-m-nETQNIB_5vm4_HaLJcGLGzCgvxigo6erVMnd_lpAOXJQpqh5GyRXwXT9wBAvanGTzksxMFV9q7aM815PYwdUjBbTxTRASTW-AhZXZ5wfmT3-xcxCq_TD11LCbgB-gPYBn8V30aFLL-QmQ5cqHV0N1f4G4McJuPakNdKvtEFQFwxMmBfZWWb_ubCj0CWGVbl55FNwUGUxItzRc7cOIShh4wygqrLgkrRbjOlxny98_J-qbFhjHo8biNr_w9Z9sN2-_ikYH6pcx0HN6voFnQB91uw99WZp9Wp-jbINUdLLB70TPV4fdjosiBVVotZexW7GkIgadHGuW_XAMIeV88PsXVBb1kPvV-NRKOf22t-e70hweMGFqPeZEKDpJPYc8ItFdjKx2xEPoSlBsbWXei-T3cNQ%3D)

My opponent?

She’s never taken a 3 A.M. call that didn’t come with a donor list attached.

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan. I’ve done **nine combat deployments** across **70 countries**. I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds.

Minnesota doesn’t need another career politician who reads a poll at 3:00 A.M.

America needs another Senator who has _****already answered the 3 A.M. call****_ —and brought everyone home.

The left’s most recent internal poll shows a _** **generic Republican within 2 points**. That means **this seat is flippable****_—but only with the help of grassroots conservatives like yourself. You must step up now if we’re to have any chance of flipping this seat for the first time since 2008.

Could you **[please consider contributing $5, $10, or even $25 to our campaign today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4bf60ae64c124d3d88ad5f9b6306a168&_e=0YEYwIfgmDtYhsvefoGki-65y8aC7Aa16h3ZFz7VCoHoKpfDMbqwLMAzrLOiYGLmDSj0akjF5hiObVRHXpPmVfDON2L-vUMSxF6IR3bMSxbOPslv8Pi5fnRgKf_sNK8bwEDfacCvsy-5I_i4sES-U_OaPK7-AdCtWlirxklr-4NiBYud1dDxtPfWQBKh5lKTlfdB4ZsIgwuVGVKGC59ZeZBnXsdiQdvFmzRroErceWQWr6Dl79BAvrsm44qJUzgNn1gKzhzaQcOx6PRqJSaKbHbD63LmVKJIBSXkg4l46s64lvmNZlARgVmrOidSABIAsSPgedeyTY4c6Wg4rDqc3-2ikKMg94CLtnRngj_X8pTKb3mlDBHQEKvQu9XOSRUmiJgOtXwuiWx5M9xkEJWTvIZZTu7N86tor9_h2UXF1347wkFJbNujb53a8pqb2MmxFIBYgYxPo9fi4VfclE4eXi9WmOyfdWGLfL2pAEQvykJA__jhfJfbZUrC40gaNafldbzgHoayjEVJokZYbdhhV9Pn3iVyiWucl7Xr2uF2xKaRh_M9wO-02J9WmXc4viZrRK7FzpqSZ_NC6g-GtstbaLKmX6xf1BsjKAb2G9TSk3KSYxkIgxMBAS5ICHqLjk2QqWDpURiyDfzHBXhnEQkJZLekJ1sxY_97ymzWW6iKI3UVkBjEp8w-5PX79d9seqcQrXxAX8Jtn-8XZxmHMfByZ8QEd8CQbQJnX2al44AN2Zc%3D)** I have a story to tell and a lot of fight in me, but the one thing we don’t have is money.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4bf60ae64c124d3d88ad5f9b6306a168&_e=0YEYwIfgmDtYhsvefoGki-65y8aC7Aa16h3ZFz7VCoHoKpfDMbqwLMAzrLOiYGLmDSj0akjF5hiObVRHXpPmVfDON2L-vUMSxF6IR3bMSxbOPslv8Pi5fnRgKf_sNK8bwEDfacCvsy-5I_i4sES-U_OaPK7-AdCtWlirxklr-4NiBYud1dDxtPfWQBKh5lKTlfdB4ZsIgwuVGVKGC59ZeZBnXsdiQdvFmzRroErceWQWr6Dl79BAvrsm44qJUzgNU10MlmqV_a_O7E_4t_moWI8wU5wZHKm5F4eLlwfawv4HuH2oN7RRCJEF8xzOvy8kSDGvovcA8ncNYuu3J2YIH5wr7tmBOPHs_7ge0_m2OwWr1k8zUdQCHaqLf6IHDo3io39At_Z6eDl1Lu1qZ80RtFpBMvfzm8HwpfZ7aERGM7feNaseyR_QDT_gnrmynI4be4GYkVFYgdMeyu78ZM79-4MM2NQN43iN8_RXquPoxH3PRR2z-gylPaCOR0IhoBR-dtJCMbHIRzw-tT6AAFNFuHAE3jsey2w8WnlQU8NoQSCuUy2Z3QTYHWioYezJ3PqUWjQf7vi-c8ZZDs_IC7EI29FjYiF5HXWo0Yl1EdIWAMUvrPm_NkTt4EKK023SvhLBbSWkatrTYNYrxNftdmztBrpZypN8MlWPKCT5K1DLCtlzbI7UcO8oy09iEJQgZ1CjMPnmE5PGKYV4EFQa_7Jo8gLjaPewgTqBBmfdozOv0eg%3D)

I’m not backed by Hollywood or D.C. consultants. **I’m backed by conservatives like _you._******

Every dollar received by my campaign sends a message to the national GOP:_****Minnesota is in play. ****_ Because when the next 3 A.M. crisis hits—whether it’s a border surge, a riot, or a cyberattack— The American people deserve a U.S. Senator who’s **already been there**.

For a better tomorrow,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer

clean_body: I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. | Peter, Imagine, for a moment, switching shoes with an active-duty Navy SEAL. The satellite phone rang at 3:00 a.m. local time. You’re in a 20-foot shipping container turned command post, somewhere in the Horn of Africa you never see on a map. No staff. No teleprompter. No second chances. One of our teams was pinned down. Bad guys closing in. Decision time: extract now and risk the helo, or hold and risk the men. You make the call. You get every American home. That’s what a real 3 A.M. decision feels like. Now, Minnesota faces its own 3 A.M. moments—only the phone is ringing in Minneapolis, St. Cloud, Duluth. 1. A 74% spike in carjackings since 2020. 2. Illegals with criminal records released into our neighborhoods because Walz-Flanagan sued to defund ICE detention. 3. Small-town hospitals are closing because state mandates crushed rural budgets. But this isn’t just happening in Minnesota - it’s happening all across the country. In big cities, small towns, and in state capitals, with out-of-touch career politicians leading the charge. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - because Americans need a battle-tested former Navy SEAL, like me, ready to take the tough 3:00 a.m. calls that are commonplace at the highest levels of government. My opponent? She’s never taken a 3 A.M. call that didn’t come with a donor list attached. I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan. I’ve done nine combat deployments across 70 countries. I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. Minnesota doesn’t need another career politician who reads a poll at 3:00 A.M. America needs another Senator who has **already answered the 3 A.M. call —and brought everyone home. The left’s most recent internal poll shows a generic Republican within 2 points. That means this seat is flippable—but only with the help of grassroots conservatives like yourself. You must step up now if we’re to have any chance of flipping this seat for the first time since 2008. Could you I have a story to tell and a lot of fight in me, but the one thing we don’t have is money. I’m not backed by Hollywood or D.C. consultants. I’m backed by conservatives like you.**** Every dollar received by my campaign sends a message to the national GOP:Minnesota is in play. Because when the next 3 A.M. crisis hits—whether it’s a border surge, a riot, or a cyberattack— The American people deserve a U.S. Senator who’s already been there. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: Final notice before we close the books on 2025. We've reached out a few times Fellow American about the change in your membership status and we really hope you understand what's at stake. According to our records, your has NOT been activated. Our team members are working day and night to defend Conservative values nationwide and are fighting to stop the Radical Left from destroying our nation! | REPUBLICAN STATE LEADERSHIP MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING Republican State Leadership is counting on you to act NOW to stand with us as we put an end to the Left's radical agenda! By renewing your membership, you are sending the loudest possible message to the Radical Left and making it CLEAR that you proudly stand with Republican State Leadership nationwide! name: VoteVets HQ
subject: 🪖 To ALL VoteVets supporters: Please, don’t scroll past this email 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter — Please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
#
Peter - please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
And just this month, it helped elect both Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill. Thank you.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $21. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation before midnight. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov25.xqPykj&refcode=em251115-1-120&t=1&akid=34768%2E3013755%2EwTJ3bg)

clean_body: Peter — Please, don’t skip this 1 minute read. Peter - please, don’t skip this 1 minute read. When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind. It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line. Like you, Peter. Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way. Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive. It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve. And just this month, it helped elect both Abigail Spanberger and Mikie Sherrill. Thank you. But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work. Today, we’re asking you to join that select group. Our average donation is $21. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation. We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril. name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: We are Charlie Kirk
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.
* * *

Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom.

| | | [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rvov&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That's the rally cry of millions of Americans — and the message they carry with their "We are Charlie Kirk" wristbands.
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rvov&__onlt=h)
---
We want you to have one. To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. **When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rvov&__onlt=h)
---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rvov&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Charlie stood fearlessly for truth, freedom, and the next generation. _Now it's our turn._ Tell the world: You're unafraid to stand with Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA to save America. Make your first gift today and claim your wristband as a symbol of the mission you've joined.
---
**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team
---
[ **Carry Charlie's Legacy Forward
Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rvov&__onlt=h)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Something’s weighing on my mind, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Your support keeps me going. | My opponent has been gaining on me in the polls. Far-right actors are attacking me online. National GOP groups are pouring money into NC to defeat me and our people-first campaign. This is all weighing on my mind, friend. I know we have a tough race ahead of us — the most competitive of my career. The coming months won’t be easy. **But here’s what keeps me going:** We’ve earned financial support from tens of thousands of folks across the country. More than 90% of donors are giving $100 or less. Even more are sharing news of our campaign online. Together, we’re building the momentum we need to win the most competitive U.S. Senate race in the nation. I’m deeply grateful to everyone who has joined us so far. [**I’m asking for you to join our fight by splitting a contribution between our campaign and DASS today. Would just $5 fit in your budget right away?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119336588/582730321/948572088?refcode=em-11.15.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0ZDc1YS0zMmMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JY7D2RsfvZdOLJ33DolODc5Pa7Q2D8bHNj6kqG5YIKQ=) __If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Roy Cooper and DASS will go through immediately:__ | | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119336589/582730331/948572088?refcode=em-11.15.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzA0ZDc1YS0zMmMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JY7D2RsfvZdOLJ33DolODc5Pa7Q2D8bHNj6kqG5YIKQ=)**

Dear Fellow American,

The work of defending our God-given rights doesn't always begin in the courtroom. It often begins in committee hearings in state legislatures, debating proposals that could soon become laws.

Sound boring? Keep in mind that good laws can lead to landmark decisions that move our culture, but [bad laws have a real human cost that’s often borne by families and kids.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/z0R-NkKu3xuOZFbp-2S3NJANL0zcr4E7e_FF-BlxcO79_SEC6dzyiKZihA7S6td2nSNT73cN7Vdx3EK6-Dr2lt3ue9zM06SC5BkwXxXOKKzne2f3PQOxVihKKAHUG6URQwO62AmWdX9CzqS7HWtvAfFCejYgeZbP8B07SrvGdNAOn88F57BU3d_BbmoJa4v0HbXN32u-gyZqaIByeWgwu507h4KWDLGkDH_wIEdKCoVShytdcMno6ZSi8CUqSiJfAK5jnv1EovY9fpXCx6WnKG7lU1aNj1ACFGjPyR1X40EqjQygEoJrGBYDOVWRSC-ShM5YQC89PovGXPiMM8vW9o7QnwjubWspfIAJxVavPtRN-WqfWkWEHra26Ps7ivNZ-HMd5OMmIQPYOSR3N4gjmb3SO3OB2yxR_osgqpJgoqKikgnRnl3tLlpnqHRqQo5VdNICpNKf7TDsYxCQ07eeIduD2nvWEjUclMDnSVQbdeHxBZ8WxosH0xRUJ7H4wOP66oQS75_hVdS5VgSi-0UrcNl79WtbDuVn7IVwEBs_xhvEhZ7WUEijHyUAuHJVDCXzPDXYxbFtbfbxL8R2_mF4jG6iA1fwVKybwmJTItpQ6jJ-iKIJYXaiXi_CCDyUTIdJTjAtbHs-aMdR-fcuRFubK3GFwTyhzT6Ce7IlurgluSr-P3sEyTG2zhu1CjKbx1oEIEXATiINdMu7Yqlp3G_J/x065kJ6yPT1mPvqLIEjrk8HoBgg3gI4w/14)
### **Good Laws -> More Freedom**
What happens when legislators and state officials stand up to protect innocent life?

Pro-life lawmakers in South Carolina passed legislation to prevent taxpayer dollars from funding abortions. The state's governor then enforced that legislation with an executive order stating that abortion facilities like Planned Parenthood should not receive Medicaid funding administered by the state.

**With the help of friends like you, when Planned Parenthood sued the state, ADF attorneys jumped in and successfully defend the state 's action--all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court.
**
In the wake of the Court's ruling last summer, Planned Parenthood announced a series of closures, including a facility in Houston, which was at one time the largest in North America.
### **Bad Laws -> Parents and kids pay the price**
Bad laws force girls to compete against male athletes, mocking the very idea of women's sports. But it gets worse. These laws put girls at a higher risk of serious injury and may force the same girls to share locker rooms and even overnight hotel rooms with male athletes.

It's a rejection of basic biological truth. And girls have been paying the price for far too long. That's why ADF's legislative team worked with states like West Virginia and Idaho (and over 20 other states) to pass laws that protect women's sports. The fate of those laws now rests in the hands of the U.S. Supreme Court, and the cases will be heard before the Court in just a few months.

Bad laws can also allow school districts to create policies designed to secretly "socially transition" children--driving a wedge between parents and their children. This directly undermines fundamental parental rights.

Everyday parents like Dan and Jennifer Mead are challenging policies like this. Their daughter's middle school began treating her as a boy without their knowledge or consent and even took steps to conceal these actions from Dan and Jennifer.

Sadly, their story isn't rare enough. By one estimate, policies like the one they are challenging are in place in over 6,000 American schools.

**That 's the damage that bad policy can do.**

[And it’s why your prayers and support are so crucial](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/avAy6eVJjdei9NPRL4Y9eZk7LMGdRP9V-DI-5u6Yu7kQxj4wo5-mVbxQzQu6bqB8wI30x6QuRS2FYAI3uEOmyOYcKgmeRm7ghVGDRXR1ANPVuwIZjI5A6Ub_TDGJECa5lLuj7x88wJqaeMtpzcHa-ugtAE3B_bfpUkZDX2x8CJTds92F_6mE19emzomf-nnO03gEJSgoONWiQEgy3PvzWGUx-JS2qm7MiDIY3-cgN90J6UAOT_-I8fdckzO17SyoXLi_Mo_UsIXRP6XNGWK9t7YYnGYb8Mipj0D_oXcf57C4Hjj5KLzRUb4gTAlXu5i7QT7aL8KRkrZ2268rkpemlzXcwyYecHyM3DdMl-Zs9R95S5Woem4EJZUnmI6JSvAy_wo3JdqQGOkjDn2VcfQ85fSKnpaU9F9wqiuxeLaXs7sYW-5U55Ue0utguPy2sV5oKmcxTHpiRjKnbHAlgiLe6APKhVZ_PDUb56z5jjrSYa1pSwM3sJWslMtkav1tQWAuBFwaeXDZbZtJGk8b3Ygn5OVTgUN6YNAhtNAE39DS3Pti8j2QSn8sRpwGe8DcOYipTxokJkwyNP17gpdYMshuGjDhvhdsXGsYaA6WIpqXcZLlty8DSv2jG42t6qaPDmb3UKdS92CS0WHqMN1HgJ5dFZSMZMLbaS4tYBP9vYV3OxC-5Sn1L6vS0r9sMhBapmRW3SbXj0XfrnDe_N99mZx0/UT0N5FgEmA0fDAGdPAOD54eEyjsbvdbX/14)--they help enable important partnerships with pro-freedom lawmakers in Congress and across the country to protect and advance our God-given right to live and speak the truth.
[ DONATE](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/bbzSCt9BlobvWb0ZC1On_6xDuo2bEpBMeMOE3gIowKnc9ZUAiIoh-C6rO-YleGynZ_QYeo4x_KfQarZ7dEh8Dr6P0LVBU5Hkn7DvdXCMUW9ouM5J6mnsI8njQRo4r6OEnpn42rrSThPZWc_8-E31sH3Q9q50Z7eJpcigtL125Yy8cvt2nk2Jy2Ea2cRsThhovHpBfGLXx1HBAq4E89fj5Bi9gFAvXZ7J8gm432klKvb7wrXAdYYJACxbOER7ayohq1IhK0DdlT2EcxsGu3KHvvM9M5sGd1KvJkrlqWiWJ82B_Wpcp8YgkSlUjDqO_INSzPg3A8nHwjYvHOU4BZUh2K8BC9owqmqMPMqamwrMujQJJe_9EBmYfVDp-hrT80BIph0I_iGU9xmXDrEWZKF5COdtx0AWgTsd9s-JiM3gpQGBaIoKnGqj0Ne1VMJyRZIjHcjADBPE9t0CGO4qXSVDtNLocT-zkPXVdkhbzFjqrEpeO1CqoL4Pcenk6q_gvhMFBiXyWG6-AhXx4QwfZ5CrZW59iEFU0k4WwNEn7vZ3lKxH68YJoomuqo5I154fMxF0jYYpmQfZLTBSqbEC8Z3BEm4W-6RmYiKOKpCcCrelgpJUYkKj9AKYXVK3AObmXMoP2ZT0qAp7OedFA485wG-ywPPGaCDnXbYpwLmnvaxuT6A42edaaRuCrIJjET7QxYCXmRvP7dncp_UjI_FpBgXI/OynBlhXBKn7rjxvsbQpmt8z6VQvci1ki/14)
You're making a difference in ways you may not even realize. You're helping stop bad bills before they become law and providing urgent support to like-minded legislators when they need it most.

That's the power of the alliance. And it doesn't work without you. Thank you. In Christ,

**Zack Pruitt**
Senior Counsel, Director of US Government Relations
Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Your support is critical--not just in the courtroom but in crucial legislative work that can lead to landmark victories. [Learn more about how ADF’s legislative team works behind-the-scenes to defend fundamental parental rights.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/3UqSRVxDjnBMCTODWUWP8wYpnJRG6bC7jbf8js7HEeDfX5c88EP54lezHhmflaJBMxv7R56D5Pk2x8cevyx7EtAH_WOWJdXfldi32XdQ6Zqya_R_lbNypJLVW0WYDhJOFgSAcYC6rJ18iTkv8o9ULlyKn648hZLXDdQh1MhOwpfIamZIAE52qTVmRJdGK7vFKWudYF8I4mmqsrsgzvq6Y_eqLj6JChL01Shhm4t_HnbBKfO1nJ_rDJF62g4pPlax4Gz6q01PRHi5_fGbsPEtEIOR54y5VPIFjxiynaPkzkbxZgCOSjIpId8UGWI2_5uoLi0z7AZuDXAQpZqLMQbla9fhUElHfHTanxUNbm_yvBtx119SLT-PjR1xlGIN9UyPJCz50iCraiLoqlOInZbKbtrSxoxoPPfAxxt35wceyzcHuO2MqLRQRiFOU1FLcSg22ggblptbgaNDrvTdTtZ9WpzlTPY5Ju6hVIDPZ7ayyjPuU9bD42cSFGHGg9O37TfTl7Or5fI3AI95EI4bwfe1R1xUpMQFdB3R0POLbh3AZSEoCE92kurLVedanOTSEB8dDSQodnNBJ1janaPizMbVHPlvEPL7JAfM2BUvnebUfHDlPKyptnM_dSgYLRtAye6JyAFauciKNUQK_mIgNG67pbJvecfG6BpGq4JEs5O8xSrIgiqxzA9C8PQg6RSG75GvQzK4ZGFSEFRIJzMw8rCW/3nrLiK5YjgX-uUMYG0F92y_dy_v3A19J/14) [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/XFOmZLwurpNS78G5oQeqJgJVcj-l9XtqgbHPfpTehBOLmsR9kWpY5stsW3LOYCEqoSN54vk5MO7xH081rkMPo1v8KyTe6hGuBa15Og9twEph7mXKATzqKjnQfxrrxY-wmmABvg7AF1Ub5Yyu41QRsme6j-DHfG8G7lHziCR0NayzQq6KSX7N7Z_czxUqpLvLvjvhS7Qy5UTl0u0NkUuLSwlISFlkTjob-H8CIeuczccsa6sCP4TYrM9DvyqpmiCfOnRcdReBZy8JL4GPNxFzyHqChSEu2hww3LyWOvadElGjKVI3MTzf2_pC8MjfPkfETYDOsD6k3nnG7A2xmfBS2-oloIHCT8XrKo4znzQlyptIiR6IooEzmnqUyZ9-6J2n93gblihWfzLJr-ewN5dfFSc2qfjiYtVXMIXmuhcrGV8IFUdxffp5mgvA_23nZI7HY3g_QwnqOUzwbzPQGrbaQtd3kDRHz84EwGClO6eWBP6Ep-jT0ox6nfeIcJz9U8BQQuY3dYQWz9ZmAc_OiVussoDe7yvtITT0sw1_dXyLCQmR0lTTicZQTlpj9qowyDhuwXzQ1oKQX07s9mijXpD7qeZZ8YE56iGXPWdpXh8msHg9hiPCmCWYWsb6l2IBNU5ZM5DQIm5Bi7PaigGpZ-auQBuuDsGvRT8PylEBqce3OfOJQa2xj7YeJZo3TgIEzuytLtpFsaujcOoXQP_JHdx3/FbLV24m-SgBFOBaAl8YnJME-na1MRLOU/14)

It's a rejection of basic biological truth. And girls have been paying the price for far too long. That's why ADF's legislative team worked with states like West Virginia and Idaho (and over 20 other states) to pass laws that protect women's sports. The fate of those laws now rests in the hands of the U.S. Supreme Court, and the cases will be heard before the Court in just a few months. Bad laws can also allow school districts to create policies designed to secretly "socially transition" children--driving a wedge between parents and their children. This directly undermines fundamental parental rights. Everyday parents like Dan and Jennifer Mead are challenging policies like this. Their daughter's middle school began treating her as a boy without their knowledge or consent and even took steps to conceal these actions from Dan and Jennifer. Sadly, their story isn't rare enough. By one estimate, policies like the one they are challenging are in place in over 6,000 American schools. That 's the damage that bad policy can do. help enable important partnerships with pro-freedom lawmakers in Congress and across the country to protect and advance our God-given right to live and speak the truth. You're making a difference in ways you may not even realize. You're helping stop bad bills before they become law and providing urgent support to like-minded legislators when they need it most. That's the power of the alliance. And it doesn't work without you. Thank you. In Christ, Zack Pruitt** Senior Counsel, Director of US Government Relations Alliance Defending Freedom P.S. Your support is critical--not just in the courtroom but in crucial legislative work that can lead to landmark victories. Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

name: H. Stevens
subject: All I need is just a couple minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
what's at stake in Michigan:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)
| | |
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8733?t=2&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)
Two minutes, null.

All I need is just a couple minutes of your time to explain what's at stake in Michigan.
**We've set a $175,000 mid-month goal – and this comes as polling shows me _statistically tied_ with my Republican opponent. That means if I'm going to pull ahead and win, I need to raise every dollar I can right now.**
**[So please, before tonight's critical midnight deadline, will you rush a donation of $5 or more to defeat Mike Rogers and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8734?t=3&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8733?t=4&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)
---
This goal means everything, null. Last cycle, the GOP spent nearly **$80 million** to try and turn Michigan red – and this time around, they're gearing up to spend _even more._
I've spent my entire life fighting for Michigan families. But I cannot compete with that kind of money unless grassroots supporters like you step up at this critical moment.
**Hitting this deadline will ensure we have the resources to reach voters where they are and turn this Toss Up race into a seat that helps us win back the Senate.** **[So with my two minutes up, I have to ask: Will you make a donation now – of $5 or whatever you can spare today – to win this race and restore our Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8733?t=5&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8735?t=6&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8736?t=7&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8737?t=8&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8733?t=9&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)
---
I'm so grateful for your support, null. Together, we can win in Michigan and flip the Senate for Democrats.

Thank you,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8738?t=10&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8739?t=11&akid=1358%2E49239%2EyfShHP)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
