name: News Update via Our Revolution
subject: Our Time is Now: Updates from Mamdani, Platner, Cori Bush & More!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

HEADLINES: 2026 Kickoff | Mamdani Momentum | Schumer, Step Down! |
Platner’s Bold Senate Run | Starbucks Strikes | New Endorsements | &
MORE!

★ ★ ★

As establishment Democrats falter, the progressive movement is
rising. Not only are we electing bold new leaders like Zohran Mamdani
in NYC, it’s clear that the energy, ideas, and base of the party are
with US.

We are the ones feeling the pain of Trump’s cruel policies and
corrupt regime. It’s OUR neighbors being snatched up by ICE. It’s OUR
families losing healthcare and food assistance.

The grassroots want REAL opposition to Trump and the Oligarchs — and
we know that means a new generation of leadership unafraid to take on
powerful interests and stand unequivocally with the people.

That’s why we went to the mat to make history with Zohran in NYC.
That’s why we’re ramping up pressure on Schumer to step aside after
the shutdown fight failure. And that’s why we’re launching our work
to elect the next class of candidates in 2026.

Read below to learn what candidates like Graham Platner and Cori Bush
are saying about this moment — and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34688?t=1011&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]chip in any amount to help us
build bigger and stronger than ever.

★ ★ ★

Earlier this year, Mamdani was polling at just ONE percent. But he
scored a decisive victory over both the Democratic establishment and
the radical right — because our movement had his back.

Our Revolution organizers and volunteers made over HALF A MILLION
calls, texts, and door knocks in the race (give yourselves a hand!).
This is the model that wins in the age of Trumpism.

But leave it to the Democrats to snatch defeat from the jaws of
victory. Instead of building on Mamdani’s momentum, Senate Dems caved
to Trump in the shutdown fight.

“Chuck Schumer should step down as Senate Minority Leader
immediately,” Our Revolution leader Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34679?t=1012&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]USA
Today.

“If he secretly backed this surrender and voted ‘no’ to save face,
he’s a liar. If he couldn’t keep his caucus in line, he’s inept.
Either way... the country can’t afford his failed leadership any
longer,” Joseph said.

Our Revolution was first out of the gate calling for Schumer to step
aside — and you all stepped up to add your voices. Our Citizen Action
Team [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34689?t=1013&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]delivered more than 15,000 petition signatures to his office
on Capitol Hill on Thursday, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34681?t=1014&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]Politico reported.

“Whether Senate Democrats voted this way behind Schumer’s back or
they did it with his consent, either way shows a lack of leadership
from the Minority Leader in the Senate,” Our Revolution Deputy
Director Paco Fabián told the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34682?t=1015&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]Washington Examiner.

Schumer’s weakness in holding the Democratic caucus together to
oppose Trump has cost us too much. It’s time for courage. It’s time
to fight for the people, not protect the status quo.

“Our democracy — and our party — need fighters, not dealmakers who
fold when working people need them most,” he told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34683?t=1016&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]Wall Street
Journal.

“Schumer’s failure to keep Democrats united handed Republicans a
victory and left millions of Americans without affordable health
care. Instead of ‘fight, fight, fight’ — it’s ‘surrender, surrender,
surrender.’”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34691?t=1017&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]ADD YOUR NAME: SCHUMER STEP DOWN

★ ★ ★

In our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34685?t=1018&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]survey of 3,500 Our Revolution members, 90% said Chuck
Schumer should step aside. More than 70% said they feared Democrats
would take the wrong lessons from last week’s victories — and they
did.

Only 6% said they’re confident Democrats understand the struggles of
the working class. And nearly everyone agreed: the party must take on
the oligarchs, make life affordable, and make government work for the
people — not the donor class.

As we head into 2026, this is our time to hold Democrats accountable
- that’s why Our Revolution is going to run the biggest Democratic
primary program we’ve ever run.

We’re doubling down on fighting the oligarchs and making life
affordable for everyday Americans — the same vision Mamdani ran on
and won. And that’s how we’ll elect a new generation of leaders ready
to fight alongside us - instead of betray us - and deliver real
change for working people.

★ ★ ★

[9]Elect Progressives

★ ★ ★

Last week, thousands of Our Revolution members tuned in for our
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34686?t=1019&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]Live 2026 Kickoff Call — an electrifying launch to the next phase
of our movement to take on Trump and take back power from the
political establishment and the Oligarchs.

We heard from five fearless, people-powered candidates — Mai Vang,
Robert Peters, Randy Bryce, Cori Bush, and Graham Platner — all ready
to take the fight for working people from the streets to the halls of
Congress.

We were thrilled to sit down with newly endorsed Graham Platner, a
Marine veteran and oysterman running to unseat Republican Senator
Susan Collins in Maine.

Platner didn’t mince words about the state of Democratic leadership,
calling it “entirely feckless” and pointing to last week’s shutdown
vote as “a failure of leadership in the clearest terms.”

He added, “If the Democratic Party truly represented its people, it
would be the party of workers and labor unions again — building power
and creating big structural change. We’ve got to get rid of the
failed leadership — they gotta go.”

Platner also spoke about the urgent need to fight corporate power,
noting that “these billionaires aren’t getting rich because they’re
geniuses — they’re getting rich off our tax dollars through
government contracts and subsidies.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution is fired up to stand with Cori Bush, who’s ready for a
rematch against Big Money and determined to win back her seat in
Missouri’s 1st District.

A nurse and activist, Cori has always fought on the front lines for
justice, dignity, and equality — from the streets of Ferguson to the
halls of Congress.

“I’m coming back stronger — more courageous, more determined —
because our communities need fighters who won’t cave when it gets
hard,” Bush said. She’s been a fearless voice for working people,
leading the fight for Medicare for All, a living wage, and an economy
that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few.

“We have to stop letting big money corrupt our politics,” she added.
“It’s time to hold Democrats accountable for taking corporate cash
and start building a party that truly fights for the people.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution was proud to welcome Mai Vang, a Sacramento City
Councilmember running for Congress in California’s 7th District. The
daughter of refugees and oldest of 16 children, Vang has spent her
life fighting for justice and equity.

“In this moment, we need leaders who understand the day-to-day
struggles of working families — people who actually live what they’re
fighting for,” Vang said.

She is the only corporate-free candidate in the race, and she’s
taking on a political dynasty that’s been in power for five decades —
“because our communities deserve fearless leadership that puts people
before profit.”

★ ★ ★

We also had a great conversation with Robert Peters, a progressive
Illinois State Senator running for Congress in the 2nd District.

A lifelong organizer and movement-builder, Peters shared how his
campaign is rooted in delivering real solutions for working families
and building a Democratic Party that fights for everyday people, not
corporate donors.

“We can’t just fight back against Trump — we have to fight for what
gives people dignity: health care, housing, and the ability to
thrive,” he said.

“Power isn’t complicated — it’s organized people, organized money,
and organized narrative. My job is to be the chief organizer inside
the halls of power.”

★ ★ ★

Next up was Randy Bryce, an ironworker, Army veteran, and union
activist running for Congress in Wisconsin’s 1st District. Known
nationally as “IronStache,” Bryce has spent his life building bridges
— both on the job and in the labor movement — and now he’s taking
that fight to Washington.

“People can’t afford the basics — you can’t lie about the price of a
carton of eggs,” Bryce said. “Our communities deserve leaders who
will fight for them, not billionaires.” He spoke about how rising
costs and stagnant wages have left working families struggling while
corporations rake in record profits.

“I don’t take money from corporate PACs or billionaires,” Bryce
added. “I belong to the people, and I’ll fight like hell for working
families across this country.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34688?t=1020&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]Chip in any amount to help supercharge our organizing operation
for these races in Maine, Missouri, Illinois — and across the
country! We can’t let Big Money get a jumpstart ahead of the
primaries.

★ ★ ★

VICTORIES

Zohran Mamdani wasn’t the only progressive to bring home victory on
November 4th. Our Revolution-backed candidates clinched wins in races
across the country, building power from the bottom up.

Our Revolution-backed Chris Menefee will head to the runoff for the
Congress seat in Texas’ 18th District, once held by the late Sheila
Jackson Lee.

Chris has built a reputation as a fighter for working families,
combining his roots in community service with a bold agenda for
economic justice and accountability.

His leadership signals a new generation of progressive public service
— one that prioritizes people over profits and delivers real-results
for everyday Americans.

In Jersey City, James Solomon ran an exciting grassroots campaign for
Mayor and now heads to the runoff election!

Solomon is a progressive reformer and public servant who has fought
to make housing affordable and hold developers accountable. He will
help our movement build a city that truly works for working people.

Congrats also to Eleana Little, who won a seat on Jersey City Council
in Ward E — and At-Large candidates Michael Griffin and Roland
Lavarro and City Council candidate Denise Ridley in Ward A, who all
made it to the runoff.

★ ★ ★

OHIO SLATE

In Dayton, Ohio, we’re excited to report that Shenise Turner-Sloss
will be the next Mayor and Darryl Fairchild won his bid for
re-election as City Commissioner.

Shenise is a lifelong public-servant and union member who ran for
mayor with a clear vision to put community, youth and workers first —
we’re thrilled to see her victory signal a new chapter for our
movement in Ohio.

Darryl is a lifelong advocate for working families who has fought to
protect the city’s water, invest in neighborhoods, and deliver
transparent, people-powered leadership.

These are the down ballot seats that can make a real difference in
people’s lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34688?t=1021&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]Chip in to help Our Revolution elect bold, people-powered leaders
in 2026.

★ ★ ★

GRIJALVA FINALLY SWORN IN!

That’s right! After seven weeks of delay - and pressure - House
Speaker Mike Johnson finally swore in Adelita Grijalva, who will
represent Arizona’s 7th District.

In addition to carrying the legacy of her late father Rep. Raul
Grijalva in this seat, Adelita also became the 218th vote needed to
finally force a vote on releasing the Epstein files.

Our Revolution is proud to have supported Adelita in her run for
Congress and the push to get her sworn in against GOP obstruction —
and we look forward to working with her as the newest member of the
Congressional Progressive Caucus!

★ ★ ★

[13]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs

★ ★ ★

Trump’s authoritarianism is reaching a fever pitch as he terrorizes
communities with ICE, takes healthcare and food from working-class
families, enriches himself with crypto schemes, and hands out
billions to his billionaire cronies.

Our activists are on the streets every week — showing up on
billionaires' doorsteps in the Hamptons, confronting oligarchs like
Peter Thiel in San Francisco, bird-dogging politicians on Capitol
Hill, and rallying against deportation contractors like Avelo
Airlines and AT&T.

★ ★ ★

On Thursday, Our Revolution activists joined the Starbucks Strike,
where more than 1,000 baristas in 40+ cities walked off the job to
demand better pay, more staffing, and a fair contract.

From Brooklyn to Colorado to Illinois, this isn’t any ordinary strike
— this is a Red Cup Rebellion. And Starbucks workers are prepared to
strike indefinitely until their demands are met.

100 Congressional lawmakers led by Bernie Sanders and Pramila Jayapal
also joined the push, sending a letter to Starbucks' CEO urging him
to come back to the bargaining table.

★ ★ ★

This Sunday, Our Revolution will join forces with People’s Action and
The People’s Lobby to protest outside AT&T stores in Chicago —
demanding they drop their multimillion-dollar ICE contracts driving
Trump’s deportation machine.

AT&T likes to present itself as a “friendly neighborhood phone
company,” but behind the scenes it profits from using its tech to
help terrorize immigrant communities.

When corporations align with authoritarian policies, our communities
suffer. But when we unite as neighbors and movement builders, we make
clear that our collective power is stronger than corporate greed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34687?t=1022&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]SIGN UP TO JOIN US IN CHICAGO!

★ ★ ★

on building grassroots power to Fight Trump & the Oligarchs with our
targeted 3 Point Strategy:

1. Fight Trump’s Oligarch Agenda - from Capitol Hill to City Halls
2. Elect Anti-Oligarch Champions up and down the ballot
3. Get Oligarch Money out of Politics and uplift the grassroots

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34264?t=1023&akid=9834%2E5885482%2Enw8o1x ]And we’re just getting started. Chip in a donation of any amount
to help fuel this people-powered resistance.

★ ★ ★

[16]Elect Candidates

★ ★ ★

California. This is an important firewall against Trump and the GOP’s
gerrymandering scheme for 2026.

This was a movement-wide push. Our Revolution organizers mobilized
phonebanks and canvassed neighborhoods to make sure every ballot was
turned in and counted.

We also hosted a Live California Organizing Call with Rep. Ro Khanna,
State Rep. Ash Kalra, and others to rally support for this critical
ballot measure. This shows what we can accomplish when we all pull
together.

★ ★ ★

[17]Action Center

Bernie founded Our Revolution to organize everyday people to take on
Big Money and corporate power. He inspired a new generation to run
for office — from AOC to Zohran — and built an army of activists to
get out the vote and build power.

We’re not just organizing for elections — we’re taking the fight

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] NEWS FROM THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: 2026 Kickoff | Mamdani Momentum | Schumer, Step Down! | Platner’s Bold Senate Run | Starbucks Strikes | New Endorsements | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ As establishment Democrats falter, the progressive movement is rising. Not only are we electing bold new leaders like Zohran Mamdani in NYC, it’s clear that the energy, ideas, and base of the party are with US. We are the ones feeling the pain of Trump’s cruel policies and corrupt regime. It’s OUR neighbors being snatched up by ICE. It’s OUR families losing healthcare and food assistance. The grassroots want REAL opposition to Trump and the Oligarchs — and we know that means a new generation of leadership unafraid to take on powerful interests and stand unequivocally with the people. That’s why we went to the mat to make history with Zohran in NYC. That’s why we’re ramping up pressure on Schumer to step aside after the shutdown fight failure. And that’s why we’re launching our work to elect the next class of candidates in 2026. Read below to learn what candidates like Graham Platner and Cori Bush are saying about this moment — and [ ]chip in any amount to help us build bigger and stronger than ever. ★ ★ ★ Earlier this year, Mamdani was polling at just ONE percent. But he scored a decisive victory over both the Democratic establishment and the radical right — because our movement had his back. Our Revolution organizers and volunteers made over HALF A MILLION calls, texts, and door knocks in the race (give yourselves a hand!). This is the model that wins in the age of Trumpism. But leave it to the Democrats to snatch defeat from the jaws of victory. Instead of building on Mamdani’s momentum, Senate Dems caved to Trump in the shutdown fight. “Chuck Schumer should step down as Senate Minority Leader immediately,” Our Revolution leader Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]USA Today. “If he secretly backed this surrender and voted ‘no’ to save face, he’s a liar. If he couldn’t keep his caucus in line, he’s inept. Either way... the country can’t afford his failed leadership any longer,” Joseph said. Our Revolution was first out of the gate calling for Schumer to step aside — and you all stepped up to add your voices. Our Citizen Action Team [ ]delivered more than 15,000 petition signatures to his office on Capitol Hill on Thursday, [ ]Politico reported. “Whether Senate Democrats voted this way behind Schumer’s back or they did it with his consent, either way shows a lack of leadership from the Minority Leader in the Senate,” Our Revolution Deputy Director Paco Fabián told the [ ]Washington Examiner. Schumer’s weakness in holding the Democratic caucus together to oppose Trump has cost us too much. It’s time for courage. It’s time to fight for the people, not protect the status quo. “Our democracy — and our party — need fighters, not dealmakers who fold when working people need them most,” he told [ ]Wall Street Journal. “Schumer’s failure to keep Democrats united handed Republicans a victory and left millions of Americans without affordable health care. Instead of ‘fight, fight, fight’ — it’s ‘surrender, surrender, surrender.’” [ ]ADD YOUR NAME: SCHUMER STEP DOWN ★ ★ ★ In our [ ]survey of 3,500 Our Revolution members, 90% said Chuck Schumer should step aside. More than 70% said they feared Democrats would take the wrong lessons from last week’s victories — and they did. Only 6% said they’re confident Democrats understand the struggles of the working class. And nearly everyone agreed: the party must take on the oligarchs, make life affordable, and make government work for the people — not the donor class. As we head into 2026, this is our time to hold Democrats accountable - that’s why Our Revolution is going to run the biggest Democratic primary program we’ve ever run. We’re doubling down on fighting the oligarchs and making life affordable for everyday Americans — the same vision Mamdani ran on and won. And that’s how we’ll elect a new generation of leaders ready to fight alongside us - instead of betray us - and deliver real change for working people. ★ ★ ★ [9]Elect Progressives ★ ★ ★ Last week, thousands of Our Revolution members tuned in for our [ ]Live 2026 Kickoff Call — an electrifying launch to the next phase of our movement to take on Trump and take back power from the political establishment and the Oligarchs. We heard from five fearless, people-powered candidates — Mai Vang, Robert Peters, Randy Bryce, Cori Bush, and Graham Platner — all ready to take the fight for working people from the streets to the halls of Congress. We were thrilled to sit down with newly endorsed Graham Platner, a Marine veteran and oysterman running to unseat Republican Senator Susan Collins in Maine. Platner didn’t mince words about the state of Democratic leadership, calling it “entirely feckless” and pointing to last week’s shutdown vote as “a failure of leadership in the clearest terms.” He added, “If the Democratic Party truly represented its people, it would be the party of workers and labor unions again — building power and creating big structural change. We’ve got to get rid of the failed leadership — they gotta go.” Platner also spoke about the urgent need to fight corporate power, noting that “these billionaires aren’t getting rich because they’re geniuses — they’re getting rich off our tax dollars through government contracts and subsidies.” ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is fired up to stand with Cori Bush, who’s ready for a rematch against Big Money and determined to win back her seat in Missouri’s 1st District. A nurse and activist, Cori has always fought on the front lines for justice, dignity, and equality — from the streets of Ferguson to the halls of Congress. “I’m coming back stronger — more courageous, more determined — because our communities need fighters who won’t cave when it gets hard,” Bush said. She’s been a fearless voice for working people, leading the fight for Medicare for All, a living wage, and an economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few. “We have to stop letting big money corrupt our politics,” she added. “It’s time to hold Democrats accountable for taking corporate cash and start building a party that truly fights for the people.” ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution was proud to welcome Mai Vang, a Sacramento City Councilmember running for Congress in California’s 7th District. The daughter of refugees and oldest of 16 children, Vang has spent her life fighting for justice and equity. “In this moment, we need leaders who understand the day-to-day struggles of working families — people who actually live what they’re fighting for,” Vang said. She is the only corporate-free candidate in the race, and she’s taking on a political dynasty that’s been in power for five decades — “because our communities deserve fearless leadership that puts people before profit.” ★ ★ ★ We also had a great conversation with Robert Peters, a progressive Illinois State Senator running for Congress in the 2nd District. A lifelong organizer and movement-builder, Peters shared how his campaign is rooted in delivering real solutions for working families and building a Democratic Party that fights for everyday people, not corporate donors. “We can’t just fight back against Trump — we have to fight for what gives people dignity: health care, housing, and the ability to thrive,” he said. “Power isn’t complicated — it’s organized people, organized money, and organized narrative. My job is to be the chief organizer inside the halls of power.” ★ ★ ★ Next up was Randy Bryce, an ironworker, Army veteran, and union activist running for Congress in Wisconsin’s 1st District. Known nationally as “IronStache,” Bryce has spent his life building bridges — both on the job and in the labor movement — and now he’s taking that fight to Washington. “People can’t afford the basics — you can’t lie about the price of a carton of eggs,” Bryce said. “Our communities deserve leaders who will fight for them, not billionaires.” He spoke about how rising costs and stagnant wages have left working families struggling while corporations rake in record profits. “I don’t take money from corporate PACs or billionaires,” Bryce added. “I belong to the people, and I’ll fight like hell for working families across this country.” [ ]Chip in any amount to help supercharge our organizing operation for these races in Maine, Missouri, Illinois — and across the country! We can’t let Big Money get a jumpstart ahead of the primaries. ★ ★ ★ VICTORIES Zohran Mamdani wasn’t the only progressive to bring home victory on November 4th. Our Revolution-backed candidates clinched wins in races across the country, building power from the bottom up. Our Revolution-backed Chris Menefee will head to the runoff for the Congress seat in Texas’ 18th District, once held by the late Sheila Jackson Lee. Chris has built a reputation as a fighter for working families, combining his roots in community service with a bold agenda for economic justice and accountability. His leadership signals a new generation of progressive public service — one that prioritizes people over profits and delivers real-results for everyday Americans. In Jersey City, James Solomon ran an exciting grassroots campaign for Mayor and now heads to the runoff election! Solomon is a progressive reformer and public servant who has fought to make housing affordable and hold developers accountable. He will help our movement build a city that truly works for working people. Congrats also to Eleana Little, who won a seat on Jersey City Council in Ward E — and At-Large candidates Michael Griffin and Roland Lavarro and City Council candidate Denise Ridley in Ward A, who all made it to the runoff. ★ ★ ★ OHIO SLATE In Dayton, Ohio, we’re excited to report that Shenise Turner-Sloss will be the next Mayor and Darryl Fairchild won his bid for re-election as City Commissioner. Shenise is a lifelong public-servant and union member who ran for mayor with a clear vision to put community, youth and workers first — we’re thrilled to see her victory signal a new chapter for our movement in Ohio. Darryl is a lifelong advocate for working families who has fought to protect the city’s water, invest in neighborhoods, and deliver transparent, people-powered leadership. These are the down ballot seats that can make a real difference in people’s lives. [ ]Chip in to help Our Revolution elect bold, people-powered leaders in 2026. ★ ★ ★ GRIJALVA FINALLY SWORN IN! That’s right! After seven weeks of delay - and pressure - House Speaker Mike Johnson finally swore in Adelita Grijalva, who will represent Arizona’s 7th District. In addition to carrying the legacy of her late father Rep. Raul Grijalva in this seat, Adelita also became the 218th vote needed to finally force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. Our Revolution is proud to have supported Adelita in her run for Congress and the push to get her sworn in against GOP obstruction — and we look forward to working with her as the newest member of the Congressional Progressive Caucus! ★ ★ ★ [13]Fight Trump & The Oligarchs ★ ★ ★ Trump’s authoritarianism is reaching a fever pitch as he terrorizes communities with ICE, takes healthcare and food from working-class families, enriches himself with crypto schemes, and hands out billions to his billionaire cronies. Our activists are on the streets every week — showing up on billionaires' doorsteps in the Hamptons, confronting oligarchs like Peter Thiel in San Francisco, bird-dogging politicians on Capitol Hill, and rallying against deportation contractors like Avelo Airlines and AT&T. ★ ★ ★ On Thursday, Our Revolution activists joined the Starbucks Strike, where more than 1,000 baristas in 40+ cities walked off the job to demand better pay, more staffing, and a fair contract. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Can I send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.
#
Hey Peter – it’s Deb Haaland. I’m running for Governor of New Mexico and State Democrats Committee said I could reach out to you.
One thing you should know about me is that **I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97706?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG) _New Mexico chiles – the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97706?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG) _Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – health care, affordability, education. But if we organize around our shared values, we will win.
**[Will you split $10 between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today? If you donate through this link, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97706?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97707?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97707?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97707?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97707?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97707?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97707?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97706?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG)
---
Happy cooking,
Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. **[If you make a donation of any amount to my campaign and State Democrats Committee through this link, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97706?refcode=em20251115-9718&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG)**

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=12&akid=9718%2E614464%2ExFN7mG).

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A pretty crazy story, if you have a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hola, Peter. It’s Ruben.
You might be wondering how this kid...
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov25.xEE_hO&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=1&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)
...ended up here, on TV with Stephen Colbert, serving in the U.S. Senate, and squaring off against the worst president in American history.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov25.xEE_hO&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=2&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)
Well, it started back in the apartment I shared with my mom and my sisters. It was tough. I was sleeping on the floor because that’s all we could afford.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov25.xEE_hO&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=3&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)
I knew I had to do whatever it took to build a better life for us. I worked a bunch of jobs all through school to help make ends meet. Thanks to my family, my community, and a lot of hard work, I got into Harvard. But before I graduated, I enlisted in the Marines to serve the country that gave me so much.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov25.xEE_hO&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=4&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)
I deployed to al Anbar, Iraq with my brothers in arms. We ended up the hardest hit Marine unit of the entire Iraq war, and I lost some of my best friends over there. After we came home I knew I had to do something to improve things for the guys I served with, for people who grew up like me. So, I ended up running for Congress — and I won.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov25.xEE_hO&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=5&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)
Then, on January 6th, everything changed. It became clear to me that public service wasn’t just about improving the lives of the people in my community anymore — it was about defending our democracy, too.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov25.xEE_hO&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=6&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)
So, I ran for Senate against one of Trump’s most loyal foot soldiers. And thanks to the support of millions of people, my friends, and my family, I won. Now, it’s my job to square off against Trump every day to defend our people and our Constitution.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov25.xEE_hO&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=7&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)
When I was a Marine in Iraq, I never would’ve thought I’d have to fight to defend our democracy at home.
And honestly, I never, ever would’ve thought I’d need to ask supporters like you, people who have already done so much, to do a bit more. But to keep up the fight and lead the nationwide grassroots mobilization we’ll need to combat everything Trump’s doing, that’s what I have to do.
[**Please — if you can afford to make a donation of $5 or anything you can it would mean the world to me. We’re right up on our mid-quarter deadline, the halfway point to our official FEC deadline, and we can’t miss our goals.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov25.xEE_hO&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=8&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-nov25.i9o9ln&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=27&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-nov25.KqvMJd&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=28&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-nov25.NNjY19&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=29&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-nov25.tFqQDS&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=30&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-nov25.oJ8-JL&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=31&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-nov25.lJMMf7&refcode=em241115-1-160&t=32&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)**
---
****
Thank you. I couldn’t do this without you and the team we’ve built together.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=34&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=35&refcode2=4034_734936_UvUV_L&akid=4034%2E734936%2EUvUV_L)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I’m writing to ask you directly:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey, it's Mark.
I’ll keep this quick, because I don’t want to take too much of your time.
We’re coming up on our final mid-quarter deadline of the year tonight. That means we’re halfway to our final, official FEC deadline of 2025. When it hits, we’re going to need to report our fundraising numbers publicly, and that report is about more than just what we’ve raised this year.
It shows how many people are willing to do whatever it takes at a tough time and count themselves among those willing to stand up to the President.
I’m asking you to join that group and make a donation today. It’d mean a lot to me.
If I can count on you, please: Make a $3 donation before our deadline at midnight. It’d help a lot as we push back on Trump and gear up for the elections in 2026.

It shows how many people are willing to do whatever it takes at a tough time and count themselves among those willing to stand up to the President. I’m asking you to join that group and make a donation today. It’d mean a lot to me. If I can count on you, please: Make a $3 donation before our deadline at midnight. It’d help a lot as we push back on Trump and gear up for the elections in 2026. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** I really, really appreciate your support. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Why I stand with workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'll always have their back

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.y8LPc8ihoWgaNZ_5j0TrBjcIzmryGMpQ8Py3BmCV1aw?) for more
---
# [Why I stand with workers](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=178801377&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc4ODAxMzc3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjMyMjA2NTksImV4cCI6MTc2NTgxMjY1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.y-fn-2zxLolI42-x647sONrnVcSzGvwLmZXnzJFTIos)
### I'll always have their back
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Nov 15
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..sd5E_1D5xHU9D6nZ27VRKPFjQ7OAIC-AQeh1yOHLh1A?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/why-i-stand-with-workers?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hi team,
There's a lot going on in the world. Things can feel chaotic. But what grounds me and keeps me going every day is remembering _who_ I'm fighting for: **The working people of Michigan.**
These are the people who keep our economy moving - who build, fix, teach, nurse, cook, deliver, and care. The folks who punch in every day, take pride in what they do, and keep our country strong.
Fighting for working Michiganders is why I got into public service in the first place. And it's why I'm running for Senate now.
I've been proud to earn the support of some of Michigan's most respected unions in this campaign:
✅ **Teamsters Local 243**
✅ **Pipefitters, Steamfitters, Refrigeration & Air Conditioning Service Local 636
**✅ **UNITE HERE Local 24**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/24bee54b-9c7b-4d3d-9d0b-49896c7f61e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
These endorsements mean the world to me - because they come from people who know the stakes. **And I 'm proud I'm the **_**only**_**candidate in this race who has multiple endorsements from labor groups.**
I've talked with Michigan nurses fighting for safer working conditions. I've met steamfitters raising families and trying to keep up with the cost of living. I've heard from retirees whose pensions no longer cover their rent - people who worked their whole lives and still can't catch a break.
I carry those conversations with me every day.
They remind me of my dad, who is in his 80s and still working -- because it gives him purpose. I think about the folks who do have to keep working just to survive, and**I know we can do better by our workers.**
Because here's the truth: **There is no strong middle class without strong unions.**
That's not just a slogan. It's a fact. When union power declines, wages stagnate, benefits disappear, inequality rises, and communities suffer. But when we support unions - when we raise the floor for working people - everyone benefits.
**And no state knows that better than Michigan.**
We helped build the American labor movement: from the Flint sit-down strike to the Battle of the Overpass. And we can lead again. But only if we stand together - and fight back against the forces trying to silence workers.
Because right now, **Donald Trump and his MAGA guys are coming after organized labor.** They want to weaken worker protections, strip away bargaining rights, and give billionaires even more tax breaks - and they're targeting this Senate seat to do it.
But I'm not backing down.
**I 'm in this race because I believe every Michigan worker deserves a voice** - and a senator who's willing to fight for them. Someone who understands our state, who has walked factory floors and sat in union halls, and who will never forget _who_ they're in Washington to serve.
That's the kind of senator I'll be.
And if you're with me, if you believe in the power of the American worker, I hope you'll consider joining our grassroots team. We're working toward a $175,000 mid-month goal - and every dollar helps us reach more voters and build the kind of people-powered campaign it takes to win a battleground race like this. **Will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue?**
[ Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/092242c2-1636-428b-a7b5-8e7e9b8ce6be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thanks for reading this. And thank you for standing with Michigan workers.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/26309d0b-4be3-47b0-9252-e6fdcd09f2ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..sd5E_1D5xHU9D6nZ27VRKPFjQ7OAIC-AQeh1yOHLh1A?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2025 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..dRdgEeyc_FbtTGYc9-xFhJ7s2Raql4MAE1pggiPE5os?)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/256c011f-b7e1-4a33-a0d5-853b9c4047a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..-dGuY0LHbsPG4ODmkZiBtoCoKrhtCRKeWara37FeDvU?)

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Trump’s endorsement has changed everything.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friend, President Trump’s endorsement of Brad Finstad was a game changer. It shows we have a fighter in Congress who’s standing up for our values and a leader the President knows he can count on. But make no mistake: that endorsement also puts a target on our back. National Democrats and their allies are already shifting resources into Minnesota to try and flip this seat. They know if they can take down Brad, it will send a message across the country. We can’t let that happen. Brad needs your help to be prepared and keep him in the fight for southern Minnesota. Every dollar we raise before the deadline shows the Left that we’re ready, organized, and stronger than ever. Can you chip in today to help us hit our goal and defend this seat?
---

body:
If we hit it, we walk into this race from a position of strength. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7f83f962064e45d29e966026e91acc6d&_e=_YAAiFCQM595lXcp82jWaIK14VghfFQjCs6VGrq2xXSIIRDOiPpG6EboRFFtQeKTD962sY71-WvcMWty8FEm69wYvloux1UI3OVvcE8xG_URJMrzc-JuWy-x4n7SbEphUB2W_UENLIAdUL7s3Af7xOO6YEjhtWxrijRiY69tyyBF9NHBaP5oBd7F-O8xnlDFfkPwZsiaoa-6DuWi8kBWdvKp5dI53zQ3ZMYooayJJ1mhHEy-ydaRjFZgIr0Ugnh2yNyx0RAY29fIEdz_MiOgktyjjnITyUXMBhuseiXT-vKSIcB4YwkcpIPHLVX5euXv1Uc7oWZ11JUE9h8CVLurFOHtZp9iZa8Z-Rtn70gvKOj3E3KLe22V5_CLabpDZ0LKf_XE7Hwv3KcXdl35B-xlGLWoDWlzdbvxiSWootlta1T9yv8_Am1b84QRcJceOt12nVpOTXqCJuA75e_wVHnSNlNyyBPNLJ60pgfjbQmk_ckYng7yW5aHTLiewGEPinsiTZaRI5U9GBiUV-AewMnsfehuy4CaRvPOdXbGI0iJ45FhYDiE61n5q6ZK9Pn4HXbmKU9O9PcwI9E6U87syws728p5fgyUNun9Ntzh0gm7YGN3QwbEuoxQ2Zs8-vqaEdZUyrkR4R4gMyfzVsjZ9E38yT_ToyNLGguQl08wmf5D6Xg%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot,

**Just weeks ago, on the Charlie Kirk Show, I officially launched my campaign for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District.**

I didn’t get into this race to “play politics.” I got in because Washington is broken and too many so-called leaders are afraid to tell the truth or take a stand. I’ve never had that problem.

As Sheriff, I spent years on the front lines — securing our border, taking on the cartels, defending our families, and protecting our constitutional freedoms. Now I’m ready to take that fight to Congress.

**But right now, I need something from you.**

[**This is our very first mid-month fundraising deadline since launching — and it’s the moment everyone watches to see whether our movement is real, strong, and ready for the fight ahead.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7f83f962064e45d29e966026e91acc6d&_e=_YAAiFCQM595lXcp82jWaIK14VghfFQjCs6VGrq2xXSIIRDOiPpG6EboRFFtQeKTD962sY71-WvcMWty8FEm69wYvloux1UI3OVvcE8xG_URJMrzc-JuWy-x4n7SbEphUB2W_UENLIAdUL7s3Af7xOO6YEjhtWxrijRiY69tyyBF9NHBaP5oBd7F-O8xnlDFfkPwZsiaoa-6DuWi8kBWdvKp5dI53zQ3ZMYooayJJ1mXVL4gL-NSCFArVULBkNwv8LYBgbpRMov5oXAyUuqpEXZ_Y5082p8UWprIlE21id0C7H8CIWWbeMixhgxXtf9LOBn6NXNqGyFylCq4yu4OWBuH2EEix98QBnI9hDDdqwhpFZSrdyzH9HvRgl6E7LsyY8j4KLkSpOEjHEg6jeoHz0GQ58TTjl9NtXDhVwaphErrl4IWVWFQvsiFepffMzESENHpZ7XN1pirl4ORgoAuhDwEAyAqQmVmaMPeAUJ7t5erwy2DTq6NeOHwlyvlLwCIjXU_igZE2f2nNPVbqt1-LHFcMI43W4tSFhJ6kfgOez7kDQB48owG14NbDkpReRNuKTdqmvpi96zq5b0anZP6TUZdWnJ4voxKJfeEKklSeRtIcAh3tm-vKjpsdBeccWyBRQv_hmYargXbI-r48anxlZLE1rstokSBd5j2IUSf0VQ%3D)

**Our goal: $10,000 by MIDNIGHT.**

If we hit it, we walk into this race from a position of strength. But if we miss it, the radical left insiders eyeing this seat will smell weakness.

_They’d love that._

**But we’re not giving them that opening.**

AZ-05 is now an open seat. That means the political class is already circling — consultants, lobbyists, and career politicians who want to handpick the next congressman.

clean_body: If we hit it, we walk into this race from a position of strength. | Fellow Patriot, Just weeks ago, on the Charlie Kirk Show, I officially launched my campaign for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District. I didn’t get into this race to “play politics.” I got in because Washington is broken and too many so-called leaders are afraid to tell the truth or take a stand. I’ve never had that problem. As Sheriff, I spent years on the front lines — securing our border, taking on the cartels, defending our families, and protecting our constitutional freedoms. Now I’m ready to take that fight to Congress. But right now, I need something from you. Our goal: $10,000 by MIDNIGHT. If we hit it, we walk into this race from a position of strength. But if we miss it, the radical left insiders eyeing this seat will smell weakness. They’d love that. But we’re not giving them that opening. AZ-05 is now an open seat. That means the political class is already circling — consultants, lobbyists, and career politicians who want to handpick the next congressman. Not on my watch. Early support is what builds momentum, scares off unserious challengers, and sends a clear message that AZ-05 is ready to elect a proven conservative fighter. I’m a husband, father, and former lawman — and I know what’s at stake. If we don’t have strong conservatives in Washington, the border crisis worsens, our freedoms erode, and the radical Left continues rewriting the country our kids will inherit. For America, Mark Lamb Candidate for Congress, AZ-05 P.S. The radical Left and the D.C. insiders are already watching this race. Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: The Democratic Party
subject: An explanation →
body:
---
Derek, In a minute, we’re going to ask you to [**contribute to the DNC**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251115_5286_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5286_22930333_cEzTy3&akid=5286%2E22930333%2EcEzTy3) ahead of today’s mid-month fundraising deadline. But first, let’s be clear about what’s going on right now: Trump and Republicans have no interest in keeping health care accessible for millions of Americans. On top of that, Trump went all the way to the Supreme Court to prevent SNAP recipients from receiving their full benefits — a cruel and unsurprising act. Trump wants to make Americans vulnerable so that he can swoop in and “save” the day. And to make it worse, Republicans are only fueling his fire. But here’s the thing: _You’re not a hero if you put out the fire you started_. **We can’t let Trump’s power continue to go unchecked.** That’s why this month is so important. At the end of November, we’ll face our first fundraising deadline since Democrats’ sweeping wins across the country earlier this month. A lot of contributions will show the continued strength of Democrats’ opposition to Trump and Republicans’ billionaire-first agenda. They’ll show that Americans are ready for change and that **_we aren’t done fighting.**_ [**In the last few weeks, thousands of Democrats have pitched in to help send that message loud and clear. clean_body: Derek, In a minute, we’re going to ask you to ahead of today’s mid-month fundraising deadline. But first, let’s be clear about what’s going on right now: Trump and Republicans have no interest in keeping health care accessible for millions of Americans. On top of that, Trump went all the way to the Supreme Court to prevent SNAP recipients from receiving their full benefits — a cruel and unsurprising act. Trump wants to make Americans vulnerable so that he can swoop in and “save” the day. And to make it worse, Republicans are only fueling his fire. But here’s the thing: You’re not a hero if you put out the fire you started. We can’t let Trump’s power continue to go unchecked. That’s why this month is so important. At the end of November, we’ll face our first fundraising deadline since Democrats’ sweeping wins across the country earlier this month. A lot of contributions will show the continued strength of Democrats’ opposition to Trump and Republicans’ billionaire-first agenda. They’ll show that Americans are ready for change and that we aren’t done fighting. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Your support is what makes Democrats’ wins possible. Thank you, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Peter, There’s a case before the Supreme Court that Ron DeSantis is watching closely. He’s hoping that the court will strike down Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act — and in doing so, clear the way for states like Florida to steal power away from communities of color so he can create more Republican-held House seats. Section 2 safeguards people of color’s ability to elect candidates of their choice and bans states from enacting racial gerrymanders. If the Supreme Court undermines this critical protection, it could open the floodgates for states like Florida to redistrict and dilute the voices of voters of color. **While the fair maps movement is fighting for the future of the Voting Rights Act in the courts, we’re busy preparing for whatever happens next. We must be ready to fight back against Republican attempts to gerrymander from spreading to states like Florida and beyond.** [**Republicans see a weakened or undermined Voting Rights Act as an opportunity to gerrymander several districts for themselves at the expense of voters of color — donate today to make sure we have the resources and readiness we need to meet the moment and protect voters from being silenced by power-hungry politicians.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119341318/582740637/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_DesantisIsReady_email_20251115-NDRC-Tier1-DesantisIsReady_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251115-NDRC-Tier1-DesantisIsReady_&utm_campaign=DesantisIsReady&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3MTMwZGMwLTMzYzItZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qbC45Vc5bOuCXsKgc4wpiL0WBNH0PgDm2_XN2NZWvqo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

DeSantis has made no secret about his desire to tip the scales in Republicans’ favor in Florida. He’s been threatening to follow the lead of states like Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina and conduct its own mid-decade redraw to grab more seats for Republicans in the House. He has also repeatedly called for a new U.S. Census — an unprecedented aberration, since the Constitution establishes that the census should be taken once every decade.
“We are going to press this issue,” DeSantis vowed in August. “This is something that has stuck in my craw for a number of years because I remember telling everybody that we were going to get two seats at the last census, and then when they came out with it, we only got one.”
Florida’s Attorney General even wrote to the Census Bureau, claiming that they must “award Florida what we’re entitled to. An extra seat in Congress.”
We’re sending a clear message to politicians like Ron DeSantis that nobody is entitled to power. In the months ahead, we have to be prepared to fight back and return power to the people.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: re: a longer email… —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I need your support.
| | | It's Senator Schumer. This is a long email -- but because of how much is at stake, _you need to know it all._

**If you can't read the whole thing, I'll cut to the chase:**

**[The GOP wants to use their majority to implement ALL of Trump's most extreme policy goals. I wish I was exaggerating, but I'm not. So please, will you chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ before tonight's mid-month deadline to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22262?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)**

_Here are the three most important things you need to know:_

**SENATE REPUBLICANS ARE WORKING HAND-IN-HAND WITH TRUMP TO PASS HIS PLANS INTO LAW.**

Now that they have the majority, they're doing whatever it takes to cater to Trump's desires -- even if it means cutting key programs like Medicaid and Social Security!

_It gets worse:_

**EXPERTS ARE SAYING TAKING THE SENATE BACK WILL BE TOUGH.**

If we want to stop Trump's agenda, we'll NEED to take back the Senate -- but the analysts are saying it'll be an uphill battle. Factor in the Republican megadonors willing to spend hundreds of millions to keep the Senate red, and it's clear we won't have much margin for error.

_As a result:_

**WE'LL NEED ALL HANDS ON DECK TO DEFY THE ODDS AND TAKE BACK THE MAJORITY!**

It'll be a tough fight, but I know it can be done. We can only beat the odds if grassroots Democrats like you step up. **So please:**

**[We _NEED_ to fight back and act with urgency, so before today's mid-month deadline, will you give $5 _(becomes $15!)_ to win back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22262?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| | [Donate $5 (Becomes $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/22262?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)
---
| [Donate $10 (Becomes $30)](https://go.dscc.org/go/22262?amount=5&t=8&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)
---
| [Donate $20 (Becomes $60)](https://go.dscc.org/go/22262?amount=5&t=9&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)
---
| [Rush Another Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/22262?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)
---

I'm so grateful for your continued support.

Chuck

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/22262?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251115-ChuckSchumer-SchumerLongForm2026RF-Pros-sl1&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)

| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q4-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=21757_9716520_LGPwlG&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=21757_9716520_LGPwlG&akid=21757%2E9716520%2ELGPwlG)**.

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: His words are now our mission.
body:
[unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih1ofcvozm0lhsrzom1kfewypol4r84fw0si35upehx4x7ujcmiojdxgdah4q6jh303jc2k2bb0219g84e89urz30ubh13&__stmp=t5rynm&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

Steve Thompson, Editor
* * *

| | |
---
Friend, Charlie Kirk gave EVERYTHING to defend this country. But before he left us, he gave us something even more powerful — _A step-by-step plan to beat the Left and save America._ **It’s all in his book:****_How We Win._** And today, we want to send it to you for FREE.
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rynm&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rynm&__onlt=h)
---
All we ask is that you chip in ANY amount to help Turning Point USA continue the mission Charlie started — reaching the next generation with truth, boldness, and love for America. This is the blueprint Charlie used to build the most powerful Conservative youth movement in America... And it’s the plan we’ll keep using to change the culture and save the country. It’s not just theory... It’s not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... **It’s about ACTION.** Charlie spent over a decade building the most powerful youth movement in American history: 🔥 820,000+ student activists
Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 A generation shifting towards conservatism in real time
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rynm&__onlt=h)
---
Charlie knew it could happen before the world did. He led the revolution on campus to SAVE America. His plan is battle-tested and proven. And now it’s up to patriots like YOU to carry the torch Charlie lit. **Friend,****_How We Win_****is how we save our country.** One student. One campus. One bold patriot at a time.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rynm&__onlt=h)
---
[**Make your gift now**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rynm&__onlt=h) — and we’ll rush your copy of Charlie’s book to your door. Let’s honor Charlie’s legacy the best way we know how — by keeping up the fight. **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rynm&__onlt=h)
---

**Claim My FREE Book**](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t5rynm&__onlt=h)

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

He led the revolution on campus to SAVE America. His plan is battle-tested and proven. And now it’s up to patriots like YOU to carry the torch Charlie lit. Friend,How We Winis how we save our country. One student. One campus. One bold patriot at a time. — and we’ll rush your copy of Charlie’s book to your door. Let’s honor Charlie’s legacy the best way we know how — by keeping up the fight. Fellow patriot,

I’m going to give it to you straight — no spin, no excuses.

Democrats _**do**_ have momentum right now.

After the shutdown chaos and their big-city wins on November 4, their operatives are flooding the airwaves claiming they’ve “found the formula” for 2026. And if Republicans shrug this off or pretend it isn’t real, we’ll be handing them the House majority on a silver platter.

I refuse to let that happen.

Not in Texas. Not in America.

The shutdown was a disaster — not just politically, but morally. Democrats starved our troops, delayed paychecks, and caused real suffering just to chase votes in Virginia. Despite this, they’re more energized than ever.

They think they can beat us with fear. They think we’re asleep at the wheel.

But here’s the part that keeps me up at night: [**If we don’t match their momentum right now, we will lose the House.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c65cb474fe1944e5b73bc4e4815d47cd&_e=lcm-J1VHDm1flFU6rbsKIxjk-vpaUM0C20uVQ14oID8ulCo1tvwv4gg4aB5B1DiRqtPHf9-mtP-j-Lj0M2dwmliys6oc5wD7yqvtOpPa0wpx-C09lV1FEbX9zBFVv_odCVKe2FKNzKXtwIM_m_N1DCQaNSJpI3m8J5ckd2xCocQO0ymdQXOC9AD2HezuPKU_vgd7KnqH395bJFrGzVqvgwp10P6VWaUhgCRq0Myqg5BZqUN_uW6fanwooJILVKy4pbMh_BCe8ZIZt7zJ0Snk8tb378xvWo1tlrFTcuUcI0Q54_LqjxiFGYU6egCq8J6xl3qyBQuAuMI0fJZBtCmH9_r1sCu7iKYoddn8LHeTApJhd2aLh0vhRA4kLuZoLixDjEqJLKy80UgMaWp_sdCP7_LXSfdAh4L4se_MnW-oRpDTogj4vZXcG7_h8t-eJqoPR1Xk3gDrEyfbzOtINhyYa9zO_Crej01s2dfocyQeu3TYDfYF7Guj7KvTz0r9APsGuDYW7RmSBSQkqEbEDRiEYrghS6kuepipZJkdGJGZ8Dq7RdKPE5N0Wk-XdoPQbAhLhw8rKZTulw9D5WzqGyYD566iWyV4HJ8OKiOn-LWmgtkQfRuUIH5P9E_M9UyIrTcHXgzCrDKJjpmX4zJAtoXLkX0spBv8lnvpXUXroZk4UtnsvEBM1chB5Cx5ShyXfZkvHW2Cq1Wi9D3rYHGRRms6EpVXkUL_QzX4ycQ81tukGX8%3D)

I’m watching Democrats consolidate donors, pour millions into targeted districts, and openly plot a path to a new Speaker — and yes, that means Hakeem Jeffries with the gavel.

**We cannot afford a slow start.**

**We cannot afford complacency.**

[**Tonight’s mid-month deadline is our line in the sand. This is the moment we decide whether we fight — or surrender the momentum completely.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c65cb474fe1944e5b73bc4e4815d47cd&_e=lcm-J1VHDm1flFU6rbsKIxjk-vpaUM0C20uVQ14oID8ulCo1tvwv4gg4aB5B1DiRqtPHf9-mtP-j-Lj0M2dwmliys6oc5wD7yqvtOpPa0wpx-C09lV1FEbX9zBFVv_odCVKe2FKNzKXtwIM_m_N1DCQaNSJpI3m8J5ckd2xCocQO0ymdQXOC9AD2HezuPKU_vgd7KnqH395bJFrGzVqvgwp10P6VWaUhgCRq0Myqg5BZqUN_uW6fanwooJILVKy48wq02wJR2mttyjqP3JDrsv-0h3Ec-xfxULq3mZoGM23HkOUwGNgbdpH8dGkdlIqAfZDcRrlwMIOpDuQ6659e8zQK0_yN1lwZGaEtfw5rHqblVVEX0FhLgxeCsVIAqigSaSn1gtQbUOjS4Z64uQ2BpTWwCr_QlfGZst4Rg80FtkXtVogbs6uRAjIlhVkdEGosOj3U_dKr6VJPDEEM9Mo2QhYaCIVqSMKuD-zKN-6yPfFm-V4c9fjFQ5SPJHqmYvwYMYabC_rzSJlsqfLFLGv7ufKWLbwmzxZhRzuJBgn8L59UtkYR0WNv11WfGVvMYhUkNIrv3JTliWOhhxo9JvjIDsubymi2m0eZzZmU_4Zl6kUPPewIManYUFPMZTsTBBqxB0bZUzhMmx_49kGZYAMIPN1A9JBn81Hdn3w5wABwrU5eAgqt4YlJmX4gufs6583YKExHFn7OB7VSwyp6F8VVSzeXe09m3t83FtotgyJSKBU%3D)

name: James Talarico
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
We’re at the halfway point for our first full fundraising quarter. We’ve already asked a lot of you since we launched this campaign two months ago — but I want to explain why your support right now is so important.
At the end of this quarter, we have an FEC deadline. We will have to report our fundraising numbers publicly again. We’ll have to do it if they are good, and we’ll have to do it if they are not.
The truth is that all eyes will be on these numbers. Our opponents and the media are asking if the energy behind our campaign at the beginning was a fluke or if we’re building a movement that really can take back Texas.
With the holidays approaching, we know things will slow down. So we need to go into the final half of the quarter in an even stronger position.
We’ve set an ambitious goal before we hit the halfway point of the quarter: 5,000 donations in 48 hours. This is what it will take to keep us on track to reach our targets and continue laying the foundation to win this race.
[**I’m personally asking you to contribute $5 or whatever you can spare today. This is the hardest and most expensive race I’ve ever run. Your support today would mean a lot to me.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251115-1-ak&t=1&akid=233%2E1347274%2Ep6oJV-)

[**Today, I’m humbly asking you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our November mid-quarter fundraising deadline passes tonight at midnight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251115-1-b&t=2&akid=11035%2E3935704%2EFIXmmT)
When it comes to our movement for gun safety, there’s never a moment where we can slow down. Our nation’s gun violence crisis tears apart communities and families each and every day.
Sometimes we see these stories in our news headlines. But most of the time, we don’t. Each and every day, people lose their lives to preventable acts of gun violence, and families must learn to cope with the loss of a loved one.
Our mission at GIFFORDS is to create a future where we no longer have to live in fear from the threat of gun violence. The only way we can fuel our work is when people like you chip in to messages like these.
[**So please: Will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our November mid-quarter fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251115-1-b&t=3&akid=11035%2E3935704%2EFIXmmT)

Peter - I gotta' get this off my chest really quick.

The Biden administration secretly spied on my phone.

**But it wasn 't just me they went after. For 4 years, the corrupt Biden administration TRIED TO SILENCE and DESTROY every conservative they could.**

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

Friend,

At the end of this email, I’m going to humbly ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119345054/582756379/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTA5ZjIyMi0zY2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgcMPFFrn8RWD-wLgAHGzIwUjoo7tRn3ZuPCv3BrS24=)** to keep me in Congress fighting for you. But before I do, I want to explain the importance of this moment.

After the longest shutdown in our country’s history ended without any guarantees for affordable healthcare, it’s clear that we have a lot of work to do.

It’s a failure for working families in IL-13 and across the nation that Republican leadership didn’t prioritize ending their manufactured healthcare crisis. Time and again they’ve shown their true colors – from spending millions on demolishing the East Wing of the White House to handing their billionaire donors tax breaks on the backs of the middle class.

**I’m fed up, and I know I’m not alone. I decided to run for Congress to champion working families who deserve better, and right now, their lives are being made harder by those in charge.**

The good news is that we can hold the MAGA agenda accountable by flipping the House majority next year, and the preparations start now. The hard truth is that after flipping this seat blue in 2022, I’ve been a key target, and Republicans will do anything to keep their grip on power and stop any amount of progress.

clean_body: | = Friend, At the end of this email, I’m going to humbly ask you to = to keep me in Congress fighting for you. But before I do, I want to explain the importance of this moment. After the longest shutdown in our country’s history ended without any guarantees for affordable healthcare, it’s clear that we have a lot of work to do. It’s a failure for working families in IL-13 and across the nation that Republican leadership didn’t prioritize ending their manufactured healthcare crisis. Time and again they’ve shown their true colors – from spending millions on demolishing the East Wing of the White House to handing their billionaire donors tax breaks on the backs of the middle class. I’m fed up, and I know I’m not alone. I decided to run for Congress to champion working families who deserve better, and right now, their lives are being made harder by those in charge. The good news is that we can hold the MAGA agenda accountable by flipping the House majority next year, and the preparations start now. The hard truth is that after flipping this seat blue in 2022, I’ve been a key target, and Republicans will do anything to keep their grip on power and stop any amount of progress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. subject: POLL: Should DOJ release the Epstein files?
body:
Let us know what you think.
#
The Trump-Epstein affair may prove to be one of the biggest scandals in American political history. The people deserve to know the truth.
[ Should the Department of Justice immediately release the Epstein files? ](https://act.leftnet.org/survey/release-epstein-files?source=em20251115-1348&t=1&akid=1348%2E2118727%2ErWF-6f) Yes No **[ Take the survey → ](https://act.leftnet.org/survey/release-epstein-files?source=em20251115-1348&t=2&akid=1348%2E2118727%2ErWF-6f) **

We can't stress enough the gravity of this situation. | REPUBLICAN STATE LEADERSHIP MEMBERSHIP NOTICE ACCOUNT HOLDER: 2024 MEMBERSHIP: LAPSED 2025 MEMBERSHIP ENROLLMENT: PENDING You have 24 hours to reactivate your membership for 2025 and send a resounding message to the Radical Left. clean_body: The Republican campaign machine is raising millions, and if we can’t compete, working families will pay the price. Kirsten here. I’ll get straight to the point: 🔷 Health care premiums and grocery prices are SKYROCKETING. 🔷 Donald Trump spent the shutdown building a $300 million ballroom and denying SNAP benefits. 🔷 He’s spent his whole week trying to block a vote on the Epstein files. Meanwhile, the Republican campaign machine is raising millions to expand their Senate majority. If we can’t compete, working families will continue to pay the price. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = As Chair of the DSCC, it’s my job to make sure that our Democrats have the funds they need to compete – but you can only stretch every dollar so far. If we don’t hit this goal, we’ll have to pull back, and our candidates will feel the difference. They could be forced to cut back on ads, materials for volunteers and more. To put it bluntly, they’ll fall behind. With the state of our country, we can’t afford to lose ground in our fight to take back the Senate. We need grassroots donors like you on our team if we’re going to compete with the Republican machine, give our candidates the resources they need and win back control of the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for sticking with me, Kirsten Gillibrand * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =
