body:
Now, let’s finish the job
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
Peter,
In just 300 days, President Trump has done what the Washington establishment said was _impossible._
He’s rebuilt our economy, strengthened our borders, stood up to China, and put America and hardworking families right here in Nebraska, **first again.**
But to keep this momentum going, he needs fighters in Congress that will stand with him, not one that tries to block him at every turn.
That’s why I’m running.
I’m in this fight to help President Trump **finish what he started** to secure our border, restore energy dominance, and defend the values that make our country strong.
**[BACK MY FIGHT TO WASHINGTON](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**
But the Left is already targeting Nebraska, pouring millions into this race to stop our America First movement.
We can’t let that happen.
Will you step up today and help me stand with President Trump by chipping in to keep this seat red and ensure we have his back in Congress?
_**[👉 Contribute $25, $50, or more today to Stand with Trump & Brett.](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)**_
Let’s show the radical Left that Nebraska is all in for President Trump and that we’re ready to send reinforcements to help him finish the fight.
Thank you for standing with us,
| | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)

Brett Lindstrom _Republican Candidate for NE-02_

name: Kathy Hochul
subject: re: Elise Stefanik:
body:
I have some news to share. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119348273/582761083/-1495091374?refcode=WUEFHK36_20251115_HochulSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057336&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODA5ZjIyMi0zY2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wxorls72ROT6dojprYnpYqvf2OPsdy6HZmXFNqvlQaY=) Peter, I have some news to share:

**Republican Elise Stefanik announced her campaign for governor.**

And Stefanik's special interest donors have already rushed her $12 million to take me down and flip New York red.

I've never backed down from a fight — and I sure as hell won't start now.

Stefanik will be watching us closely, and we need to usher in a record-breaking fundraising push to show she doesn't stand a chance. **[**That's why I'm calling on my top supporters to help prove the strength of our team. Can I count on you to split a donation between myself and EMILYs List today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119348274/582761084/-1495091374?refcode=WUEFHK36_20251115_HochulSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057336&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODA5ZjIyMi0zY2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wxorls72ROT6dojprYnpYqvf2OPsdy6HZmXFNqvlQaY=)** | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119348275/582761085/-1495091374?refcode=WUEFHK36_20251115_HochulSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057336&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODA5ZjIyMi0zY2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wxorls72ROT6dojprYnpYqvf2OPsdy6HZmXFNqvlQaY=)
---
I'll be blunt, Peter: Sellout Stefanik is a self-serving politician who cares more about Donald Trump's approval than what's best for New York families.

She supports Trump's expensive tariffs that are jacking up the costs of everything from clothing to groceries for New Yorkers. She voted multiple times against the child tax credit.

Stefanik brags about being the "deciding vote" for his agenda that will rip away health care from 1.5 million New Yorkers and put five rural hospitals in her district on the chopping block.

And when the Trump administration threatened to cut New York police funding, Stefanik stayed silent.

**New Yorkers need a governor who will stand up to Trump and fight like hell for them.**
****[**Peter, I need all hands on deck to fight back. So I'm asking again: Will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List to help me outraise Stefanik and win this race for every New Yorker?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119348276/582761086/-1495091374?refcode=WUEFHK36_20251115_HochulSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057336&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODA5ZjIyMi0zY2MyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wxorls72ROT6dojprYnpYqvf2OPsdy6HZmXFNqvlQaY=)****

clean_body: I have some news to share. | = Peter, I have some news to share: Republican Elise Stefanik announced her campaign for governor. And Stefanik's special interest donors have already rushed her $12 million to take me down and flip New York red. I've never backed down from a fight — and I sure as hell won't start now. Stefanik will be watching us closely, and we need to usher in a record-breaking fundraising push to show she doesn't stand a chance. = | = I'll be blunt, Peter: Sellout Stefanik is a self-serving politician who cares more about Donald Trump's approval than what's best for New York families. She supports Trump's expensive tariffs that are jacking up the costs of everything from clothing to groceries for New Yorkers. She voted multiple times against the child tax credit. Stefanik brags about being the "deciding vote" for his agenda that will rip away health care from 1.5 million New Yorkers and put five rural hospitals in her district on the chopping block. And when the Trump administration threatened to cut New York police funding, Stefanik stayed silent. New Yorkers need a governor who will stand up to Trump and fight like hell for them. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you and ever upward, Kathy = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

body:

The government shutdown may have finally ended — but it will have a lasting impact on our economy and community. Folks went weeks without the benefits they depend on and the pay they've earned, all while House Republicans stood by and did absolutely nothing.

It's never been more clear that the GOP has completely abandoned its responsibility to the American people. They are loyal to one person and that's Donald Trump. It's anti-democratic, anti-American, _**and it's time to vote them out.**_ Everyday folks can't keep paying the price for Washington's dysfunction, and I am determined to keep delivering results for our community. Our fight to take back the Democratic House majority is well underway, and I need you by my side.

clean_body: Peter, while the GOP shows up for elites, I show up for St. Louis. The government shutdown may have finally ended — but it will have a lasting impact on our economy and community. Folks went weeks without the benefits they depend on and the pay they've earned, all while House Republicans stood by and did absolutely nothing. It's never been more clear that the GOP has completely abandoned its responsibility to the American people. They are loyal to one person and that's Donald Trump. It's anti-democratic, anti-American, and it's time to vote them out. Everyday folks can't keep paying the price for Washington's dysfunction, and I am determined to keep delivering results for our community. Our fight to take back the Democratic House majority is well underway, and I need you by my side. Can I count on you to chip in $5, or whatever you can, before our mid-month fundraising deadline, to help me stay in this fight, hold the GOP accountable, and flip the House blue? → = Thank you for your support. — Wesley | PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO BOX 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

Peter, I was just checking Actblue to review our fundraising numbers from last month, and I was stunned.

**_$21.94. That was our average donation in October._**

**It’s indisputable proof: Since Day One, our movement has truly been people-powered, people-centric, and proud of it.**

Remember when nobody thought my progressive campaign could win in DeSantis’s Florida?

Thanks to generous people like you giving just $21.94, we’ve been able to defy the odds and build a real youth-powered movement whose influence stretches across Florida.

So, I hate asking for money, but the stakes are too high for me not to reach out. I know that our movement has real momentum, and if we can hit every fundraising goal – we can flip Florida blue. clean_body: | ~ Peter, I was just checking Actblue to review our fundraising numbers from last month, and I was stunned. $21.94. That was our average donation in October. It’s indisputable proof: Since Day One, our movement has truly been people-powered, people-centric, and proud of it. Remember when nobody thought my progressive campaign could win in DeSantis’s Florida? Thanks to generous people like you giving just $21.94, we’ve been able to defy the odds and build a real youth-powered movement whose influence stretches across Florida. So, I hate asking for money, but the stakes are too high for me not to reach out. I know that our movement has real momentum, and if we can hit every fundraising goal – we can flip Florida blue. But it doesn't happen if I can’t count on you, Peter. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thank you, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. name: Blake Gendebien
subject: I'm a dairy farmer, not a millionaire or career politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I know what it's like to work hard and raise a family here in the North Country. I'm not running for Congress to make things easier for big corporations while everyday folks struggle to get by. I'm running to fight for working families, just like yours and mine.
I’m Blake Gendebien, the Democrat running to replace Elise Stefanik in Congress.
Now that Stefanik is running for governor, her seat is completely open. We have a real shot at winning this race and taking back the House, but we can’t do it without your support.
**[If you’re ready to help us shrink Mike Johnson’s majority, will you split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97588?refcode=em20251115-9707&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9707%2E614464%2EQ5rNL6)**

I'm a dairy farmer, not a millionaire or career politician. I know what it's like to work hard and raise a family here in the North Country. I'm not running for Congress to make things easier for big corporations while everyday folks struggle to get by. I'm running to fight for working families, just like yours and mine.
But we don't have a lot of time. With the midterm elections less than a year out, this is the time to start laying a solid groundwork. That way, we can really go head-to-head with the millions of dollars Republicans are expected to pour into our district.
**[Peter, will you split $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today to help us win here and get one step closer to taking back the House?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97588?refcode=em20251115-9707&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9707%2E614464%2EQ5rNL6)**

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: I am really worried about this weekend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
I hope you are having a calm and relaxing weekend with your friends and family. Unfortunately, I’ve spent the day worried.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qL6SbXncCLjWHUX1aBBgpvDyYgwS93uLYJ68lSxQZlXnIrmsa1CQEPGwdHbUX4w00FD71XDGDkyF-6j3Nf5VPRLWNDfkhcVo6NsF8-n85FMHmymBOlzlYtfaL8GUg21jQgbuEOF3z_CnS0LUc78YwxORFBwMAKs5L6sEZhqd10bdATpYgX55caA_jC7dQFs_qe-KKcs5yRv5b-bKiRzoFw6_9ETn-cspgmReswJVYxI=&c=5ZHCLsyT-6nBEO4xtorFVvISmz0u8G2Rgqhvpjjf4PsngHlr5D-ZfA==&ch=XIYPrbF08-BM0cr80cs4evQGKimiLZyaUingJms-9kc-QMDdDDfy7w==)
---
|

Peter,
I hope you are having a calm and relaxing weekend with your friends and family.
Unfortunately, I've spent the day worried.
As the Democratic taking on Congresswoman Lauren Boebert, it is my responsibility to the people of CO-04 and to my campaign staff to raise as much as I can to ensure we have the budget to take back this seat.
As people have checked out from their phones and computers and are rightfully enjoying their weekend, our fundraising has taken a nosedive:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qL6SbXncCLjWHUX1aBBgpvDyYgwS93uLYJ68lSxQZlXnIrmsa1CQEPGwdHbUX4w00FD71XDGDkyF-6j3Nf5VPRLWNDfkhcVo6NsF8-n85FMHmymBOlzlYtfaL8GUg21jQgbuEOF3z_CnS0LUc78YwxORFBwMAKs5L6sEZhqd10bdATpYgX55caA_jC7dQFs_qe-KKcs5yRv5b-bKiRzoF29bs994nAlik6PuSW6hc0k=&c=5ZHCLsyT-6nBEO4xtorFVvISmz0u8G2Rgqhvpjjf4PsngHlr5D-ZfA==&ch=XIYPrbF08-BM0cr80cs4evQGKimiLZyaUingJms-9kc-QMDdDDfy7w==)
---
My team expects things to slow down ever further as the weekend progresses so we need to buckle-up and raise big today to meet our mid month goal and weather the coming storm.
A mid month goal might sound arbitrary but they are a key benchmark for our team to see if we are on track towards building the budget that we need -- right now we are behind.
Boebert is in Congress because of just 546 votes and when I faced her in 2024 we had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county.
[We can beat Boebert in 2026 and hitting these mid month fundraising goals is how we do it. Can I count on you to chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to help us stay on track?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qL6SbXncCLjWHUX1aBBgpvDyYgwS93uLYJ68lSxQZlXnIrmsa1CQEPGwdHbUX4w0-AluLdBLeF1UAY2Bz-rLeYTWVHujV7e5lg-fARXOfln0ruvDfRuO0uGnhKnWvu9hlNNN_A_mUvYHMeMdoNsRHofSiW0rX1CEukiPluEgencydpoGsbNNJucEJZoNe6SsNcPUBF5R0nA1lX7XiZ5NpzC7o5AkfiMW4ShZg8HuOx4qfmjC1UxjwQ==&c=5ZHCLsyT-6nBEO4xtorFVvISmz0u8G2Rgqhvpjjf4PsngHlr5D-ZfA==&ch=XIYPrbF08-BM0cr80cs4evQGKimiLZyaUingJms-9kc-QMDdDDfy7w==)
---

clean_body: I hope you are having a calm and relaxing weekend with your friends and family. Unfortunately, I’ve spent the day worried. | | | | | == | Peter, I hope you are having a calm and relaxing weekend with your friends and family. Unfortunately, I've spent the day worried. As the Democratic taking on Congresswoman Lauren Boebert, it is my responsibility to the people of CO-04 and to my campaign staff to raise as much as I can to ensure we have the budget to take back this seat. As people have checked out from their phones and computers and are rightfully enjoying their weekend, our fundraising has taken a nosedive: | == My team expects things to slow down ever further as the weekend progresses so we need to buckle-up and raise big today to meet our mid month goal and weather the coming storm. A mid month goal might sound arbitrary but they are a key benchmark for our team to see if we are on track towards building the budget that we need -- right now we are behind. Boebert is in Congress because of just 546 votes and when I faced her in 2024 we had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thank you in advance for your support. Trisha Calvarese Democrat for CO-04 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | | | | | | |

View this email in a browser

Your Wallet, Your Voice!

Stand with us to give Taxpayers a voice on the devastating gas tax and fee hikes!

TRANSPORTATION PETITION INFORMATION!
The Transportation Bill Referendum Petitions have arrived! The Oregon Legislature passed a law that will increase taxes by $4 BILLION and we deserve a say.
We will be gathering signatures at the new Jackson County Republican Party (JCRP) office, located at:

112 N. Front Street, Central Point, OR.

The JCRP office will be open :
Saturday, November 15th, Noon to 4 p.m.
Tuesday, November 18th, 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.
Wednesday, November 19th, 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.
Thursday, November 20th , 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.
Saturday, November 22nd, 10 a.m. to 4 p.m.

Other Locations:
Saturday, November 22nd
Triple Tree Restaurant, 4999 Hwy 234, Central Point – 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. – Come out and sign the petition !

We hope one of the days listed will fit your schedule. The Chief Petitioner is hoping that Saturday, November 22nd, will be a GREAT day for collecting signatures! If you aren’t able to sign on one of the other days, please get out on the 22nd and help that be the last day we need to collect signatures! If we reach the 100,000-signature mark state wide by November 22nd, the petitioner can get all the processing steps done and submitted to the Secretary of State soon after.

For more signing locations, times and dates go to NoTaxOR.com. They are updating the website regularly to list the locations across Oregon!

FYI - To sign the petition, you need to be registered to vote in Oregon with an “Active” status. If you did not receive a ballot in November of 2024, your status may be “Inactive”. CLICK THE BUTTON BELOW TO CHECK YOUR STATUS
Enter the required information to see your voter status.
Thank you so much for participating in getting this petition completed and on its way to the Secretary of State!

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: The Shutdown Is Over. Now Let’s Get Back to Work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
The longest government shutdown in American history finally came to an end.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | |
**The Shutdown is Finally Over!** The longest government shutdown in American history finally came to an end.On Thursday night, I joined 221 of my House colleagues to re-open the government. Democrats in Washington, D.C. put our country in a lurch for weeks — closing many parks, delaying services, disrupting airports and holding federal workers’ paychecks hostage. It was irresponsible, it was unnecessary, and it hurt hardworking folks in eastern Washington who simply want their government to function.The good news is that the political games have ended. The shutdown is over. And now the House can get back to doing what we were sent here to do — helping the American people.I ran for Congress to fight for common sense. While Democrats were focused on partisan stunts, I stayed focused on:
* Getting the government open again so essential services continue
* Supporting our troops, veterans, and law enforcement
* Fighting for a stronger economy for working families

The Far Left showed the country what happens when extremists decide that scoring political points matters more than governing. We can do better: working together on the challenges that face our great country and putting the national interest first.[If you agree that we need fewer political stunts and more serious leadership, I hope you’ll stay in this fight with me](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=83320661c3&e=5a45b9550e) — by spreading the word, staying engaged, and working together to build the country we love, for our children and grandchildren.Sincerely,\- Congressman Michael Baumgartner

clean_body: The longest government shutdown in American history finally came to an end. | | | | | | | | | | | | The Shutdown is Finally Over! The longest government shutdown in American history finally came to an end.On Thursday night, I joined 221 of my House colleagues to re-open the government. Democrats in Washington, D.C. put our country in a lurch for weeks — closing many parks, delaying services, disrupting airports and holding federal workers’ paychecks hostage. It was irresponsible, it was unnecessary, and it hurt hardworking folks in eastern Washington who simply want their government to function.The good news is that the political games have ended. The shutdown is over. And now the House can get back to doing what we were sent here to do — helping the American people.I ran for Congress to fight for common sense. While Democrats were focused on partisan stunts, I stayed focused on: Getting the government open again so essential services continue Supporting our troops, veterans, and law enforcement * Fighting for a stronger economy for working families The Far Left showed the country what happens when extremists decide that scoring political points matters more than governing. We can do better: working together on the challenges that face our great country and putting the national interest first. — by spreading the word, staying engaged, and working together to build the country we love, for our children and grandchildren.Sincerely,\- Congressman Michael Baumgartner | | | Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203 | | | | | | | | | You can or | | |

I won't sugarcoat this, Fellow American.

_I'm in the fight of my life._
The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They're rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country.

**Last quarter, Democrats outraised us by a 4-to-1 margin.** If you look at the numbers of our grassroots support, the gap is even wider.

They outraised us **10 to 1** in small-dollar donations. _Donations from folks just like you._

_We're falling behind._

It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. So we cannot afford to let Democrats outwork us. **I'm going to need your help to keep Montana in Republican hands.**

Fellow American, if we want to catch up this month, we need to surpass our November fundraising goal. Right now, halfway through the month, we're not meeting our numbers. **[I need your help before November is halfway done.](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=f04e8b30f9ac434eaf00d26ce668506b&_e=0kHB3xHNXQSffLDGFKq84I0Dhm2bJqAN2N0UqYcSCwkUen5CA5EUP8VGWcp9rIMJDcmbUGbog-yXiRMCBB_jDXemvgo61xhNjB0Z_9boPU1g2Cyd-bPJzrp2xR3JODVwkmnYiu9XzlzsmliMskkeV92ciBIanRnPLQeiHqxMcQ-4OKXjN3JquFG6yPP8hvbV0KgUFZJ_myTZ2GtxODJL5YCnlZI87ohhLXoxfjkoY0hX3XQL2o0NcJQ9BWSt1UTJ9V5D58eztsBi8idFkrQtSRtyqCZiCVJwbRFEEy3xUPMe4aQ3eXnpmh7uolYHsqUv87HDGJnm7IZEHFQAplytpZlAfZmU-l8X9xmHeLU_tgzS_qSDaUV3A2ncxKOgkcvFx4fqLjBTuZXZCNHwcMpqdcLvsT4H7zy0t1plPLwZlmMZjwL2jgNTwj182X67O4vcBQr-Enx-ge-ztjE_QKt9mXDQvx_EPCkTPsXSBxacmR2axCfyfwCbHIb8rkCT8KB_L3NpIdeM-VukEQFvWYgwZSWc2FwTuc57nA8cZpjt8trEwGAcpQilOHs8ov7ThztA675HSqL3GRiAP5XY_ZRHPuwtwC6IbFMw8eeDku-Ap6YD09icgRHshr4lIddx9Y48HIVtps-JleqwBbr1r0XL7pKNrSJNuiwqJZWSc4F8FmT_yChP6-K18lGV22rcq_XqksU-Bepw4ypqEyPrA3fMOM9FEhyjKFC2gl0xjoPkFY5IPEYmkAANmzNXLKAhioYq)**

clean_body: I know you are tired of receiving these emails. | I won't sugarcoat this, Fellow American. I'm in the fight of my life. The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They're rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. Last quarter, Democrats outraised us by a 4-to-1 margin. If you look at the numbers of our grassroots support, the gap is even wider. They outraised us 10 to 1 in small-dollar donations. Donations from folks just like you. We're falling behind. It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. So we cannot afford to let Democrats outwork us. I'm going to need your help to keep Montana in Republican hands. Fellow American, if we want to catch up this month, we need to surpass our November fundraising goal. Right now, halfway through the month, we're not meeting our numbers. You can help us catch up. Please, before midnight tonight. Help however you can. Thanks, Steve Daines PS: I really don't want to keep sending these types of emails. I hope we can catch up to the Democrats' fundraising numbers. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: I am really worried about this weekend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
I hope you are having a calm and relaxing weekend with your friends and family. Unfortunately, I’ve spent the day worried.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KPQhFSIKak5M5U6NpAjSjW_-AevUN19zzS-7xZbTWGc7vcjsPNp7CJ38nNdo31FiYLlRDJCL4a8dK5oZZyfqIMrqrbUYewr8yM0gjG29nPPk21mVyc8rzu3vtouK0ZpqmmexppMjk9g-lK1xJ9ldpPQseIxdv99w5m5AvEBjrEjg9xLtCAJfl8xl_TLD1iSGbK5nNh4XAXn-rw0GrXT7M6H4eIrs9L-yVdqDWIksq2w=&c=z6FXVGxZEoT52hE1dzc1ldYBO9Dq3tyzoqI6slGpp_zsGYgaKxJi8A==&ch=kngbW4Xmoj3B15j_sTsS4kEL1TvI1W0IymCmd_BHDy2HpB_cL8Z6qg==)

Peter,
I hope you are having a calm and relaxing weekend with your friends and family.
Unfortunately, I've spent the day worried.
As the Democratic taking on Congresswoman Lauren Boebert, it is my responsibility to the people of CO-04 and to my campaign staff to raise as much as I can to ensure we have the budget to take back this seat.
As people have checked out from their phones and computers and are rightfully enjoying their weekend, our fundraising has taken a nosedive:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KPQhFSIKak5M5U6NpAjSjW_-AevUN19zzS-7xZbTWGc7vcjsPNp7CJ38nNdo31FiYLlRDJCL4a8dK5oZZyfqIMrqrbUYewr8yM0gjG29nPPk21mVyc8rzu3vtouK0ZpqmmexppMjk9g-lK1xJ9ldpPQseIxdv99w5m5AvEBjrEjg9xLtCAJfl8xl_TLD1iSGbK5nNh4XAXn-rw0GrXT7My4T3lIVZOPfwXcoQrwCT80=&c=z6FXVGxZEoT52hE1dzc1ldYBO9Dq3tyzoqI6slGpp_zsGYgaKxJi8A==&ch=kngbW4Xmoj3B15j_sTsS4kEL1TvI1W0IymCmd_BHDy2HpB_cL8Z6qg==)
---
My team expects things to slow down ever further as the weekend progresses so we need to buckle-up and raise big today to meet our mid month goal and weather the coming storm.
A mid month goal might sound arbitrary but they are a key benchmark for our team to see if we are on track towards building the budget that we need -- right now we are behind.
Boebert is in Congress because of just 546 votes and when I faced her in 2024 we had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district, overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts whereas Boebert massively underperformed Trump in every county.
[We can beat Boebert in 2026 and hitting these mid month fundraising goals is how we do it. Can I count on you to chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to help us stay on track?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KPQhFSIKak5M5U6NpAjSjW_-AevUN19zzS-7xZbTWGc7vcjsPNp7CJ38nNdo31FiEDMTSCobEwrxpy6NA8UqS_YJoPedPVAfaGVWcdLBfqLsT3VVJRKRV3UeWBZmvT5onwLFzUVVCbZ598nfDnM_D1xhSMoAP1MjQRxnTAEZVwn_AflpiMfbWRzd_XoZ8zzlVOA9FwNGBb1pTbPU1Adlk-zjry9qxVBDOBkF8uNdV0ORmjnvRFGfIw==&c=z6FXVGxZEoT52hE1dzc1ldYBO9Dq3tyzoqI6slGpp_zsGYgaKxJi8A==&ch=kngbW4Xmoj3B15j_sTsS4kEL1TvI1W0IymCmd_BHDy2HpB_cL8Z6qg==)

subject: We have the power to protect each other
body:
We are here, we are organized, and we are facing this moment together. | | | Peter, in this moment of deeply alarming attacks on our constitutional rights, immigrant neighbors, and loved ones, you have shown up for our communities. The **Defending Our Neighbors Fund** has set our next fundraising goal at $500,000. Your support allows us to rush resources to frontline organizations that are providing legal support to the people and families who power our country as they face existential threats against their dignity, safety, and lives. [**Can you help us reach our next milestone? Your donation supports trusted organizations providing legal representation, ensuring no one faces this system alone.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzadU9N9RNMkN_aPwx_gUWMyhrdkC01LWf7qDIV-X_SfNT1mpyRhipiKDWZuKh9G2xnm3a8Q_ZTLc3CbCqOIqOMHcpVdsZ0zmqrw0L_1y-CUm-qatJIHEX-T6isoyaz7H120oxE1wuUmAxvyokHryhxYsbXRlT3DAkLmvO6wueXawdBHNe4rQUcMwva8mNmIMWBjLDAYr5-ATDzw0PX5kbe6EOL8Ozs0MerTgwK9w6R3QsN29Iq-VWz0v5tzXw3dv2hnuUYKhZsAU48QqHz2aQWvjLUbJ7rT3LlmXFAbVJN9BW6VO9po7cCKASb8Sxp3nYbHLM224s_Z9xMSQzfHoa-EnNgc7WbnOExMgfAUyEMJeK15K8RJrWDeUcJD7aH2JphkPSCB-KYNXoiqjGSI_U5hVFE2l72ACpu6cgeJYxuy/4lm/hTBp5r2wTl23BwYs-EoQCw/h0/h001.YJWXJ4-i146glMqXSESD1IbHUYVp3_JKhrjM9NN1Px0) The need for legal counsel is soaring, as tens of thousands of immigrant families are targeted and torn apart. When a loved one is separated and wrongfully detained, _legal support can become a family’s most urgent need._ We know that access to a lawyer can be the difference between whether a family stays together or is separated indefinitely. That’s where the **Defending Our Neighbors Fund** comes in, by supporting organizations that provide legal representation and other forms of legal assistance, such as paying immigration bonds when possible, and expanding capacity for frontline advocates. This is about neighbors helping neighbors, making sure our communities and families stay together. [**Take action with us today by donating to the Defending Our Neighbors Fund. Your contribution will help expand a vital lifeline for immigrant families and individuals affected by the rising attacks on our rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzadU9N9RNMkN_aPwx_gUWMyhrdkC01LWf7qDIV-X_SfNT1mpyRhipiKDWZuKh9G2xnm3a8Q_ZTLc3CbCqOIqOMHcpVdsZ0zmqrw0L_1y-CUm-qatJIHEX-T6isoyaz7H120oxE1wuUmAxvyokHryhxYsbXRlT3DAkLmvO6wueXawdBHNe4rQUcMwva8mNmIMWBjLDAYr5-ATDzw0PX5kbc5L6MdrCklCAPWqzjQ6ya29MJYMTr2OfHAv7Fkm8fYwvg6NhHY4Vo4qpNJtvaCMws6-2fFPPk2ErrHb0o7aWzTEgOyPhDnORu7Mnsgf9dNEPKuFMyn6Q4VIywUQyQBHy9SpqA9SXiZO8nkYTx3d-iaJu5qAS6Lt49_hF9N1kZRuVjD2bQWamEezrtjmN6o6K1jELsiP-2_raG2LxwwvMaX/4lm/hTBp5r2wTl23BwYs-EoQCw/h1/h001.XgUA1uz4Hwh2MCnGSOow4wjd2x8hL4X9h5xuFbqqCCY) **** Thank you for stepping up at such a crucial time. But these candidates didn’t win by chance. They won because after 2024’s stunning defeat, candidates and operatives around the country buckled down and got to work.

And that’s how we win in 2026, by working hard NOW to build infrastructure, and getting out in our communities to connect with voters about how our candidates will improve their lives.

body:
Derek,

I’m sorry to email on a Saturday, but this is important.

We’re facing our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight, and we’re falling just short of where we need to be.

Momentum is with us—on November 4th, voters delivered big wins for Democrats and rejected the chaos in Washington. So now, national Republicans are looking for any chance to hold their slim House majority—including targeting key seats like PA-17.

We need to stay aggressive to defend this seat, take back the House, and keep fighting for what matters most to Western Pennsylvanians.

So I have to ask Derek, can you make a donation to Chris's campaign before our mid-month deadline tonight? Here’s the best link for you to donate: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deluzioq42025email?refcode=email_111525_mmfr3&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deluzioq42025email?refcode=email_111525_mmfr3&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000]

Thank you, and enjoy the rest of your Saturday!

Olivia

body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119350111/582767153/1733485174?refcode=em-11.15.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RkM2VhMWEtNDVjMi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vyw-_nPLSrEMtuH2G6Vx87Rb4gSGNbu2urD1gTWHtPU=) Hi, it’s Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal. I’ve spent my career fighting to lift up working families, so when I tell you that Randy Villegas is the fighter Congress desperately needs, you know I mean it. Randy stands out not only for his sharp policy mind, but because of his first-hand experience growing up in a working-class immigrant family in the Central Valley. That story shapes his deep commitment to fighting for his home -- from affordable health care and good-paying jobs to strong public schools and a democracy that works for all of us. He’s running in one of the most competitive races in the country, and he’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. He’s not afraid to speak truth to power. And in a moment when too many politicians cave to special interests, Randy’s courage and conviction are exactly what we need in Congress. But this won’t be easy. National Republicans and their super PAC allies are already pouring dark money into CA-22. They’re terrified of losing this seat to someone who can’t be bought. **[So I’m asking -- from one progressive to another: Will you rush in a grassroots donation of $3 to help elect Randy and flip CA-22?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119350114/582767154/1733485174?refcode=em-11.15.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RkM2VhMWEtNDVjMi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vyw-_nPLSrEMtuH2G6Vx87Rb4gSGNbu2urD1gTWHtPU=)** | | [DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119350116/582767158/1733485174?refcode=em-11.15.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RkM2VhMWEtNDVjMi1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Vyw-_nPLSrEMtuH2G6Vx87Rb4gSGNbu2urD1gTWHtPU=)

clean_body: | = Hi, it’s Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal. I’ve spent my career fighting to lift up working families, so when I tell you that Randy Villegas is the fighter Congress desperately needs, you know I mean it. Randy stands out not only for his sharp policy mind, but because of his first-hand experience growing up in a working-class immigrant family in the Central Valley. That story shapes his deep commitment to fighting for his home -- from affordable health care and good-paying jobs to strong public schools and a democracy that works for all of us. He’s running in one of the most competitive races in the country, and he’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. He’s not afraid to speak truth to power. And in a moment when too many politicians cave to special interests, Randy’s courage and conviction are exactly what we need in Congress. But this won’t be easy. National Republicans and their super PAC allies are already pouring dark money into CA-22. They’re terrified of losing this seat to someone who can’t be bought. = | | = This race is a toss-up. Every contribution, every conversation, and every single vote matters. Let’s help send a bold, progressive fighter to Congress. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal U.S. Representative, WA-07 | = | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

This campaign is powered by people like you – folks who give what they can, when they can because they believe in Valerie’s vision for a fairer, stronger future. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The far-right is moving fast — so are we
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251115-1624-foote&t=1001&akid=1624%2E342411%2E-2eEwA ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’ll be honest: this month, our fundraising has slowed — but that doesn’t
slow the Squad. What it does is remind us that every action we take
matters — and every supporter makes a real difference.

We’ve set a [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251115-movement.UeUBRC&refcode=em20251115-1624&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1624%2E342411%2E-2eEwA ]$10,000 goal by tonight’s mid-month deadline, and right now
we’re $3,914 short. Every contribution helps us organize, mobilize, and
respond to attacks on our communities faster and stronger.

The far-right believes they can silence the Squad and undermine Black,
Brown, and Muslim voices in Congress. They want to weaken the
multi-racial, multi-generational democracy we’ve been building together.

Their strategy is division.

Their agenda is hate.

But the Squad has a different plan: action, solidarity, and results.

We’re fighting for living wages, affordable housing, universal healthcare,
and justice for all. And support from this grassroots team strengthens our
ability to stand up to entrenched powers and fight for our communities.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251115-movement.UeUBRC&refcode=em20251115-1624&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1624%2E342411%2E-2eEwA ]Our deadline is just hours away, and we’re pushing hard to hit $10,000
by midnight. Let’s turn this moment into momentum, and ensure the
far-right doesn’t get the last word.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251115-movement.UeUBRC&refcode=em20251115-1624&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1624%2E342411%2E-2eEwA ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1624%2E342411%2E-2eEwA

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I can’t do this alone, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Normally when I write to you via email, I like them to be different from the other messages you get from most elected officials.
| | |
---
Friend —
Normally when you see my name in your inbox, I like the messages to be different from the other emails you get from most elected officials.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, along with other things I am seeing or working on in Washington, D.C. and at home in Georgia.
This message is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Here's why:
This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation. I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024, and that makes me MAGA’s #1 target.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.

Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen's before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close at midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119350715/582768815/274859036?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5638-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTRjZDIzMy00NWMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=95bYIV_fqeHIsCbFsf5KV9Xt3AacE95ghiIwubLBfO4=)

name: Chip Roy
subject: Texas is under assault
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
I will fight every single day for our God-given rights | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0241ccf0f2c3452aac371973da1a77ff&_e=pCuOzyaQHF-x0JPWOwe1HDpo9BGCUqyH-ko9bK1zhD9L_LA5tnD1Syk_Suft_SEQHLQfKm5d_FeQwvsnOOm1ghcJYE3JwtuM3fxS9u99FkHLJRfFi3l-19JkdkcugWy-lH3obYXk3f-uFkFMiXepXeX2Wxj8OoTBHQX4QC2AKoVocNkRpj5TuOPgDxG9vixlOKBL8a5mXraJSS45E4cTgCVIU7qBMAZbXRjOxvJxUFrwfw04q_eY6DZnBaWXiUVR3bpDXHMx5wxTy59z-6xu5gn13qG_YJm-b64tM0mLfyIMpieqWXJHJLPIKq7mPVASi5hylftc8_yDRD1v1QEmTy5JvSEFaIYKD5AB7CH0Lrq7zbv6zVSWAV2m0kbGrGNBJuCNnoxMsJ505C0BBuWMK3lTNYm0SLbZe3847_P3wd5yqFHqBBJh3uGpEhL6d6KkbKX1x1xRgRZiPsST_9GJIC-817nQZnzH6xcYYZiqNR_OfpWdyhgCgj5yhYORWM8VXm7GlUqAYVwNFDKl4FZTzymllcWzEjpbWph7dyvpAJhowaXhbmtMM4C056Z8Ys3FQgdMdw92fn1z3o3J33bFE8iYiXpRdkQWI8a5duuGjGhK6QGuqNvpCfoUKH9UdF8p8kWvkxAvxSTZiVPiHsbuZZIVHhZ1ErovEeUf4-eNdzo%3D)
Texas is under assault, Peter.

From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, **it's time to draw a line in the sand.**

That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life.

For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination.

But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors.

| | The chaos we are seeing in Washington right now is a clear example of the consequences when extremists in Congress refuse to work together.

And we need to make sure he continues being our fighter in Washington, especially at a time when Jersey families are at risk of losing healthcare and other life-saving services.

name: Team Walz
subject: One person’s name appears 1,628 times in the latest documents from Epstein’s estate. Do you know who it is?
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
The time is now for answers, accountability, and justice.
#
Hi Peter,
The U.S. House Oversight Committee just released 20,000 documents from convicted child sex offender Jeffrey Epstein's estate. In these documents, one person’s name is mentioned _1,628 times – more than any other person_.
**That name is Donald Trump.** Gosh, that’s a lot for an innocent guy.
[](https://act.timwalz.com/sign/epstein-files-petition/?t=1&akid=91%2E34582%2EFgcKbL)
Trump and his loyal lapdogs in the Republican Party have bent over backwards to hide the full truth from the American people for too long. The time is now for answers, accountability, and justice.
[**Nobody is above the law – not even Donald Trump. Add your name right now if you agree that Congress must vote to compel the Department of Justice to release ALL of its Epstein files.**](https://act.timwalz.com/sign/epstein-files-petition/?t=2&akid=91%2E34582%2EFgcKbL)
**[Add Your Name ››](https://act.timwalz.com/sign/epstein-files-petition/?t=3&akid=91%2E34582%2EFgcKbL)**
Every signature we collect is a strong reminder that Trump cannot simply will the truth away, because we the people will hold him accountable.
Thank you for taking action,
— Team Walz

Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=4&akid=91%2E34582%2EFgcKbL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=91%2E34582%2EFgcKbL)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

name: Powered by People
subject: Your support fuels change across Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Throughout this month, Powered by People volunteers, organizers, and
supporters have come together at several incredible events across Texas to
make it clear that this state’s future is one worth fighting for.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251115.ursKKI&refcode=ema20251115-240464&t=1002&akid=240464%2E444211%2EeCjjVw ]Beto speaking at event.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251115.ursKKI&refcode=ema20251115-240464&t=1003&akid=240464%2E444211%2EeCjjVw ]Beto with supporters.

Every event was filled with Texans who are ready to roll up their sleeves.
From voter registration drives to community meetings focused on recruiting

subject: Fight fascism and build a better future where no one starves and everyone can thrive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
By standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent, we fight fascism. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWUXpTNl_cK4xbtz4HGDIOtjg5QgfL3WzPq1ls9oSKZzZmedo4DZ_1Lpkt651ujNGWHXhNdsSUMa_CWdaUx9PEX3g-SBMkzNebI99m0GB2xDwMA6Vuf3wEXj6_gFJeT8ORW7uB0XW8i5qAYJ_2kLDn2tu5EG562qmv1I5aPfXs6rwUb4aB4OhbmXabDfZjxU_da0Fie5Xzl3GOOBJ4uG1O-cZ1t4d9Biiwx-UKnaU_UMTBPtnnGHF3KMjoVe5OxDsD92Vkl63T_8OOXiOzpWqzgcUdnb1RR_r338Tc2r1Iv9g/4lm/aEAaC8xXSu6X9mBRAdn4Aw/h0/h001.K7Kv6eRXiqSluE4LRkDbn5UeCbTNpxKb4u5u3EHzWlM)

Friend, Across the country, Americans are rising up against our fascist and cruel president. They’re keeping their communities safe from illegal immigration raids, including organizing patrols and doing emergency planning with families and schools. They’ve also been showing up for their neighbors by helping SNAP recipients buy groceries or access free food during the shutdown. During the government shutdown, I never stopped serving you. I led colleagues in Congress to push Trump’s administration to fund the life-saving food assistance program known as SNAP. To help the millions of people impacted, my team and I distributed food and raised money for food banks. Joining my colleagues, I demanded Republicans renew the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help 21 million Americans afford healthcare. I also cosponsored legislation to safeguard our democracy and shield federal workers from the Trump administration's illegal layoffs. **We must keep speaking up and resisting.** By standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent, we fight fascism and make sure our constitutional rights are not eroded. [**I promise to keep fighting for you, and for justice and dignity for every family who calls our country home. Together we’ll keep doing our patriotic duty to fight back against fascism. clean_body: By standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent, we fight fascism. | | | Friend, Across the country, Americans are rising up against our fascist and cruel president. They’re keeping their communities safe from illegal immigration raids, including organizing patrols and doing emergency planning with families and schools. They’ve also been showing up for their neighbors by helping SNAP recipients buy groceries or access free food during the shutdown. During the government shutdown, I never stopped serving you. I led colleagues in Congress to push Trump’s administration to fund the life-saving food assistance program known as SNAP. To help the millions of people impacted, my team and I distributed food and raised money for food banks. Joining my colleagues, I demanded Republicans renew the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help 21 million Americans afford healthcare. I also cosponsored legislation to safeguard our democracy and shield federal workers from the Trump administration's illegal layoffs. We must keep speaking up and resisting. By standing up to defend each other and exercising our right to dissent, we fight fascism and make sure our constitutional rights are not eroded. | Trump and MAGA Republicans are spreading fear to divide us, so they can hoard wealth and power while taking away our rights and resources. They want to pick and choose who counts and who gets to be human. They want to block us from joining together to demand what we all deserve, because they’re scared of the power we have when we come together across differences. But just as previous generations rose up to end slavery and win civil rights, we will keep making our voices heard and building the people power we need to win. We know a better future is possible, and together we’ll keep pushing for a country where no one starves and everyone can thrive. But we’re up against powerful corporate special interests and billionaires with deep influence over most of my colleagues in Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | We shouldn’t be begging our country to protect our constitutional and human rights. But we must keep protesting—it’s one of the most patriotic and American things we can do. Keep it up! With you in the fight, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Ollie (Chris' dog!)
subject: Ruff news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251115-816&t=1&akid=820%2E294397%2ECsyhaP)
Hi, it's Ollie!!
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251115_1_ak.GSuclw&amount=10&refcode=em20251115-816&t=3&akid=820%2E294397%2ECsyhaP)
I’m Judge Chris Taylor’s dog _and_ the campaign’s unofficial treat inspector. 🦴
Did you know the Wisconsin Supreme Court election isn’t next November, it’s actually in April? It’s coming up fast.
And this one’s really important, because the next justice will help decide the future of Wisconsin.
My 100% _unbiased_ opinion is that my mom is the best candidate for the position! She’s always believed in giving everyone a fair shot — whether it’s making sure every person is treated fairly in court or giving me a chance to chase one more tennis ball before bedtime. 🎾
**But here’s the ruff part:** Right-wing special interests are already gearing up to try and buy this seat. To protect our court and stop them, we’ve got to build up our campaign’s treat jar _now,_ not later.
[**So if you can, will you chip in $10 to help elect my mom, Judge Chris Taylor, to the Wisconsin Supreme Court?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251115_1_ak.GSuclw&amount=10&refcode=em20251115-816&t=4&akid=820%2E294397%2ECsyhaP)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251115_1_ak.GSuclw&amount=10&refcode=em20251115-816&t=23&akid=820%2E294397%2ECsyhaP)**
Thank you!
Tail wags,
Ollie 🐾
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251115-816&t=24&refcode2=820_294397_CsyhaP&akid=820%2E294397%2ECsyhaP)**

name: LaMonica McIver
subject: The Trump administration is trying to intimidate me. It won’t work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friend —
My legal battle against the Trump administration continues.
The court just denied my motions to dismiss these baseless charges. This decision is disappointing, but my case is not over and I will keep fighting.
From the start, it has been clear: The Trump administration is trying to intimidate me, go after me for doing my job and drain me of my resources. They’ve made it clear they want to see this through, and because of their meritless charges, I’m facing up to 17 years in prison. I worry this decision will only embolden Trump more.
As we look at what next steps we should take to win against Trump and his cruel administration in court, I need your help. Will you split a donation between me and Sara Jacobs TODAY to boost my legal defense? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
My case is precedent-setting. It will shape the future of our democracy. These charges are an intimidation tactic, but it won’t work. While the judge’s decision this week is not what we had hoped, it is only one step. I will continue to stand tall and do the work the people elected me to do, and we will see the Trump administration in court.
Will you stand with me and Sara Jacobs ? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split evenly between LaMonica McIver and Sara Jacobs:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
The Trump administration wants to punish political opponents and anyone who speaks up, silence dissent, drain me of my resources with an expensive legal battle, and put me in prison for up to 17 years. I am being targeted for doing my oversight work at an ICE facility earlier this year.
Even in the face of all this, I will not stop fighting—but I can’t do it alone. Chip in today to help us amass the resources to beat these baseless charges and win against the Trump administration. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
They want to make an example out of me, but I refuse to back down. I am not in this fight only for myself—I am in this for our community and our country. I need you by my side.
LaMonica McIver

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: ICYMI: I’m endorsing Abdul El-Sayed for U.S. Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

In case you missed it, I’m endorsing Dr. Abdul El-Sayed for Michigan’s
open U.S. Senate seat. He’s running to build a government that actually
works for working people, not corporations or would-be oligarchs.

Abdul is the only candidate in the race who’s never taken a dime from
corporate PACs, and who has never pandered to pro-genocide groups like
AIPAC. [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251115-1-ak.YQWpqt&amount=10&refcode=em20251115-1289&t=1004&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r ]Could you split a donation to power his grassroots campaign
today?

While Abdul will focus on protecting human rights, he’s running against
one of the nation’s top recipients of AIPAC donations. So he’s up against
obscene amounts of money from AIPAC and corporate PACs that are trying to
buy another seat in Congress.

Abdul is also the only candidate in the race who’s fighting for Medicare
for All. He won't waver on access to health care for all. Like me, Abdul
is also focused on ending medical debt. No one should be punished for
getting sick.

As a two-time public health official, he created programs that eliminated
$700 million in medical debt for 300,000 people, removed lead from
Detroit’s elementary schools, secured free glasses for tens of thousands
of kids, and made life-saving Narcan universally accessible. Last weekend,
I joined his town hall to talk about navigating and fixing our broken
healthcare system.

[ Abdul ]Abdul and Rashida at the town hall

Together in Congress, we’ll fight for the bold changes that families need
in order to thrive.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251115-1-ak.YQWpqt&amount=10&refcode=em20251115-1289&t=1005&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r ]Please join me in helping Abdul El-Sayed overcome AIPAC spending to
become the first Muslim and first Arab American U.S. Senator by splitting
a $10 donation between our campaigns today.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251115-1-ak.YQWpqt&amount=10&refcode=em20251115-1289&t=1024&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r ]Split a donation ››

Back in 2018, Abdul and I were arrested while protesting with fast food
workers to raise the minimum wage and strengthen the right to form unions.
Abdul is running because it shouldn’t be this hard in the richest country
on Earth to afford groceries, see a doctor, or believe our kids will have
it better than us.

Abdul and I also share a history of holding corporate polluters
accountable and cleaning up our air and water. Here’s us together at a
2023 panel about environmental justice:

[ Abdul ]Abdul and Rashida at the panel

Born and raised in Michigan, Abdul will be the first Muslim and the first
Arab American in the U.S. Senate if he wins.

With all the racist, Islamophobic attacks from Democrats and Republicans
against Zohran Mamdani, it’s clear we need more Muslims in federal office
to represent all Americans—and show that we belong here, including in the
halls of power.

As we saw with Zohran’s win earlier this month, we can overcome
billionaire interference in our democracy if we join together and demand
transformative change.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251115-1-ak.YQWpqt&amount=10&refcode=em20251115-1289&t=1025&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r ]Let’s help elect a deeply progressive Arab American and Muslim U.S.
Senator. Abdul El-Sayed and I will never take money from corporate PACs,
so every grassroots donation counts >>

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251115-1-ak.YQWpqt&amount=10&refcode=em20251115-1289&t=1026&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r ]Split a donation ››

Thank you so much. In endorsing Abdul, I’m joining U.S. Senator Bernie
Sanders, who will fight alongside Abdul in the Senate for Medicare for All
and an arms embargo on Israel.

Our fight is only beginning, and there’s so much progress ahead. With you
in the fight for better,

Rashida

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1027&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1028&akid=1297%2E251025%2EQffN9r

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

body:
| While Republicans do everything in their power to rip away healthcare from millions of Americans, Tammy is fighting back.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5103%2E35263%2Euo0cex)
Team — Our mid-quarter fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, and here's why Tammy is counting on your support: **While Republicans do everything in their power to rip away healthcare from millions of Americans, Tammy is fighting back.** This week, Tammy stood up and voted NO on Republicans' “deal” that would kick the can down the road on finding a solution to prevent Wisconsinites' healthcare premiums from skyrocketing. And when their government funding bill passed anyway, Tammy went straight to the Senate floor to force a vote to add her amendment to the government funding bill to lower health care costs. **Tammy’s not backing down from the fight to defend working people’s healthcare.** She is standing up and speaking out against Trump and the GOP's disastrous agenda that rips healthcare and food assistance away from working Americans while the wealthiest few get tax breaks. **[Will you chip in to help us reach our goal before 11:59 PM tonight? clean_body: | While Republicans do everything in their power to rip away healthcare from millions of Americans, Tammy is fighting back. Team — Our mid-quarter fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, and here's why Tammy is counting on your support: While Republicans do everything in their power to rip away healthcare from millions of Americans, Tammy is fighting back. This week, Tammy stood up and voted NO on Republicans' “deal” that would kick the can down the road on finding a solution to prevent Wisconsinites' healthcare premiums from skyrocketing. And when their government funding bill passed anyway, Tammy went straight to the Senate floor to force a vote to add her amendment to the government funding bill to lower health care costs. Tammy’s not backing down from the fight to defend working people’s healthcare. She is standing up and speaking out against Trump and the GOP's disastrous agenda that rips healthcare and food assistance away from working Americans while the wealthiest few get tax breaks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks, Baldwin HQ P.O. I will never take your sacrifice for granted.

But I want to cut through the noise for a moment.
[I’d like to tell you a quick story.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0a038a24e535483b8693ce1425f22ad8&_e=b_H5K0zaXq_vkXF5ihUPtgGUxydagxSH-ZMZgijkc6kpG_3CGKWg8nkryQfd0k_La9TSs9HmB3aSaR_eDvgZVXoM0YNXCOfMmqj2BjriLsgt4x8gzCuc1jPtH56reakDrH4Sx3VuZLMjeSNIigeFt9mewAywtGjurtRO82rR1TfDpN5HagOkkAzTGaMXP5Bu8IQ9uqrmLUQ8OE7thXVdsA_X-I74On2eNzm6x9U8Qx2BN6PjP4Cw-zPHjI6Bn4SSvw7mUltrOOLLB37FES3O-ZB0lKKBCNaLFG23XofzGHvmcZnS2voYl7JGFkscyIiPZT1gZst7NiGHce0GZi8Vjd47jCVSgTdAEyydl6kcPZ6Os21d3vwX4saB-DBSAzKFz4vihGGvWisjAmiMKumXUfvTXMnxA4K-n73672ky28KYljSwsTWlbk_GWgwf0mt-jawHFSefkOQAA_i4Hh9JHoLo1GrhukMvC0PkuEkszhGf83KDMMnV-E4ThjWBc3Qwb2guMjKwzFmOSP5Ddty2msTmB4eDWj226rsvhbSfbCZEVQevNg4okjMEtbzlru4a0aa1ynFpy4vG957zNpC88aOtsV8WynmkO2ROGVw2t84RjWWo6cXmz7lT4ZGKGjBZEkjx8Csdl6HVc63DNhoCRLXkElnKKIA2M3gwuueARROkpzY2KVtiVB3fJ85BGXKoPIcRY_yKAsNCgzt-L_6FNlx1E0m_Abnvmxgn-zLQHkoMI_j538pR35xkKn57eSTmNhpFHC0kt4g6p7F0I_bVfANkSoMunJUoTWDQbGG_aidgL8J0KziFxdQUbQuXSCH3jPcvu7Gwe0kJyJ_LBe4s4h0amJYOc7173S4i4JBw20U2IpozuobjOF5DCEgU4qztndYhVpNbS6rlC0i_ShwBq1ui6hkwlEa5tPdHGQrCpQQ%3D)
I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice.[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0a038a24e535483b8693ce1425f22ad8&_e=b_H5K0zaXq_vkXF5ihUPtgGUxydagxSH-ZMZgijkc6kpG_3CGKWg8nkryQfd0k_La9TSs9HmB3aSaR_eDvgZVXoM0YNXCOfMmqj2BjriLsgt4x8gzCuc1jPtH56reakDrH4Sx3VuZLMjeSNIigeFt9mewAywtGjurtRO82rR1TfDpN5HagOkkAzTGaMXP5Bu8IQ9uqrmLUQ8OE7thXVdsA_X-I74On2eNzm6x9U8Qx2BN6PjP4Cw-zPHjI6Bn4SSvw7mUltrOOLLB37FES3O-ZB0lKKBCNaLFG23XofzGHvmcZnS2voYl7JGFkscyIiPZT1gZst7NiGHce0GZi8Vjd47jCVSgTdAEyydl6kcPZ5-t0fYzNVZpwIIBbA9slULSJ_2nm5aY1L4ObeOc0p5SSQIkwTrkzMK6-8vEGSFbXt4MpUn0msYYT2TK5HiCJsH7WrbFgk6BvNv6Qs4chAdpYlICEhRI-fGPu2EG7S2csQkP0-mz3-8jnMblcTmtxhCjAirPjhzhTzyWtLofiAfoWR70RkFqQZi3kjhnP5TTMIpQ8yKnAgfZqS3eZbuI97eD0GzVNLc25Nrc9OsmSZWkWLouo7IlLsFoLCcZ82UQbD9osn-_x35BSvJCF5vmyMlUiFWdZvpmBvpMwS2rB3E5NEzImXaWZldm6W3dRIlR2RLg0jTZNpTLuCYFbahbZT-JPokieuCA21EtSbJGmx6kQqnEhriqyu1pqMuu-PgI9W0wR3-Q9GM3escFLOpwiEnDPouSrPnSd1r8glEiiWLqFxS_BzYXoMpupwEMsYuG1Mp3kHj91zqSpZuD8lGs8uT9I9o_XQK_UzQNlmzXiS5fGDWOdyc0taMethIzQ3i3QL8DbMiX5SO9zWHgJ5aDQecxJHa9nnBpLd0lLTEHb7KGOfYM0c_iEAfI0Gh5OFFYbk%3D)That's why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." **
**It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. **
**So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: **
**[THANK YOU, Fellow American!](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0a038a24e535483b8693ce1425f22ad8&_e=b_H5K0zaXq_vkXF5ihUPtgGUxydagxSH-ZMZgijkc6kpG_3CGKWg8nkryQfd0k_La9TSs9HmB3aSaR_eDvgZVXoM0YNXCOfMmqj2BjriLsgt4x8gzCuc1jPtH56reakDrH4Sx3VuZLMjeSNIigeFt9mewAywtGjurtRO82rR1TfDpN5HagOkkAzTGaMXP5Bu8IQ9uqrmLUQ8OE7thXVdsA_X-I74On2eNzm6x9U8Qx2BN6PjP4Cw-zPHjI6Bn4SSvw7mUltrOOLLB37FES3O-ZB0lKKBCNaLFG23XofzGHvmcZnS2voYl7JGFkscyIiPZT1gZst7NiGHce0GZi8Vjd47jCVSgTdAEyydl6kcPZ5-_zAy4YD4Gx6dl0tQzuM8l4lcCIXV0fpUDn8M-CbvnodlOWVwZ1J9Ul1AI0VEvpGV3TLAkpPPfem45DXwVUJq2ITcIOppdLuiCWFa9QOjWEOahuEx8QuZEcDc7cx9pnvCU8ekKdW7T4DFdeuq2z2F4CJXZSYH-GecmMJV6DziU_m7kFByd8GVJ7MCP7uyhKmegiMfzHF6S2iM83mF0GW0yXZHgdHMaurhkhJaTb9fjs22It5h0DlyBKaCVn8C4OWj7gijgVJv7qNcuepLnNvpuUyQOnyj-fGZ5YbodMFkAX8Qo4Fn80E1d6GxlBFvTJYeGuY7cnrUvnu2eqpwNkfevNk2xThqaXFQc3LE3Oj_KXfzHtzRK2jYE8bR0sFzFs17lDsyShV2Ya5qEeT7x5Y7oxk2islpEnerroRUGEyPNOA8Cl7iRWTZhuOlH7e5TrBj0Mqn7DEGVKXuIxY66fh84nESEb4J7GanFGFWVszX87iIDZx4DnkVbPM58M5BALoQF9iOGK_V79OhvavAfCnerqZQPB9jjLTRAqVbYhdOg9gaUKAjaW8uTtEd4M_q6k8%3D)**
**We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country.**
**I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were[ ONE ELECTION AWAY](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0a038a24e535483b8693ce1425f22ad8&_e=b_H5K0zaXq_vkXF5ihUPtgGUxydagxSH-ZMZgijkc6kpG_3CGKWg8nkryQfd0k_La9TSs9HmB3aSaR_eDvgZVXoM0YNXCOfMmqj2BjriLsgt4x8gzCuc1jPtH56reakDrH4Sx3VuZLMjeSNIigeFt9mewAywtGjurtRO82rR1TfDpN5HagOkkAzTGaMXP5Bu8IQ9uqrmLUQ8OE7thXVdsA_X-I74On2eNzm6x9U8Qx2BN6PjP4Cw-zPHjI6Bn4SSvw7mUltrOOLLB37FES3O-ZB0lKKBCNaLFG23XofzGHvmcZnS2voYl7JGFkscyIiPZT1gZst7NiGHce0GZi8Vjd47jCVSgTdAEyydl6kcPZ4XXp5u4le2Aj-KgdiAhs9hvQ4Zamqn7xrVmCSL9ScsyMqzG8kV_H1C5L7IrobyWvArH2r-TMB57hnlSpxkA_742p6rOuWsyHmND1V7qcdOg5NEF6d7AodPZhlRBkdDzlYTyLhM1N11bIUzKjlpX4CDpkS3wojv4vOzfCnmCnTURkndAqK4OSk2r_DMQ8ziry_4odKF4SWj1ZLNdVUzGG3bOJuXk2I2C8EbFBUGcS-wZjKV8vADPUSlnou1-v0j3RPSngPZZFtvp4LEF1dnKyIRwmg2o5fScRiXwkMm1P9nX3kniOqDzEHvV_-wXB2HJfkMYpLZvK_AjDHS0yQdfrKeViiaJOT4iWV0fr1D-rpPoEBgzXH4Q7fMzZy9WJU5jyHpfavbDvcoc0tFhzZmRskte7SATRr10sBuvSzGd1iN1s2UOBKYQwllWO08qQDpMRlJIWfsn1RiRfhrHwZrTe0Q93ZSCkNO6ch3u1A0dkS82Ft-18y-yV1f6Fi1m-EIiGjpox60QWxt1_ceGEeZmecL942E3JCrLkDJm6pclcUn3Pq0xhdaz2w7uNIeq0atWSc%3D) from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore.**
**President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. **
**That 's why this race means so much. **
**So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. **
**And if you haven 't given yet - [and you’re able to spare even $1 today](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0a038a24e535483b8693ce1425f22ad8&_e=b_H5K0zaXq_vkXF5ihUPtgGUxydagxSH-ZMZgijkc6kpG_3CGKWg8nkryQfd0k_La9TSs9HmB3aSaR_eDvgZVXoM0YNXCOfMmqj2BjriLsgt4x8gzCuc1jPtH56reakDrH4Sx3VuZLMjeSNIigeFt9mewAywtGjurtRO82rR1TfDpN5HagOkkAzTGaMXP5Bu8IQ9uqrmLUQ8OE7thXVdsA_X-I74On2eNzm6x9U8Qx2BN6PjP4Cw-zPHjI6Bn4SSvw7mUltrOOLLB37FES3O-ZB0lKKBCNaLFG23XofzGHvmcZnS2voYl7JGFkscyIiPZT1gZst7NiGHce0GZi8Vjd47jCVSgTdAEyydl6kcPZ5aROYbDSumF-wY5Eqx4xfxXeLAmmOYRuh1V1yJSWVQQViKsOXq9Yq7tlO9LRmzhQxur3_l74qBUL0aqOsoEMfyhjYrXNKRo0I4AEBGHXDGL361ltydlxvJ5HGHvY7nHLEUB3aqO3ROow51coiOVyDH4XGpeB4KWDUH9oC12heNavO0tGVQ9a3U8BhKsQSuWBu1zIGtPFYSO2qP6bGtXXDV0NBvyu0XSLpgXZefMqDCsFrwU6Y8iGnmWiaW_pacowY0WYesIKcCoZjkSOj2v2zL62ypPfV1Dp8Y-ZdcyDHbwVjQ1iiYoLpoNvb54QXFk6y8whpu6e2LENsh-Tp_IpRWOEFmhjXVZD8225vWH8CuSwigehv6RraRRkdQFjy-5iHh-yK3XBPdV08AkrrSzfNPwSiWdB_EXAPOgI6Ilp_HsRu7RNaesnkHgKzhlqGV2gYhfpfhnnblrF7GfOW-EMNc1wqJx0jONraf97DthfkGtAJu1gaYpya6BeNfi4WnG2wxoANTf1C4B1tzc4UimI9yviJ2khJBbwuaGJUBtlBnonvWZt0XdY7LVfdcCfr3gMc%3D) - I'd be honored to have you on my team.
