Instead of making it harder to vote and harder to have your voice heard, our elected leaders should be making sure everyone has an equal opportunity to participate in our democracy.
**But if they don’t, we will.**
And grassroots donors power our work to prevent or mitigate voter suppression and ensure free and fair elections.
Through targeted, culturally competent outreach and education, we help make sure voters have the information they need to cast their ballots.
We mobilize advocates and work alongside partners to stop anti-voter legislation from passing.
And we have to turbo-charge our work to defend free and fair elections now that the Supreme Court’s conservative super-majority seems poised to:
* Overturn Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act
* Gut congressional representation for communities of color
* Let states gerrymander 19 House districts in favor of the GOP

clean_body: We’ve almost matched 2021’s record, and not in a good way. | | | Team, the year isn't over yet, but 2025 is already close to hitting a shameful milestone. You see, for the past 14 years, the Brennan Center has been tracking changes to state voting laws. In 2021, more states passed legislation restricting access to the ballot than in any other year of the Brennan Center’s tallying. And 2025 has almost matched that record-breaking year. As of early October, 16 states had put 29 new restrictive voting laws on the books this year, just short of the 17 states that had passed 32 similar laws in 2021. After the 2020 elections, conservative lawmakers were fanning the flames of election-denial conspiracy theories. Now, they’re part of a sweeping effort to install autocracy and end democracy as we know it. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Instead of making it harder to vote and harder to have your voice heard, our elected leaders should be making sure everyone has an equal opportunity to participate in our democracy. But if they don’t, we will. And grassroots donors power our work to prevent or mitigate voter suppression and ensure free and fair elections. Through targeted, culturally competent outreach and education, we help make sure voters have the information they need to cast their ballots. We mobilize advocates and work alongside partners to stop anti-voter legislation from passing. And we have to turbo-charge our work to defend free and fair elections now that the Supreme Court’s conservative super-majority seems poised to: Overturn Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act Gut congressional representation for communities of color Let states gerrymander 19 House districts in favor of the GOP = In solidarity, Fair Fight Action = = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. # **[Admin Cracks Down on Controversial Groups Abroad](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
In a sweeping escalation of the Trump administration’s ongoing effort to confront Antifa‐linked extremism, the State Department on Thursday formally designated four radical leftist groups in Europe as Foreign Terrorist Organizations (FTOs)—a move that significantly expands U.S. authorities’ reach over transnational far‐left militancy.

I know there’s a lot of chaos coming out of Washington right now — and trust me, it’s not an accident. The attacks on our rights, the endless political stunts, and the bad-faith policymaking are all meant to divide and distract us.
**Here in Michigan, we’re doing everything we can to hold the line.** We’ve protected reproductive freedom and expanded workers’ rights. We are fixing the damn roads and are fighting for every family in our great state.
But we can’t stop there. We need to do more to push progress forward, and I’m counting on you to help us do that.
**We’re working to recruit and elect the next generation of leaders who will stand up for our fundamental rights and build an economy that puts working people first.**
We’re going beyond defending the progress we’ve made, because every person in this country deserves leaders who will fight like hell for them.
**[That’s why I’m so adamant about the work we do, and why I’m hoping you’ll make a contribution to Fight Like Hell PAC before our mid-quarter fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. clean_body: Will you pitch in before our midnight deadline? | Team, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to commit to a grassroots donation to Fight Like Hell PAC before our midnight fundraising deadline.= If you need more convincing, please read on. | | = I know there’s a lot of chaos coming out of Washington right now — and trust me, it’s not an accident. The attacks on our rights, the endless political stunts, and the bad-faith policymaking are all meant to divide and distract us. Here in Michigan, we’re doing everything we can to hold the line. We’ve protected reproductive freedom and expanded workers’ rights. We are fixing the damn roads and are fighting for every family in our great state. But we can’t stop there. We need to do more to push progress forward, and I’m counting on you to help us do that. We’re working to recruit and elect the next generation of leaders who will stand up for our fundamental rights and build an economy that puts working people first. We’re going beyond defending the progress we’ve made, because every person in this country deserves leaders who will fight like hell for them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I’m proud of what we’ve done in Michigan. Together, we’ll take this fight nationwide. Thank you, — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. name: David Hogg
subject: It’s not about progressive vs. moderate.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Different ideologies. Same lessons. One (really) big tent — and one clear strategy.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251115-1-a&t=1&akid=2841%2E587540%2EVvi_g-)
Hi Peter. David here.
I don’t know about you, but I’ve seen _a lot_ of bad takes about last week’s election.
The pundits, the podcasters, and everyone with a ring light and a Patreon debating whether Democrats should move to the left or the right — they’re making this election _way_ more complicated than it actually was.
But before I get to what Tuesday really showed us, I need your help first. **Our mid-month fundraising deadline hits at midnight, and we’re not where we need to be.** If we want to build on the wins we just saw and prove that young progressives winning is the future, not an anomaly, we need to close this gap.
**[Can you chip in now to help us hit our goal before midnight?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251115_1_mm_leftright.t7fsSj&refcode=em20251115-2841-a&amount=5&t=3&akid=2841%2E587540%2EVvi_g-)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251115_1_mm_leftright.t7fsSj&amount=5&refcode=em20251115-2841-a&t=4&akid=2841%2E587540%2EVvi_g-)**
Here’s what last week’s election _actually_ showed us:
**Voters reward candidates who listen, speak clearly about affordability, and offer specific solutions — not empty talking points.**
The candidates who followed that playbook won, regardless of ideology:
* **Zohran Mamdani,** a democratic socialist, won the NYC mayoral race.
* **Abigail Spanberger** and **Mikie Sherrill,** two moderates, won their races for governor in Virginia and New Jersey.
* Democrats of every stripe racked up local and state wins in **Georgia, Pennsylvania, Texas, Mississippi,** and more.

**Different ideologies. Same tactics. One big tent — and one clear strategy**
The takeaway from this election isn’t to “go left” or “go centrist.”
It’s to _go where the people are._ Show up, listen, and offer real solutions.
And in many ways, it’s about doing the opposite of what national Democrats did in 2024. We can’t spew meaningless talking points or tell voters to ignore what they’re living every day. We need to talk honestly about health care, housing, groceries, and everything else making life way too expensive.
And there’s one more lesson worth talking about:
**When we trust young people to lead, they deliver.** It’s not the disaster the establishment says it will be. Young candidates know how to communicate clearly, organize aggressively, and inspire new voters who have felt ignored for years. We know this because they already have the cards stacked against them, so to win they have to have their act together way more than other candidates. They aren’t _“too bold”_ or _“too young”_ — they’re exactly bold and young enough AND they have the lived experience that many elected officials can only pretend to know, like facing a job market where there are few entry-level jobs because of the proliferation of AI.
Now we have to carry these lessons forward into the 2026 midterms and two crucial upcoming runoffs for LWD-backed candidates in Atlanta and Houston. We have a narrow window to build on this momentum before the narrative shifts and the same old voices try to rewrite what last week proved.
**[Ready for the next big win? Please chip in $5 or anything else before midnight to help us hit our goal and keep our movement moving forward.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251115_1_mm_leftright.t7fsSj&refcode=em20251115-2841-a&amount=5&t=5&akid=2841%2E587540%2EVvi_g-)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251115_1_mm_leftright.t7fsSj&amount=5&refcode=em20251115-2841-a&t=24&akid=2841%2E587540%2EVvi_g-)**
Last Tuesday proved **young leaders aren’t the future — they’re the _present._** We’re not waiting our turn anymore. We’re here now. And we’re winning.
Thanks for helping keep this momentum alive, Peter.
— David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251115-1-a&t=25&refcode2=2841_587540_Vvi_g-&akid=2841%2E587540%2EVvi_g-)**

clean_body: | Please read the message below from Turning Point USA. Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom. | | | Friend, We are Charlie Kirk. That's the rally cry of millions of Americans — and the message they carry with their "We are Charlie Kirk" wristbands. We want you to have one. To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on. This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction. Of courage. Of the movement Charlie built. When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited. Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you. Friend, Charlie stood fearlessly for truth, freedom, and the next generation. Now it's our turn. Tell the world: You're unafraid to stand with Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA to save America. Make your first gift today and claim your wristband as a symbol of the mission you've joined. name: George Whitesides
subject: A few things for Peter
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119360799/582799627/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzkyMTVhYi01ZGMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLr4RDhT78Ge7GvyP1G-r7p8tZ49MKIfaWW-4m2QZQU=)
Peter,

After the historically-long government shutdown ended without a shred of hope of ending the affordability and healthcare crises, it’s never been more urgent to flip the House majority.

It starts with keeping my seat in CA-27 blue. Here are a few updates on our progress in my first re-election race:
* **We already have multiple Republican challengers who are rallying the national GOP to turn this seat back to red.** As one of the only Democrats to flip a district in 2024 and a “Frontline” at-risk incumbent, I’ve been a target of baseless attacks – and we expect outside spending to increase in the new year.

* **Thousands of new voters are being folded into CA-27 with Prop 50’s passage** , most of whom haven’t heard of me or what I stand for – our voter outreach efforts will be absolutely critical in the next few months. This was a huge win for combatting GOP gerrymandering, but it’s also an unprecedented moment in our race.

* **Despite the new maps, my district is still listed by the election experts at _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ as one of the most competitive in the nation.** We can’t afford to let our guard down for even a second – especially with the chaos in Congress proving the GOP can’t lead.

**[So, I have to ask: Will you chip in $3 or any amount before our mid-quarter fundraising deadline to boost our voter outreach and protect this seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119360807/582799632/148511826?refcode=em-11.15.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzkyMTVhYi01ZGMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLr4RDhT78Ge7GvyP1G-r7p8tZ49MKIfaWW-4m2QZQU=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, After the historically-long government shutdown ended without a shred of hope of ending the affordability and healthcare crises, it’s never been more urgent to flip the House majority. It starts with keeping my seat in CA-27 blue. Here are a few updates on our progress in my first re-election race: We already have multiple Republican challengers who are rallying the national GOP to turn this seat back to red. As one of the only Democrats to flip a district in 2024 and a “Frontline” at-risk incumbent, I’ve been a target of baseless attacks – and we expect outside spending to increase in the new year. Thousands of new voters are being folded into CA-27 with Prop 50’s passage , most of whom haven’t heard of me or what I stand for – our voter outreach efforts will be absolutely critical in the next few months. This was a huge win for combatting GOP gerrymandering, but it’s also an unprecedented moment in our race. Despite the new maps, my district is still listed by the election experts at Sabato’s Crystal Ball as one of the most competitive in the nation. We can’t afford to let our guard down for even a second – especially with the chaos in Congress proving the GOP can’t lead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The vital signs of our economy are blinking red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The facts speak for themselves

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2706%2E4032634%2EP3i248)
---
**_Fox News: “Why are people saying they’re anxious about the economy?”
Trump: “I don’t know that they are saying that. I think polls are fake. We have the greatest economy we’ve ever had.”_**
Donald Trump is living in La La Land while American families are living in the painful reality of his economy. He is trying to gaslight Americans into thinking the economy is doing great. But the facts speak for themselves and show that Trump and the Republicans’ failed policies have pushed American families to the brink of financial crisis:
* More than half of employed Americans are worried about losing their jobs.
* The cost of everyday essentials — from the cup of coffee you drink in the morning to the produce you cook for dinner — is skyrocketing thanks to Trump’s chaotic tariffs, which now encompass almost half of all imports. And Americans are feeling it: 62% of them say everyday items have gotten more expensive in the last month.
* Families are paying an average of $100 extra for electricity this year.
* Google searches for “help with mortgage” have shot up to the highest level since the 2008 housing crisis.
* Cars are getting repossessed at a rapid rate as more and more Americans default on their car loans.
* Americans are getting notices in their mailboxes detailing how their healthcare premiums are about to double, triple, or even quadruple because Republicans refused to extend Affordable Care Act subsidies for millions of people.

Meanwhile, the wealthy have never been doing better:
* Billionaires got $2 trillion richer last year — accumulating wealth at a staggering three times faster than the year before.
* The top 10% of Americans now account for more than half of consumer spending — the highest share since we started recording this data.
* More and more people are buying first-class and business tickets, while ticket sales for the main cabin are going down. For the first time ever, Delta expects more of their revenue to come from first- and business-class tickets than from main cabin tickets.

This is why so many Americans feel like our economy is rigged, and they’re not wrong. The rich are getting even richer while everyone else struggles to get by. Even the _Wall Street Journal_ admitted that the only Americans feeling great about this economy are investors who own a lot of stock — and that it’s not feeling so great for everybody else. And how are Trump and the Republicans responding? By shoveling even more wealth into the pockets of billionaires and wealthy corporations that bankrolled Trump’s campaign, and ripping away lifelines like Medicaid, SNAP benefits, and Affordable Care Act subsidies from people. Then Trump gets on Fox News to gaslight Americans into thinking the economy is doing just fine. **It could not be clearer: Trump’s economy is crushing working people. I’m raising the alarm about these blinking red vital signs — and I’m going to keep countering Trump’s lies about his economy with the facts. One way you can help is to share your story with me.** [**How have you been impacted by Trump’s economy? What concerns are keeping you up at night? Is there a “vital sign” of your financial health you’re worried about?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-trumps-economy/?source=EMZ28K_ENG_E_20251115_V1S1&t=8&akid=2706%2E4032634%2EP3i248) | [**SHARE**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-trumps-economy/?source=EMZ28K_ENG_E_20251115_V1S1&t=9&akid=2706%2E4032634%2EP3i248)
---
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

---

---

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

**Behind the Markets**
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on. This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction. Of courage. Of the movement Charlie built. When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited. Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you. Friend, Charlie stood fearlessly for truth, freedom, and the next generation. Now it's our turn. Tell the world: You're unafraid to stand with Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA to save America. Make your first gift today and claim your wristband as a symbol of the mission you've joined. name: Luke Oberholtzer
subject: ICE tear-gassed Bushra and hit her with a car
body:
ICE responded to our protest with violent escalation— ramming protestors with their cars, beating people up, and firing tear gas into the crowd. Bushra was one of the people hit.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gCfTmwiK4La0SoNV6gYjrXe52Opc6umgfF-wUYWIEVhaoI4HHuYzcGhJw5glz2wDhgxocrilbe5uhs1yuCX9TW96t0Si4NBFfyLhEeiuimxcDptUxbWtd1OowtiIJNHF04oks2XQ7sBh7UIxnz1HGGfn_q1hltAoueLkJUjgu6v7_cSxjlYJV0byHRjYHpVUTsIN_WweezuBfsWEuyCOKLOMNWWEVtKG&c=hy2lz-MT2T2tWms_Szyi375gHnE3MQ4Rk9O2Ny41-iDXuKbifB6V8g==&ch=GOE4xrvZoYtstbVam7bM0mJeV2VSoC2w8KlLx7pZa6UgFzc95EE0Ag==)
---
|
Peter,
Bushra joined her neighbors at a peaceful protest against ICE at their Broadway facility in Chicago. Ever since Trump unleashed "Operation Midway Blitz" on Chicago, our city has become one of nations biggest flashpoints of resistance--and this day was no different.
I was on the ground when it happened. ICE responded to our protest with violent escalation-- ramming protestors with their cars, beating people up, and firing tear gas into the crowd. Bushra was one of the people hit.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gCfTmwiK4La0SoNV6gYjrXe52Opc6umgfF-wUYWIEVhaoI4HHuYzcGhJw5glz2wDhgxocrilbe5uhs1yuCX9TW96t0Si4NBFfyLhEeiuimxcDptUxbWtd1OowtiIJNHF04oks2XQ7sBh7UIxnz1HGGfn_q1hltAoueLkJUjgu6v7_cSxjlYJV0byHRjYHpVUTsIN_WweezsRogcIpfJqZRDoHtbNzu4p&c=hy2lz-MT2T2tWms_Szyi375gHnE3MQ4Rk9O2Ny41-iDXuKbifB6V8g==&ch=GOE4xrvZoYtstbVam7bM0mJeV2VSoC2w8KlLx7pZa6UgFzc95EE0Ag==)
---
| Scenes from the chaos. Bushra pictured at bottom left as the smoke hit her.
---
| Donald Trump is using ICE as his personal Gestapo--unleashing brute force on peaceful protesters while his fascist machine tightens its grip: the FCC bullying TV networks, Pam Bondi vowing to criminalize dissent as "hate speech," and the administration ordering the Joint Terrorism Task Force to investigate Americans for commonly held beliefs.
Fascism is here in America, right now.
Now more than ever, it is essential to elect leaders like Bushra--people who don't just repeat talking points, but take direct action. Leaders willing to stand on the front lines, even in the face of tear gas, to protect their communities.
We need to send Bushra to Congress so she can fight Trump's fascist agenda where it matters most. [Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to help her take this fight from the streets to the halls of Congress?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gCfTmwiK4La0SoNV6gYjrXe52Opc6umgfF-wUYWIEVhaoI4HHuYzcGhJw5glz2wDPmI8tHY6PU6P52ua_kMWPDbRt-e1gWYgFyh4yqT7p5Nbuw-iB1JQbW5WY6faDbPI_BdUKK_Bx_nHeUUM7sow7Y6uMJ4AvElvamu_CMhf662ptExCo8atliahPFHPemZo7ndBaeXWLEfSIhlvGSpio2gKzht_9OsLsv7v7fkbAUc=&c=hy2lz-MT2T2tWms_Szyi375gHnE3MQ4Rk9O2Ny41-iDXuKbifB6V8g==&ch=GOE4xrvZoYtstbVam7bM0mJeV2VSoC2w8KlLx7pZa6UgFzc95EE0Ag==)

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I wouldn’t have it any other way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Aloha Peter, We’re just a few hours away from tonight’s mid-quarter fundraising deadline, and I wanted to personally reach out to ask for your support. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but first, will you please chip in $10 or any amount to help me stand up to the Trump regime and support Democratic candidates all across the country so we can flip the Senate blue? **Here’s a personal link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mkh-em-nov25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119362380/582803548/-2048929197?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20251115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjVkYTdkNS02MmMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwBQnus8MzkvIKMkLb2NQzRDGZioxEqW_xBGFCDfTtQ=)** I’m proud that my campaign has always been fueled by our grassroots team — folks who chip in what they can, when they can, because they believe in the work I’m doing in the Senate to deliver for working families, protect our rights, stand up to Donald Trump, and fight for our _keiki_ , or children. Republicans see it differently. They’ll continue to give billionaires massive tax breaks so they can keep pouring millions of dollars into Republican campaigns. That’s why we must step up before every fundraising milestone, including tonight’s mid-quarter deadline. Democrats have a real shot at winning the Senate, but falling short of goals like this could put that work at risk. **[So Peter, will you chip in $10 or any amount you can afford before tonight’s mid-quarter fundraising deadline so I can support Democratic candidates across the country and continue fighting for our future?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119362382/582803549/-2048929197?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20251115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjVkYTdkNS02MmMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwBQnus8MzkvIKMkLb2NQzRDGZioxEqW_xBGFCDfTtQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119362383/582803550/-2048929197?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20251115_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjVkYTdkNS02MmMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uwBQnus8MzkvIKMkLb2NQzRDGZioxEqW_xBGFCDfTtQ=)**

clean_body: | Aloha Peter, We’re just a few hours away from tonight’s mid-quarter fundraising deadline, and I wanted to personally reach out to ask for your support. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but first, will you please chip in $10 or any amount to help me stand up to the Trump regime and support Democratic candidates all across the country so we can flip the Senate blue? Here’s a personal link to give:= I’m proud that my campaign has always been fueled by our grassroots team — folks who chip in what they can, when they can, because they believe in the work I’m doing in the Senate to deliver for working families, protect our rights, stand up to Donald Trump, and fight for our keiki , or children. Republicans see it differently. They’ll continue to give billionaires massive tax breaks so they can keep pouring millions of dollars into Republican campaigns. That’s why we must step up before every fundraising milestone, including tonight’s mid-quarter deadline. Democrats have a real shot at winning the Senate, but falling short of goals like this could put that work at risk. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for everything you do. name: Team Haley
subject: State of the Race Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Haley is the only Democrat in this race who has the polling, the coalition, and the momentum to win.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1355%2E49239%2EY0YwLC)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8713?t=2&akid=1355%2E49239%2EY0YwLC)
---
Null, it’s Team Haley.

Here are three critical things to know about the state of our battleground Senate race in Michigan:
1️⃣ **Recent polling shows Haley Stevens is statistically tied with MAGA Republican Mike Rogers.** That means this race is wide open.
2️⃣ **Haley had the strongest Q3 fundraising numbers of anyone in this primary – and she has the most cash on hand.** We’ve got the momentum, and the numbers are clear: Haley is the strongest Democrat to take on Trump-endorsed Mike Rogers.
3️⃣ **Democrats won BIG in this month’s elections across the country – from Virginia to New Jersey to Pennsylvania.** Voters are rejecting Trump’s chaos – and we can do the same here in Michigan. This is our shot to flip the Senate and stop the MAGA agenda.
But we won’t get there without your help.

Haley is the only Democrat in this race who has the polling, the coalition, and the momentum to win – but she’s up against GOP megadonors and millions in super PAC cash. That’s why our $175,000 mid-month fundraising goal is so critical.
**[If you’re ready to flip the Senate for Democrats and keep Michigan blue, will you chip in $5 now to power this grassroots campaign and help Haley win?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8798?t=3&akid=1355%2E49239%2EY0YwLC)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8715?t=4&akid=1355%2E49239%2EY0YwLC)

---
Thanks for being part of this team,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8800?t=8&akid=1355%2E49239%2EY0YwLC) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8713?t=9&akid=1355%2E49239%2EY0YwLC)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..qZDOr5g3TWZsstkFgg6Ju-rJQw5pnYeiZqhT5_kK2nY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=178614594)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/195d05e1-1c5f-4d83-808e-83cfc8763a80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hasan Piker, a far-left political commentator and streamer with over 4 million subscribers across both YouTube and Twitch, has emerged as one of the most prominent voices supporting Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani's campaign.
Piker has a long history of promoting anti-American and other extremist political rhetoric - he once **[infamously declared](https://substack.com/redirect/b724a3bf-1221-46d9-9b26-c013824c363b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , _" Kill them! Kill those motherf_**ers! Let the streets soak in their red-capitalist bloods, dude." His recent trip to China highlighted his ideological alignment with authoritarian communism: in Beijing's Tiananmen Square, he held a Chinese flag while proclaiming, _" I don't have any kind of patriotism in my heart for America."_ **[The stunt quickly backfired](https://substack.com/redirect/fb312121-847a-4f5e-abae-26ffd995dffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when his crew was detained, and their devices inspected for apparently displaying a Mao Zedong meme.
_**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**_
* * *
**[Together with NativePath](https://substack.com/redirect/a8e2c22d-396c-43ad-8f41-1bc1126b850a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **The Body 's Most Abundant Protein (That Most People Are Losing Fast)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a8e2c22d-396c-43ad-8f41-1bc1126b850a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Your body loses 1-2% of its collagen every year after 30--and it's the most abundant protein you've got. Translation? Less support for joints, skin, nails, and overall resilience.
NativePath Collagen helps you restore what time chips away--clean, grass-fed, no fillers, no junk. One study found that women taking just 5g a day saw meaningful improvements in bone support over a year. That's the power of consistent collagen intake.
Just mix two flavorless scoops into coffee or any drink for 18g of easy, high-quality protein that supports joints, mobility, digestion, and more.
**🔥 PolitiBrawl Exclusive: Get a special bundle deal for a fraction of retail--backed by a 365-Day Risk-Free Guarantee. [Click here while it's live.](https://substack.com/redirect/a8e2c22d-396c-43ad-8f41-1bc1126b850a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/a8e2c22d-396c-43ad-8f41-1bc1126b850a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
Piker's influence extends into U.S. politics through his vocal support of figures like Zohran Mamdani. Mamdani identifies as a democratic socialist, yet he has repeatedly echoed radical critiques of capitalism and support for centralized economies. When asked if he liked capitalism, **[Mamdani admitted,](https://substack.com/redirect/2b6cd1c1-b61f-4077-b0f1-e387d05e2bdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _" No. I have many critiques of capitalism. ... There must be a better distribution of wealth..."_ Meanwhile, Piker has **[openly framed communism as](https://substack.com/redirect/c6160e20-440d-499d-bcb7-593e76a3fd8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** _**["the final goal](https://substack.com/redirect/c6160e20-440d-499d-bcb7-593e76a3fd8d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ... a stateless, moneyless, classless society. A borderless society."_ Together, these statements suggest a push among radical leftists to reshape or even eradicate capitalism in America.
In August 2019, Hasan Piker made a controversial statement on his livestream, saying, _" America deserved 9/11, dude. F**k it, I'm saying it,"_ which sparked national criticism. In a campaign press release, Andrew Cuomo condemned this comment and emphasized his ties to 9/11 families, stating he "fought to secure benefits for 9/11 families" and framed his opponent's association with Piker as a point of concern to those families. **[Mamdani refused to condemn Piker](https://substack.com/redirect/18112bb0-028f-4089-b713-4aeb6a5ee0c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for the disgusting remarks.
During Mamdani's election party, Piker taunted Andrew Cuomo by saying, "What happened? I thought the 'Hasan loves 9/11' was a successful campaign strategy? What happened? Andrew Cuomo fuck you. Suck my d*ck, Andrew Cuomo."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4fa0174e-37f9-4b7f-b243-3a8f778403a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Piker's backing of Mamdani has been both public and vehement. In April of the campaign year, **[Mamdani appeared on Piker's platform](https://substack.com/redirect/8420bf51-c1b1-4719-bef1-5de86f06d59a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, telling his audience he was _" eternally grateful"_ to the candidate and asserting that a Mamdani victory would prove _" this kind of politics works."_ At Mamdani's victory celebration, Piker further declared: _" We are in the heart of the imperial core ... Everyday Americans ... are finally arriving at the conclusion that perhaps there is an alternative." _
The combined effect of radical influencers like Piker and politicians like Mamdani signals a significant ideological shift within the Democratic Party. With a communist-proximate agenda gaining traction in one of America's largest cities, the influence of political commentators and social media personalities is helping to expand and normalize far-left ideology among young voters who don't tune into more traditional forms of media like cable or print.

name: Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: Most of our opponents don't live here…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Hi Friend, it's Heidi.
After Prop 50 reshaped CA-03, I'm now one of the only candidates in this race that actually lives in our congressional district...
After backroom deals and seat switching, candidates in this race are actually running to represent a place they aren't even a part of and have no stake in.
Will you chip in to help me represent our home in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
I moved to Grass Valley to raise my two boys 20 years ago, and in that time I've noticed how our communities have been used by the very same type of people switching seats and running for office in a place they don't even live in so that they can grab a hold of political power and serve themselves.
Friend, I'm different. I'm in this race to represent the place I call home and stand up for our rural neighbors in Congress.
We deserve a leader who knows what we're going through and understands that we can't take half measures when it comes to affordable healthcare or fighting for working-class families— we need to be bold.
Will you help me flip this seat and fight for real change in Congress by donating what you can to our grassroots-powered campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Thank you,
Heidi Hall
Actual CA-03 resident
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251115_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

clean_body: Invest early in our efforts to flip the House in 2026 | As Republicans fail to deliver for the American people once again, it’s more important than ever that we act now to make sure we replace their failed leadership with a New Dem Majority next fall. = | = We’re committed to: Lowering costs – We’re standing firmly against Trump’s costly tariffs and billionaire tax breaks, schemes that are paid for by raiding the very federal programs hardworking Americans rely on. Supporting working families – We’re committed to protecting Social Security, Medicare, and the critical infrastructure programs that keep our communities strong. Passing pragmatic solutions – We’ll continue working across the aisle to create good-paying jobs, strengthen clean energy infrastructure, and champion legislation that delivers real results. Republicans cannot be allowed to keep holding the American people hostage, and it’s exactly why we must invest early in our efforts to flip the House in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = New Dems | | Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund www.newdemactionfund.com Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 910 17th St NW Suite 1050, Washington, DC 20006 In 2022, NewDems flipped more competitive seats from red-to-blue than any other ideological caucus. body:
This poll changes everything...
Peter,
Ever since the Democrats' government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign's fundraising.
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I've had my own salary withheld during the Democrats' senseless shutdown.
[But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will UPEND the 2026 elections. ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/kyJpB4JcfIL2MwrbuuDoZ9JrFapDF8f04sJ5iyE9K_Ub5JzY7fpSfAWDZ3hCplnoN-ntz6ntnJodODQVWzZezPeCSPG_O0ukJ2ndOd-xfF-G9pnXS0CY4m-HvJVsBgQXR9Q54tsmVFx97U6fRQKc028x-lVa9kFXmcmooXxLpvXgqgQLllwMHq5-rvI0wVMw3JxIQ1Z2GJYG1-XTh_6hmkK4s3IdQGITKdjzDV_PrrkmO16XkjXdBkZPiVjRREoD9rtd1jJizxR1Z4PmcHjsEyIrUVVU-aBsc9lxkg_aMCOK6TXwV-jCVU0icPm2Dzt08Guc6WLrAukQ5EDKiH2_RY9aFrxVkuG7anOXPtJuj3c3x21j7jWRoGhEsf0ppTnhP9EgdLAnhRM1D3pgQkO5DYhJBnx27tfyVVwdG4gBHQo1gQmFppZTbz9B4f3SDb5HJuAAQa0hddnpTBVsbxhcmpSzTyWklHB8sNdLfeZ3Qu1huFQSBEZatpvhXW8ylzUDIbTn0VK_TugXy_iiU0ZGwOKR249IYGzHZzvI2gA56fBTvBJRQaz1xwinqhdkB5l6n4L3aMAse7TK9SaPgR2JQPjiwLQWS8Ns5Q8sOI0CL5XPGTP9sZRb9vQ4jR0gXbOrMoi0krho1oOB4humppT5LTJCclpcD_A4op8Gi0r70cyz5XVDT4vW7FbZbJUVoZPCMB42HeRMWF59LeoWCGB1ndss-L-qFD3wvVWba9yNV_TPJuwk9fa3Ckh6tLiiGWFOK9uof4_TYG6eOP-llvMQIT5KeO6hnA3HlKsGCq2uRw/v2KpGOIwuYRm439nDPS9V6jeThOH7Eqr/14)

Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
There's no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She's even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country.

clean_body: This poll changes everything... Peter, Ever since the Democrats' government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign's fundraising. With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts. In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I've had my own salary withheld during the Democrats' senseless shutdown. Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum. There's no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She's even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country. And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory. ...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done. Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul? you,. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Markwayne Mullin
subject: Democrats have crowned their leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend, liberals have crowned the new leader of the Democrat Party:
Zohran Mamdani, the new socialist mayor of New York City.

And he’s not hiding his agenda:

“Dismantle” the police
“Abolish private property”
“Seize the means of production”

This is not a joke. This is what Democrats now stand for.

Radical socialism has left the fringe and is now running the Democrat
Party.

That’s why every day I fight so hard to deliver results for us. Because when working families here succeed, our state succeeds. But MAGA is doing everything they can to take back this seat and erase the progress we’ve made together. Last year, they almost did it. Trump even won my district. Now, dark money MAGA groups are already gearing up to invest heavily here. They want to buy this seat. Their strategy is clear: lies, division, and false promises. Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
Of all the things the Deep State did to me – _raiding my home, arresting me, holding me in the most violent jail in America, pushing me to the brink of bankruptcy..._
---
_...The worst thing they did was**DISBAR** me._
---
As the Bible says, earthly possessions will always fade, money comes and goes, but there are greater _priceless_ treasures.
---
_You see, I used my law license to defend the innocent, to take down bad guys, and to uphold our Constitution._
---
Truth be told, I didn’t make much money with my law license. But I _did_ make a difference. It was my legacy of justice – and it’s worth more than gold.
---
**_And the Left has STOLEN that from me._**
---
__Not only that, but I can no longer use my law license to defend myself from the Democrats’ lawfare.__
---
**Right now, I am facing a DEADLINE on 11/21 that will determine whether the Democrats’ last remaining RIGGED TRIAL against me proceeds or is thrown out for good!**
---
And because it’s in _state_ court, the President _cannot_ save me with a _federal_ pardon...
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, and no money for a top-notch legal defense team, I’m running out of options.**
---
**_BUT DEADLINE BE DAMNED, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM UNTIL THE VERY END!_**
---
_That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust._YOU_ truly are my final hope._
---

Of all the things the Deep State did to me – raiding my home, arresting me, holding me in the most violent jail in America, pushing me to the brink of bankruptcy... ...The worst thing they did wasDISBAR me. As the Bible says, earthly possessions will always fade, money comes and goes, but there are greater priceless treasures. You see, I used my law license to defend the innocent, to take down bad guys, and to uphold our Constitution. Truth be told, I didn’t make much money with my law license. But I did make a difference. It was my legacy of justice – and it’s worth more than gold. And the Left has STOLEN that from me. Not only that, but I can no longer use my law license to defend myself from the Democrats’ lawfare. Right now, I am facing a DEADLINE on 11/21 that will determine whether the Democrats’ last remaining RIGGED TRIAL against me proceeds or is thrown out for good! And because it’s in state court, the President cannot save me with a federal pardon... Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, and no money for a top-notch legal defense team, I’m running out of options. BUT DEADLINE BE DAMNED, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM UNTIL THE VERY END! That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.YOU truly are my final hope. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

subject: NEVER SURRENDER
body:

| VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS!
---

|
---

---
| Patriots, THANK YOU for your tremendous support and generosity during my House of Delegates campaign. I am honored to have been elected to represent James Madison's district and stand strong for conservatives across the Commonwealth who feel underrepresented. I am eager to fight for the things I campaigned on, and will work tirelessly to help true Conservatives regain a majority in Virginia. But Tuesday of last week brought little else to be excited about. In truth, the elections dealt a devastating blow for Virginia and revealed systemic problems within the Republican Party of Virginia that must be addressed if we hope to climb out of this deep pit. We lost races by almost double of what even the worst polling numbers predicted. We can blame troublesome federal policies, the government shutdown, lackluster candidates, mismanagement of campaigns and resources, and a severely inferior financial war chest compared to our opposition...but the truth is, Republicans failed to sufficiently communicate and distribute a cohesive message that resonated with our base and motivated voters to get to the polls. It appears that far too many good and decent people have come to the conclusion that elections don't really matter, and the Republican Party of Virginia is not worth investing their personal time and treasure in. These issues won't be solved overnight, but I must stress that we have NO time to waste. Democrats are gearing up to pass 4 horrendous Constitutional Amendments that will then be voted on by WE THE PEOPLE in a special election that will likely be held in April of 2026. What are the proposed amendments?
1. [Abortion for any reason until the moment of birth](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/81Pg8l98Q/c?w=k8nULcMiNLey2f0rcX_rRfIAP6QG02c3f0HLe1DJ7jQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zdGF0aWMxLnNxdWFyZXNwYWNlLmNvbS9zdGF0aWMvNjBkMjAxODQ3Yzc4ZWYxZTllNWZmMDk5L3QvNjkwYjgzNzMxNGY2MmEzMjdkMDBlZGExLzE3NjIzNjIyMjczNTkvVXBkYXRlZCtBYm9ydGlvbitBbWVuZG1lbnQrLnBkZiIsInIiOiIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ)
2. [Marriage redefined without religious exemption (denying religious liberty)](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/81Pg8l98Q/c?w=eEZyrTGhvCJXlpT-vd-lKDBl27lO6k2fc-55zmRQDao.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFtaWx5Zm91bmRhdGlvbi5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdG1hcnJpYWdlIiwiciI6IiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQ0Mjg4OTMzLWU0Y2MtNGYxMi04ZjNlLTZmNDVmMzc2MjFmNCJ9)
3. [Immediate restoration of voting rights for ALL felons (including pedophiles and murderers)](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/81Pg8l98Q/c?w=gMcNqylxpt4NQ4NyxmTPS97jivBLsBTigLff211cKLg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWxsb3RwZWRpYS5vcmcvVmlyZ2luaWFfVm90aW5nX1JpZ2h0c19SZXN0b3JhdGlvbl9mb3JfRmVsb25zX1Vwb25fUmVsZWFzZV9BbWVuZG1lbnRfKDIwMjYpIiwiciI6IiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQ0Mjg4OTMzLWU0Y2MtNGYxMi04ZjNlLTZmNDVmMzc2MjFmNCJ9)
4. [Ability for party in power to gerrymander](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/81Pg8l98Q/c?w=o4JUYP2hK8-oNr-1zt3C8PxZdEtjeMTavgjOqgRZVsM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZXdzLmJhbGxvdHBlZGlhLm9yZy8yMDI1LzExLzAzL3ZpcmdpbmlhLWdlbmVyYWwtYXNzZW1ibHktYXBwcm92ZXMtcHJvcG9zZWQtbWlkLWRlY2FkZS1yZWRpc3RyaWN0aW5nLWFtZW5kbWVudC8iLCJyIjoiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDQyODg5MzMtZTRjYy00ZjEyLThmM2UtNmY0NWYzNzYyMWY0In0)

Resources are linked to help you understand these amendments in detail. Republicans have a terrible track record when it comes to special elections. Why? Because Democrats have pushed for years to get their voters to sign up as permanent [absentee voters](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/81Pg8l98Q/c?w=X2h_zK3iJpbA1FNB0hojRNwwK0gEYk-qO8FrhKIdP2M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlLmVsZWN0aW9ucy52aXJnaW5pYS5nb3YvUmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uL0Rtdkxvb2t1cCIsInIiOiIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ). While we are frantically trying to notify our base and push voters to the polls on an unexpected Election Day, a significant portion of Democrat voters are mailed a ballot directly to their home, every single election, without their party having to spend a single dime or minute of effort. Now hear me when I say this: I don't like or necessarily trust mail-in voting or 45 days of early voting....but do you know what I like even less?!... LOSING ELECTIONS TO BIG GOVERNMENT, TYRANNICAL SOCIALISTS! Therefore, I am asking everyone to sign up for permanent [absentee voting](https://hamiltonforvirginia.com/so/81Pg8l98Q/c?w=X2h_zK3iJpbA1FNB0hojRNwwK0gEYk-qO8FrhKIdP2M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly92b3RlLmVsZWN0aW9ucy52aXJnaW5pYS5nb3YvUmVnaXN0cmF0aW9uL0Rtdkxvb2t1cCIsInIiOiIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0NDI4ODkzMy1lNGNjLTRmMTItOGYzZS02ZjQ1ZjM3NjIxZjQifQ). (linked) When you receive your ballot in the mail, it serves as a REMINDER. If you are opposed to mail in voting, you can take your uncompleted ballot and turn it in, then proceed to vote in person, if that is your preference. We cannot continue operating with the status quo and expecting different results. Please understand that our opposition wants to drive our perspectives and influence into PERMANENT EXTINCTION in Virginia.

clean_body: | | | | VIRGINIA IS FOR PATRIOTS! | | | | Patriots, THANK YOU for your tremendous support and generosity during my House of Delegates campaign. I am honored to have been elected to represent James Madison's district and stand strong for conservatives across the Commonwealth who feel underrepresented. I am eager to fight for the things I campaigned on, and will work tirelessly to help true Conservatives regain a majority in Virginia. But Tuesday of last week brought little else to be excited about. In truth, the elections dealt a devastating blow for Virginia and revealed systemic problems within the Republican Party of Virginia that must be addressed if we hope to climb out of this deep pit. We lost races by almost double of what even the worst polling numbers predicted. We can blame troublesome federal policies, the government shutdown, lackluster candidates, mismanagement of campaigns and resources, and a severely inferior financial war chest compared to our opposition...but the truth is, Republicans failed to sufficiently communicate and distribute a cohesive message that resonated with our base and motivated voters to get to the polls. It appears that far too many good and decent people have come to the conclusion that elections don't really matter, and the Republican Party of Virginia is not worth investing their personal time and treasure in. These issues won't be solved overnight, but I must stress that we have NO time to waste. Democrats are gearing up to pass 4 horrendous Constitutional Amendments that will then be voted on by WE THE PEOPLE in a special election that will likely be held in April of 2026. What are the proposed amendments? 1. 2. 3. 4. Resources are linked to help you understand these amendments in detail. Republicans have a terrible track record when it comes to special elections. Why? Because Democrats have pushed for years to get their voters to sign up as permanent . While we are frantically trying to notify our base and push voters to the polls on an unexpected Election Day, a significant portion of Democrat voters are mailed a ballot directly to their home, every single election, without their party having to spend a single dime or minute of effort. Now hear me when I say this: I don't like or necessarily trust mail-in voting or 45 days of early voting....but do you know what I like even less?!... LOSING ELECTIONS TO BIG GOVERNMENT, TYRANNICAL SOCIALISTS! Therefore, I am asking everyone to sign up for permanent . (linked) When you receive your ballot in the mail, it serves as a REMINDER. If you are opposed to mail in voting, you can take your uncompleted ballot and turn it in, then proceed to vote in person, if that is your preference. We cannot continue operating with the status quo and expecting different results. Please understand that our opposition wants to drive our perspectives and influence into PERMANENT EXTINCTION in Virginia. | Virginia is on the line right now... We lost some significant battles last Tuesday,but this fight is far from over. We're down, but not out. Patriots, let’s get back up, STAND FIRM, and REFUSE TO SURRENDER! Defending Liberty, Delegate-Elect Hamilton | | "THE FUTURE BELONGS TO THOSE WHO REFUSE TO REMAIN SILENT." -CHARLIE KIRK | | | | | | | You can find out more about me at: General Jason Miyares Member Joe Short, Town of Culpeper for AmericaPolice Benevolent AssociationNRAVirginia Society for Human Life | | | Find me on social media! | | | | | | This email was sent from .

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Update for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
I wanted to personally pass along this update on the past couple of weeks. |
---
Hey Peter, we’re at the halfway point of November, and I wanted to pass along an update. [But if you’re short on time today, I get it. Will you make a donation to my team’s mid-November fundraising goal to help me keep the work going?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119364446/582808918/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251115_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE5YTZiMS02YWMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24mCg2lwT1MKU90x9fBAIUUYD9g3tQoDLt03TIe14bE=) Since Republicans decided to leave families high and dry before the holidays, I took some time during this shutdown to volunteer with Puente to make sure families in Phoenix were able to put food on the table. I also made another trip to Eloy Detention Center, where I heard nothing but the same old excuses from ICE agents to explain away the inhumane conditions in the facility. I’ve been fighting for the rights of detainees there, including my constituent Yari, who I literally witnessed vomit blood. She is fighting leukemia and is still being denied the proper care or treatment she needs. Back in Washington, I took the conversation _directly_ to Speaker Johnson with a table right outside of his office. Speaker Johnson allowed Arizonans in the 7th District to go without representation for nearly two months, and let the government shutdown drag on to avoid a vote on the Epstein files and protect Trump’s wealthy circle of elites. I wasn’t going to let him go unchecked. And when he finally brought the House back for the continuing resolution earlier this week, I voted NO on this so-called “deal” because it lacks any protection for affordable healthcare access and leaves behind the 370,000 Arizonans who will have to pay more for their healthcare coverage. I’m not one to back down from a fight, and I don’t care about keeping the status quo. I’m in DC more fired up than ever to fight for our communities and to protect every Arizonan’s healthcare, dignity, and future. [If you’re with me, can I count on your support today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119364447/582808919/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251115_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE5YTZiMS02YWMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24mCg2lwT1MKU90x9fBAIUUYD9g3tQoDLt03TIe14bE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119364448/582808920/470246576?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20251115_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGE5YTZiMS02YWMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=24mCg2lwT1MKU90x9fBAIUUYD9g3tQoDLt03TIe14bE=)

clean_body: I wanted to personally pass along this update on the past couple of weeks. | Hey Peter, we’re at the halfway point of November, and I wanted to pass along an update. = Since Republicans decided to leave families high and dry before the holidays, I took some time during this shutdown to volunteer with Puente to make sure families in Phoenix were able to put food on the table. I also made another trip to Eloy Detention Center, where I heard nothing but the same old excuses from ICE agents to explain away the inhumane conditions in the facility. I’ve been fighting for the rights of detainees there, including my constituent Yari, who I literally witnessed vomit blood. She is fighting leukemia and is still being denied the proper care or treatment she needs. Back in Washington, I took the conversation directly to Speaker Johnson with a table right outside of his office. Speaker Johnson allowed Arizonans in the 7th District to go without representation for nearly two months, and let the government shutdown drag on to avoid a vote on the Epstein files and protect Trump’s wealthy circle of elites. I wasn’t going to let him go unchecked. And when he finally brought the House back for the continuing resolution earlier this week, I voted NO on this so-called “deal” because it lacks any protection for affordable healthcare access and leaves behind the 370,000 Arizonans who will have to pay more for their healthcare coverage. I’m not one to back down from a fight, and I don’t care about keeping the status quo. I’m in DC more fired up than ever to fight for our communities and to protect every Arizonan’s healthcare, dignity, and future. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Yassamin Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States | mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com | Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: A giant, flashing neon warning sign for Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
We have to fix this before the midterms...
| Peter,
---
If this year’s special election results were red flags, then Tuesday’s election results were a giant, flashing neon warning sign for Republicans...
---
**_...we’re not turning out our voters when President Trump isn’t on the ballot._**
---
**I've vowed to always be honest with you, so I’m not going to mince words:_If we see the same kind of margins we did on Tuesday in the midterms, our House majority is as good as gone._**
---
Approval ratings, poll numbers, and fundraising all mean _NOTHING_ if Republican voters don’t show up to vote when it matters most!
---
In the midterms, we need to turn out and vote like President Trump is on the ballot – _because for all intents and purposes,**he is**._
---
The Democrats have all but promised to IMPEACH President Trump.
---
**As House GOP Leadership Chair, I’m leading the GOP’s project to verify EVERY Republican voter we have on file and get their commitment to vote in the midterms.**
---
That project just got even more urgent following Tuesday’s results!
---
_Peter, can I check off your name as one of the voters that President Trump and the GOP can count on to show up and vote for us in the midterms no matter what?_
---

clean_body: We have to fix this before the midterms... | Peter, If this year’s special election results were red flags, then Tuesday’s election results were a giant, flashing neon warning sign for Republicans... ...we’re not turning out our voters when President Trump isn’t on the ballot. I've vowed to always be honest with you, so I’m not going to mince words:If we see the same kind of margins we did on Tuesday in the midterms, our House majority is as good as gone. Approval ratings, poll numbers, and fundraising all mean NOTHING if Republican voters don’t show up to vote when it matters most! In the midterms, we need to turn out and vote like President Trump is on the ballot – because for all intents and purposes,he is. The Democrats have all but promised to IMPEACH President Trump. As House GOP Leadership Chair, I’m leading the GOP’s project to verify EVERY Republican voter we have on file and get their commitment to vote in the midterms. That project just got even more urgent following Tuesday’s results! Peter, can I check off your name as one of the voters that President Trump and the GOP can count on to show up and vote for us in the midterms no matter what? Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |
