| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2e069702-d002-48c0-a104-a1d269a58208?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f76faa08-c73a-4a63-8a00-edffd59ca5e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**by Cliff Schecter**_
I know this will be hard to believe, but there once was a time, back in olden days, when we valued competence.
We wanted the best engineers to build bridges, the best teachers to shape minds, and the best leaders to not purposely eradicate economic growth. Ya know, while live-tweeting it.
But somewhere along the way, clownish, constitutional carnivores came along and began taking brontosaurus-sized bites out of our founding document and unwritten operating agreement that supported it.
We had something called a "Newt Gingrich" imploding the House with hysteria and heresy here, a Mitch McConnell sabotaging the Senate and judiciary with corporate acts of carnality there. And a Sarah Palin. She could see Russia from her house!
America decided mediocrity was more fun than people who knew stuff and wanted to govern. Elect a guy you wanna have a beer with! Hell, Reagan climbed into bed with a chimpanzee! Fred Thompson's future may've been riding golf carts to shill for reverse mortgages in ads to impoverish the elderly, but did you see him in _Die Hard 2_!?
How can you not vote for the guy who sang "_I Got You Babe?_ "
Along the way, many a reverse mortgage salesman--some Democrats to be sure, _but an exponentially increasing percent of the GOP to the point where nothing else is left_ --started running for office with a lack understanding and/or caring that their job was to work for _the people_.
And then, hello **Second Gilded Age**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/47570a60-4689-4fc7-a269-3990341fc841?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
Subscribe for free if you cringe at Eric Trump's face, too.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.8wwjxZcxcZNX6WJJz078SmK5CmwVj-GCnijqLpMFPrQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178942050)
* * *
One where a reality-show President with the wit of a drunken walrus would actually fight in court to starve Americans. Yes, **Trump argued in court that food our laws required him to give people --so they don't die--should be denied. So they do.**
And now, we've arrived at the logical conclusion of all this--**Eric Trump** , the barking embodiment of dumb-son nepotism. A laughable lout with inherited intellectual necrosis and the empathy of a Terminator wrapped in designer smugness.
In Eric we have the heir to a political dynasty so corrupt it saddens Tammany Hall because they're not here to stand and clap.
A guy whose gums provide enough space to shelter-in-place during EF3 and worse tornadoes. A person whose existence makes it _so when you refer to the "the dumb Trump son," you're somehow not talking about Don Jr._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e23a3772-257d-469f-acc9-b32617f5a6eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This past week, as millions of Americans rationed groceries and struggled to pay medical bills...Eric popped up on _Fox Business --_the only outlet to agree to expand the size of its cameras to fit his skull _--_ to serenade us with the wisdom of a newly minted billionaire. Who earned it all with his wit, wisdom, and legally, of course.
In any case, after talking down American banks--patriotic!--as "slow" and "lethargic" in conducting business, Eric shared this golden nugget:
> How is that modern-day finance?... _You can send $500 million worth of bitcoin_ on a Sunday night at, you know, at 11 p.m. while having a glass of wine with your wife for virtually zero fees.
_And let 's be honest, haven't we all found ourselves wondering how to do this over a nice Merlot at 11pm on a Sunday?_
Yes, the man whose family took a prosperous economy and with a series of the dumbest f*king economic policies this side of Pol Pot. Delivered stagflation that's starting to spin out of control.
He had solid advice for working America. For some reason, it made me think of this:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1c9b7610-f019-46fe-b094-a03fc0a97fe3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Someone whose daddy--that'd be Don J.--i _s gifting Argentina 's equally loopy leadership $40 million of our money to bail them out from the very policies Trump's enacting here_, wants you to marvel at the wonders of frictionless billion-dollar transfers.
Not food security. Not living wages. Not affordable insulin. Let them inject cake! No, it's what you've always cried out for. Not paid family leave, dumb-dumb. But crypto convenience for all!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4198c48c-cb2e-4869-be9c-009da6e791f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Because when you've never worked a day in your life, money isn't survival. It's a parlor trick. Just some fun on a Sunday night for you and your equally inebriated, wholly out-of-touch, fellow dumb-son nepo friends! Future subjects of lawsuits over stolen equity!
And of course, nothing would be complete with The Family Trump if there weren't a con in there somewhere. So of course behind his personal Trumpian word salad--the Caesar with the Russian dressing--sits a scam dressed up as innovation.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f76faa08-c73a-4a63-8a00-edffd59ca5e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The family's sprawling, barely-concealed crypto operation, from the Trump Meme Coin--which in the near future probably gets you a Diet Sprite at the nearest vending machine--to their companies. Such as World Liberty Financial.
Together they've made the family's billions, as anyone wishing to buy influence with a family willing to sell it to literally anyone--including inanimate objects--can invest.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/35435922-bf5f-43a6-9a73-11192a3f511c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And don't forget to buy those Trump sneakers, watches, guitars, and Bibles! Sure, it violates the Constitution's _Emoluments Clause_ , but who cares! It's not like John Roberts or Mike Johnson are gonna to anything. 😄 😁 😆
It would be funny if it weren't so perfectly tragic. A nation where the dopey-ist son of a fake billionaire (pre-crypto scams) turned fake president lectures the struggling masses about how easy it is to move half a billion dollars. _While sipping Merlot._
This led Senator Mark Kelly to share a few words...a Democratic Senator who didn't betray us on the government shutdown, and [fights to bring about the fall of The House Of Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/e78571b8-f6c1-4751-a1e9-bed66c6c4b83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fef5a8d5-8f3b-4562-a418-4851724e491a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You know, there was a time when Republicans tried to hide corruption and keep the family idiots outta sight. But Eric is the chef's kiss to Trump's modus operandi and avatar of our times.
Appoint incompetent dilettantes to power. If you're Trump, you know nobody will stop you. Who cares if they screw up, as long as it lands you money/power/fame/sex. The corporate media sure won't call you out (don't wanna be partisan!). And, again, what are John Roberts or Mike Johnson gonna do about it, much less the GOP Senate?
In the past, the Billy Carters, the Neil Bushes, the Roger Clintons, America's political families, used to send these family members to the basement by telling them to fetch some fire wood. Then they lock the door for four to eight years. Keeping them out of sight was crucial.
* * *
Remember Billy Beer? Subscribe for free.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.8wwjxZcxcZNX6WJJz078SmK5CmwVj-GCnijqLpMFPrQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=178942050)
* * *
_But what do you do when your whole family makes Billy Carter seem like Gary Kasparov?_ So, Eric Trump may be the dumbest, but nobody else in that family would've been allowed in public if they were in any earlier presidential clan.
So Eric's _the one they send on air_ , _in front of the cameras and everything_ , [when The Epstein Files are are leaking into a flood](https://substack.com/redirect/179fd35a-efd9-4a4b-92dd-73690a791cbf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), _Trump looks like he 's been dead two years and nobody told him_, and the American people are losing access to food and doctors.
As former New Jersey Democratic Rep. Tom Malnowki put it:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d4dcebe8-a1ac-4acb-99a3-279444ffceb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Eric, we've got you, babe. _The very face_ _of American descent._ Dumb, decadent, and deeply disconnected. Not the exception to the rule. But it! A system that rewards depravity and punishes competence, kindness and veracity.
Look, these people don't trip into corruption, they wake up every morning and _put it on like cologne. Trump Cologne._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae84114c-af7c-4e83-adf6-b05cba69945f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Trumps just took things that last step and made our politics a carnival ride for con artists. It's the gilded ouroboros of American decline. the stupid devouring the sensible, a Fox hit at a time.
Eric's the perfect mascot for the era, where ignorance is lucrative and the shameless rewarded for selling the country by the byte. He's end-stage-democracy mediocrity and venality.
The truth, though, is this isn't inevitable.
The reason Eric Trump can play crypto prophet while the rest of America can't afford eggs is because _we let this circus keep its tent_. We let billionaires define success, corporate-media define normal, and corrupt Republicans define "I dare Chuck Schumer to stop me."
The antidote isn't despair--[it's the bright light of exposure and fury needed to fight these MFers every day](https://substack.com/redirect/4fcc76e5-19de-47ac-a570-72a870679281?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Rip off the gold leaf, my friends, and what you find underneath ain't genius. Just grift, greed, and a generational habit of chewing on lead-paint chips.
What's the answer? More marches. More election blowouts. [More, authentic, charismatic, modern Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/df94db47-7a99-42c4-84da-cbf1e76c20d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). More fighting fire with fire (California's ballot-measure win on redistricting led Indiana to drop their plans to redistrict, a big defeat for Trump). _No more Hateful-Eight Democrats_
And then Eric Trump can go do reverse mortgage ads. Behind bars.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f76faa08-c73a-4a63-8a00-edffd59ca5e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
#### Keep Independent Media Loud, Smart, and Unbought
If you're sick of watching corporate media treat Eric Trump's idiocy like economic insight, you're in the right place. clean_body: While Americans ration groceries, Trump's dimmest heir lectures the nation on midnight billion-dollar Bitcoin transfers over Merlot. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? While Americans ration groceries, Trump's dimmest heir lectures the nation on midnight billion-dollar Bitcoin transfers over Merlot. | | and | Nov 15 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- by Cliff Schecter I know this will be hard to believe, but there once was a time, back in olden days, when we valued competence. We wanted the best engineers to build bridges, the best teachers to shape minds, and the best leaders to not purposely eradicate economic growth. Ya know, while live-tweeting it. But somewhere along the way, clownish, constitutional carnivores came along and began taking brontosaurus-sized bites out of our founding document and unwritten operating agreement that supported it. We had something called a "Newt Gingrich" imploding the House with hysteria and heresy here, a Mitch McConnell sabotaging the Senate and judiciary with corporate acts of carnality there. And a Sarah Palin. She could see Russia from her house! America decided mediocrity was more fun than people who knew stuff and wanted to govern. Elect a guy you wanna have a beer with! Hell, Reagan climbed into bed with a chimpanzee! Fred Thompson's future may've been riding golf carts to shill for reverse mortgages in ads to impoverish the elderly, but did you see him in Die Hard 2!? How can you not vote for the guy who sang "I Got You Babe? " Along the way, many a reverse mortgage salesman--some Democrats to be sure, but an exponentially increasing percent of the GOP to the point where nothing else is left --started running for office with a lack understanding and/or caring that their job was to work for the people. And then, hello Second Gilded Age. | | ---|---|--- Subscribe for free if you cringe at Eric Trump's face, too. One where a reality-show President with the wit of a drunken walrus would actually fight in court to starve Americans. Yes, Trump argued in court that food our laws required him to give people --so they don't die--should be denied. So they do. And now, we've arrived at the logical conclusion of all this--Eric Trump , the barking embodiment of dumb-son nepotism. A laughable lout with inherited intellectual necrosis and the empathy of a Terminator wrapped in designer smugness. In Eric we have the heir to a political dynasty so corrupt it saddens Tammany Hall because they're not here to stand and clap. A guy whose gums provide enough space to shelter-in-place during EF3 and worse tornadoes. A person whose existence makes it so when you refer to the "the dumb Trump son," you're somehow not talking about Don Jr. | | ---|---|--- This past week, as millions of Americans rationed groceries and struggled to pay medical bills...Eric popped up on Fox Business --the only outlet to agree to expand the size of its cameras to fit his skull -- to serenade us with the wisdom of a newly minted billionaire. Who earned it all with his wit, wisdom, and legally, of course. In any case, after talking down American banks--patriotic!--as "slow" and "lethargic" in conducting business, Eric shared this golden nugget: How is that modern-day finance?... You can send $500 million worth of bitcoin on a Sunday night at, you know, at 11 p.m. while having a glass of wine with your wife for virtually zero fees. And let 's be honest, haven't we all found ourselves wondering how to do this over a nice Merlot at 11pm on a Sunday? Yes, the man whose family took a prosperous economy and with a series of the dumbest fking economic policies this side of Pol Pot. Delivered stagflation that's starting to spin out of control. He had solid advice for working America. For some reason, it made me think of this: | | ---|---|--- Someone whose daddy--that'd be Don J.--i s gifting Argentina 's equally loopy leadership $40 million of our money to bail them out from the very policies Trump's enacting here, wants you to marvel at the wonders of frictionless billion-dollar transfers. Not food security. Not living wages. Not affordable insulin. Let them inject cake! No, it's what you've always cried out for. Not paid family leave, dumb-dumb. But crypto convenience for all! | | ---|---|--- Because when you've never worked a day in your life, money isn't survival. It's a parlor trick. Just some fun on a Sunday night for you and your equally inebriated, wholly out-of-touch, fellow dumb-son nepo friends! Future subjects of lawsuits over stolen equity! And of course, nothing would be complete with The Family Trump if there weren't a con in there somewhere. So of course behind his personal Trumpian word salad--the Caesar with the Russian dressing--sits a scam dressed up as innovation. | | ---|---|--- The family's sprawling, barely-concealed crypto operation, from the Trump Meme Coin--which in the near future probably gets you a Diet Sprite at the nearest vending machine--to their companies. Such as World Liberty Financial. Together they've made the family's billions, as anyone wishing to buy influence with a family willing to sell it to literally anyone--including inanimate objects--can invest. | | ---|---|--- And don't forget to buy those Trump sneakers, watches, guitars, and Bibles! Sure, it violates the Constitution's Emoluments Clause , but who cares! It's not like John Roberts or Mike Johnson are gonna to anything. 😄 😁 😆 It would be funny if it weren't so perfectly tragic. A nation where the dopey-ist son of a fake billionaire (pre-crypto scams) turned fake president lectures the struggling masses about how easy it is to move half a billion dollars. While sipping Merlot. This led Senator Mark Kelly to share a few words...a Democratic Senator who didn't betray us on the government shutdown, and : | | ---|---|--- You know, there was a time when Republicans tried to hide corruption and keep the family idiots outta sight. But Eric is the chef's kiss to Trump's modus operandi and avatar of our times. Appoint incompetent dilettantes to power. If you're Trump, you know nobody will stop you. Who cares if they screw up, as long as it lands you money/power/fame/sex. The corporate media sure won't call you out (don't wanna be partisan!). And, again, what are John Roberts or Mike Johnson gonna do about it, much less the GOP Senate? In the past, the Billy Carters, the Neil Bushes, the Roger Clintons, America's political families, used to send these family members to the basement by telling them to fetch some fire wood. Then they lock the door for four to eight years. Keeping them out of sight was crucial. Remember Billy Beer? Subscribe for free. But what do you do when your whole family makes Billy Carter seem like Gary Kasparov? So, Eric Trump may be the dumbest, but nobody else in that family would've been allowed in public if they were in any earlier presidential clan. So Eric's the one they send on air , in front of the cameras and everything , , Trump looks like he 's been dead two years and nobody told him, and the American people are losing access to food and doctors. As former New Jersey Democratic Rep. Tom Malnowki put it: | | ---|---|--- Eric, we've got you, babe. The very face of American descent. Dumb, decadent, and deeply disconnected. Not the exception to the rule. But it! A system that rewards depravity and punishes competence, kindness and veracity. Look, these people don't trip into corruption, they wake up every morning and put it on like cologne. Trump Cologne. | | ---|---|--- The Trumps just took things that last step and made our politics a carnival ride for con artists. It's the gilded ouroboros of American decline. the stupid devouring the sensible, a Fox hit at a time. Eric's the perfect mascot for the era, where ignorance is lucrative and the shameless rewarded for selling the country by the byte. He's end-stage-democracy mediocrity and venality. The truth, though, is this isn't inevitable. The reason Eric Trump can play crypto prophet while the rest of America can't afford eggs is because we let this circus keep its tent. We let billionaires define success, corporate-media define normal, and corrupt Republicans define "I dare Chuck Schumer to stop me." The antidote isn't despair--. Rip off the gold leaf, my friends, and what you find underneath ain't genius. Just grift, greed, and a generational habit of chewing on lead-paint chips. What's the answer? More marches. More election blowouts. . More fighting fire with fire (California's ballot-measure win on redistricting led Indiana to drop their plans to redistrict, a big defeat for Trump). No more Hateful-Eight Democrats And then Eric Trump can go do reverse mortgage ads. Behind bars. | | ---|---|--- Keep Independent Media Loud, Smart, and Unbought If you're sick of watching corporate media treat Eric Trump's idiocy like economic insight, you're in the right place. Blue Amp Media isn't funded by billionaires, hedge funds, or Super PACs -- it's powered by people who want real journalism with a pulse. Every paid subscription keeps this platform independent, fearless, and fully caffeinated for the next fight. 👉 -- because the only thing louder than their stupidity should be our truth. P.S.** Corporate media won't print this -- they're too busy pretending Eric Trump knows how crypto or democracy works. But you just did. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

clean_body: Before Congress, I ran a trucking company. Now I'm fighting for something even bigger: the future of the Supreme Court. President Trump is preparing his shortlist for the next vacancy, and The Left knows it too. That's why billionaire dark-money donors like George Soros are pouring MILLIONS into Georgia to save Jon Ossoff -- Obama's handpicked puppet and Schumer's rubber stamp. Judges like Boasberg and Chutkan , who've freed illegals, stripped away your rights, and declared open rebellion against President Trump, could be appointed to become deciding votes in the Court. The Radical Left will burn down everything in their way to stack the bench. You've seen it already: So I'll put it simply: If we lose Georgia, we lose the Senate. ** If we lose the Senate, we lose the Court. And if we lose the Court, we lose the country we love. President Trump needs America First senators to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with him to: Defend the High Court from the Left's takeover and confirm bold constitutionalists in the mold of That 's why I'm in this fight. Because if we lose the Senate, we lose the Court. And once the Left gets their slimy hands on it, they 'll never give it back. Will you join me? . Thank you, Rep. Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MAGA TO 70622** If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

body:
With the year almost over, Mark can’t count on making up for lost time if we miss our goals. Emails like this are the main way he funds the work he’s doing to notch wins in 2026.
#

That’s right.
We’re asking if you can chip in to Mark Kelly’s campaign today.
Not tomorrow, not next week, not in a few months, not two years from now.
[**Please, chip in to Mark’s campaign today before his mid-quarter deadline at midnight. Help him make sure he has everything he needs to combat Trump and retake Congress in 2026.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25/.mVeyuq&refcode=em251115-2-8k&t=1&akid=6246%2E6688874%2E8Eqpri)

With the year almost over, Mark can’t count on making up for lost time if we miss our goals. Emails like this are the main way he funds the work he’s doing to notch wins in 2026. That’s how we’re going to check Trump’s power — and that’s the only way we’re going to restore some sanity and stability.
We don’t know what’s coming tomorrow, but if you can afford to chip in today, we’re hoping that you will. Whatever comes our way, it’d mean a lot to Mark to know he’ll have the resources he needs to defend against Trump’s lackeys and go back on offense.

“I’m tired of the separation of church and state”
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j_m-7vO-aDVuFGgbv9yZq6khRF00G5HbxF2_qmWICrZFEPpPWg1kf6-mv4zBYmrX7KizUv_lyuCOYbmCMYA_rJh9NSaE9yxHSKU1uOPUDHh2EgRiaSKkgwC53WsZqnA5uI8Xzpf_gPQBriAW2EAT5QjUvsy_IpY0KohTixXEe_pIg-b6HoDBuYOZqKaHr2K2ZfKGxjIxW4OwE9fVevc-O4ZWBDwBsVyJzUJSC-UBBp0=&c=41u0wssp1XkV1Ddrq4AkZdCj_OB_In7iyJ722kWj9a_qQnfBqTnusQ==&ch=nLJX2PMNai028nSh8O5NHXSEbwaBrccIjzknSGLhHRzAZjAf472x5w==)
---
|

Peter,
Lauren Boebert once said she was "tired of this separation of church and state." She didn't misspeak. She meant it.
This is the vision Boebert is pushing: a government run by religious decree, a Congress that answers to Christian nationalist extremists, and a country where your rights depend on someone else's beliefs.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j_m-7vO-aDVuFGgbv9yZq6khRF00G5HbxF2_qmWICrZFEPpPWg1kf6-mv4zBYmrX7KizUv_lyuCOYbmCMYA_rJh9NSaE9yxHSKU1uOPUDHh2EgRiaSKkgwC53WsZqnA5uI8Xzpf_gPQBriAW2EAT5QjUvsy_IpY0KohTixXEe_pIg-b6HoDBuYOZqKaHr2K2ZfKGxjIxW4OwE9fVevc-O-4sVFLe6h1TgECCj0Sssg8=&c=41u0wssp1XkV1Ddrq4AkZdCj_OB_In7iyJ722kWj9a_qQnfBqTnusQ==&ch=nLJX2PMNai028nSh8O5NHXSEbwaBrccIjzknSGLhHRzAZjAf472x5w==)
---
That is not America.
America is a democracy built by people who fled religious tyranny, who believed no politician should ever have the power to control your conscience, your body, or your family's future.
But that's exactly what Boebert wants -- book bans, attacks on LGBTQ families, government by ideology instead of science or freedom.
We do not have to live under her crusade.
We can defeat her in 2026, restore sanity, and build a Congress that represents all of Colorado -- not just the extremists cheering Boebert on.
In 2024, I outperformed all Democrats in the HISTORY of this district. Now I'm back to finish the job. But I can only do that with a grassroots army behind me.
[If you believe America belongs to the people, not to religious extremism, please pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can today.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j_m-7vO-aDVuFGgbv9yZq6khRF00G5HbxF2_qmWICrZFEPpPWg1kf6-mv4zBYmrXETmf5u43Gf5qXhHajgVZAUfKF0lGhjlqOOkUU-PfjLOsmKSxLIL6XKFoS4xRbIjc14D1uWJcHx3aZSMkb9CxSOhfOF3q9Hv6jDuUbEowTRBv4Xo9xYW3KwOIo_41_JVdApZMkq30zQD4PC3mTsBUZ74p4yM6YLIlhDc9yAaiD5ghwuCqIIIibw==&c=41u0wssp1XkV1Ddrq4AkZdCj_OB_In7iyJ722kWj9a_qQnfBqTnusQ==&ch=nLJX2PMNai028nSh8O5NHXSEbwaBrccIjzknSGLhHRzAZjAf472x5w==)

clean_body: “I’m tired of the separation of church and state” | | | | | == | Peter, Lauren Boebert once said she was "tired of this separation of church and state." She didn't misspeak. She meant it. This is the vision Boebert is pushing: a government run by religious decree, a Congress that answers to Christian nationalist extremists, and a country where your rights depend on someone else's beliefs. | == That is not America. America is a democracy built by people who fled religious tyranny, who believed no politician should ever have the power to control your conscience, your body, or your family's future. But that's exactly what Boebert wants -- book bans, attacks on LGBTQ families, government by ideology instead of science or freedom. We do not have to live under her crusade. We can defeat her in 2026, restore sanity, and build a Congress that represents all of Colorado -- not just the extremists cheering Boebert on. In 2024, I outperformed all Democrats in the HISTORY of this district. Now I'm back to finish the job. But I can only do that with a grassroots army behind me. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == In solidarity, Trisha Calvarese | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | | | | | | |

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: Did you see this headline?
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=3504%2E582294%2EOHvVzE ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=3504%2E582294%2EOHvVzE ]Chris Pappas for Senate

Did you see
this? 👇

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251115_2_nbc.UhDhtY&refcode=em20251115-2&t=1003&akid=3504%2E582294%2EOHvVzE ]NBC: With a Sununu running for Senate, Democrats warn against sleeping on New
Hampshire

If Democrats are going to have any shot at taking back the Senate, we
cannot sleep on New Hampshire. Here’s why:

🚨 Moments after John Sununu jumped into this Senate race, Roll Call
downgraded our chances of winning, making this seat a top pickup
opportunity for Republicans.

🚨 John Sununu isn’t just any Republican. He’s backed by the entire
Washington establishment. He comes from a political dynasty, has national
name recognition, and brings a fundraising machine fueled by Wall Street
and corporate special interests.

🚨 A recent poll shows Chris Pappas and John Sununu in a virtual tie, and
it’s only a matter of time until GOP billionaires and special interests
start dumping money into New Hampshire.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251115_2_nbc.UhDhtY&refcode=em20251115-2&t=1004&akid=3504%2E582294%2EOHvVzE ]We can’t afford to fall behind in this moment. That’s why your support,
right now, is more critical than ever. If you’re all in for Chris Pappas
and for keeping New Hampshire blue, chip in $5 now.

Chris Pappas is a fighter for Granite Staters, and he can win. He’s a
proven public servant who’s won his purple Congressional district in New
Hampshire four times. But this race just got more expensive, more
competitive, and more dangerous for Democrats.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251115_2_nbc.UhDhtY&refcode=em20251115-2&t=1005&akid=3504%2E582294%2EOHvVzE ]That’s why we’re telling you: Do not sleep on New Hampshire. Now is the
time to build the resources and infrastructure we need to win next
November. Chip in any amount to elect Chris Pappas and keep New Hampshire
blue. 🔵

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251115_2_nbc.UhDhtY&amount=5&refcode=em20251115-2&t=1024&akid=3504%2E582294%2EOHvVzE ]Donate $5 »

Thank you,

Chris Pappas HQ

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3504%2E582294%2EOHvVzE

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: Most people will miss this message, but that’s what makes your donation even more important.
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw James’ note about the important goal we’ve
set this weekend.

The FEC deadline will be here before we know it, and we need to make up
some ground. If everybody reading this pitched in $10, we would hit our
goal within minutes. But not everyone gives.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251115-2-ak&t=1001&akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu ]That’s why, if you can afford it, your donation is so important. Please
chip in. The donation itself is just as important as the amount.

Team Talarico

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[2]Talarico for Texas

Peter —

We’re at the halfway point for our first full fundraising quarter. We’ve
already asked a lot of you since we launched this campaign two months ago
— but I want to explain why your support right now is so important.

At the end of this quarter, we have an FEC deadline. We will have to
report our fundraising numbers publicly again. We’ll have to do it if they
are good, and we’ll have to do it if they are not.

The truth is that all eyes will be on these numbers. Our opponents and the
media are asking if the energy behind our campaign at the beginning was a
fluke or if we’re building a movement that really can take back Texas.

With the holidays approaching, we know things will slow down. So we need
to go into the final half of the quarter in an even stronger position.

We’ve set an ambitious goal before we hit the halfway point of the
quarter: 5,000 donations in 48 hours. This is what it will take to keep us
on track to reach our targets and continue laying the foundation to win
this race.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251115-2-ak&t=1002&akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu ]I’m personally asking you to contribute $5 or whatever
you can spare today. This is the hardest and most expensive race I’ve ever
run. Your support today would mean a lot to me.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/506?c0=jt-em-launch.3s2pDp&refcode=em251115-2-ak&t=1021&akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu ]Donate $5

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/505?c0=jt-em-launch.soFUPy&refcode=em251115-2-ak&t=1022&akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu ]Donate $25

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/498?c0=jt-em-launch.qllyRI&refcode=em251115-2-ak&t=1023&akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu ]Donate $50

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/499?c0=jt-em-launch.UeXr9I&refcode=em251115-2-ak&t=1024&akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu ]Donate $100

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/500?c0=jt-em-launch.457jmL&refcode=em251115-2-ak&t=1025&akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu ]Donate $250

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/503?c0=jt-em-launch.jEYg2l&refcode=em251115-2-ak&t=1026&akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu ]Other Amount

The donation itself is just as important as the amount. Each one sends a
powerful message about our strength and puts us one step closer to taking
back power for the people.

James

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.jamestalarico.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=237%2E1347274%2E5L0cbu
clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw James’ note about the important goal we’ve set this weekend. The FEC deadline will be here before we know it, and we need to make up some ground. If everybody reading this pitched in $10, we would hit our goal within minutes. But not everyone gives. [ ]That’s why, if you can afford it, your donation is so important. Please chip in. The donation itself is just as important as the amount. Team Talarico [2]Talarico for Texas Peter — We’re at the halfway point for our first full fundraising quarter. We’ve already asked a lot of you since we launched this campaign two months ago — but I want to explain why your support right now is so important. At the end of this quarter, we have an FEC deadline. We will have to report our fundraising numbers publicly again. We’ll have to do it if they are good, and we’ll have to do it if they are not. The truth is that all eyes will be on these numbers. Our opponents and the media are asking if the energy behind our campaign at the beginning was a fluke or if we’re building a movement that really can take back Texas. With the holidays approaching, we know things will slow down. So we need to go into the final half of the quarter in an even stronger position. We’ve set an ambitious goal before we hit the halfway point of the quarter: 5,000 donations in 48 hours. This is what it will take to keep us on track to reach our targets and continue laying the foundation to win this race. [ ]I’m personally asking you to contribute $5 or whatever you can spare today. This is the hardest and most expensive race I’ve ever run. Your support today would mean a lot to me. If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. [ ]Donate $5 [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount The donation itself is just as important as the amount. Each one sends a powerful message about our strength and puts us one step closer to taking back power for the people. James You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23616%2E4449941%2E3ic1lu) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23616%2E4449941%2E3ic1lu) No one thought we would have an opportunity to flip a seat this year.

Not the establishment, not the media, and certainly not the GOP. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70045?t=3&akid=23616%2E4449941%2E3ic1lu) [**But we won our primary with pure grassroots power and showed what’s possible for Democrats in the Deep South.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70045?t=4&akid=23616%2E4449941%2E3ic1lu)

And now, we’re barreling towards the December 2nd special election here in TN-07, where I’ll be facing off against Trump’s hand-picked candidate.

Republicans are already pouring money into this race to stop us from flipping this seat, and I’m counting on your support to help me fight back. [**Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Fight For Reform today?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70045?t=5&akid=23616%2E4449941%2E3ic1lu) | | [DONATE $5 NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70046?amount=5&amounts=25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=6&akid=23616%2E4449941%2E3ic1lu)

I’m an organizer, state rep, and pissed-off social worker running for Congress because we need leadership that meets this moment.

For the past decade, I’ve been at the heart of a long-term political project to take back Tennessee, shoulder to shoulder with fellow organizers, activists, movement lawyers, community groups, and mentors who took the time to teach me what real power-building looks like.

Now, I’m taking this fight national – and this special election could make history. It’s the only red-to-blue special in the country.

**If we flip this seat...Republicans lose a vote in the House, and 2026 shifts.**

It will take record-breaking support to win this race, but I know we have what it takes. [**Donate to my campaign and Fight For Reform to help us win this race and flip this seat →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70045?t=12&akid=23616%2E4449941%2E3ic1lu)

Onwards!
– Aftyn Behn

name: Liz Cheney
subject: Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
| | |
---
| | Dear Peter,

My friend Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is an unsung hero for defending our democracy and our Constitution.

I had not known Zoe well before our work together on the House Select Committee to investigate the January 6th attack on the United States Capitol, but I was aware of her reputation as one of the most effective and respected Members of the House of Representatives. She is a thoughtful and serious member, and she operates with zero ego — a rarity in Congress.

Zoe has been a source of wisdom and good judgment for me and many Members in Congress. Although we don’t share many views on politics or public policy, I can assure you that we need Zoe in Congress and on the frontlines as we continue to protect and secure the future of our democracy.

We all must look beyond party and support people like Zoe who will defend the Constitution, someone we know will do the right thing. We need good, smart, honest and honorable people in elected office. __[_**With your help we can make sure Zoe has the resources needed to stay in Congress and continue the important work of defending our Constitution. Please join me in supporting her and contributing $25 today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119365573/582812672/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-11-15_LIZ_J6C_ES-35649_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJiNTg2Yi03NWMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C0Hdgww6oVpaQfb9nzY6yHfCBOHqoGoSULpmP9OGVto=) I hope I can count on you to join me. [_**We need to support and stand with Zoe now!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119365574/582812673/-1473124489?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-11-15_LIZ_J6C_ES-35649_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJiNTg2Yi03NWMyLWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C0Hdgww6oVpaQfb9nzY6yHfCBOHqoGoSULpmP9OGVto=)

Best,

Liz Cheney

| | **_Meet Rob:_** Rob Bresnahan is a fifth generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian serving his first term in Congress as the Representative for Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District. A product of the American Dream, Rob learned the true meaning of hard work at an early age. He learned the ins and outs of the electrical industry by wiring junction boxes, running heavy equipment, driving trucks, and getting his hands dirty. In the process, he learned about the real-world challenges facing America’s blue-collar workers. At just 19 years old, Rob joined his family’s business as the CFO for Kuharchik Construction. He became the CEO of the company in 2013. The sole member of the National Electrical Contractors Association serving in the People’s House, Rob spent over a decade working and connecting with blue-collar Americans across the country before running for Congress in 2024. He’s learned exactly how far-left energy policies coming out of Washington have strangled the American energy sector. And sadly, he’s seen the destructive impacts these policies have had on Pennsylvania’s blue-collar workers first-hand. But the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania demanded change in November 2024 when they sent Rob to Congress. Through his work in Washington, Rob is 100% devoted to restoring America’s energy independence, deregulating the economy, and bringing well-paying jobs back to our great commonwealth.
---

Our nation could not endure without the men and women who keep the lights on from coast to coast. So together, we’re going to revive America’s energy independence and return our great nation to its rightful place atop the world stage. _Can I count on your grassroots support to usher in a new era of leadership in our nation’s capital?_

clean_body: Peter - I'll make this quick. I have less than 48 hours before our mid-month deadline. I hope I can count on you to help us win South Carolina and hold our Republican majority in Washington. I am dedicated to helping us maintain our majority, but I need you to step up so we can ensure the Left doesn't gain ground and take the lead. Remember, without Republican majorities, President Trump can't pass his America First agenda into law. I won't stop fighting until we win, and I hope you won't either. Conservatives like us are the last line of defense against the Democrats' winning back a majority. We must continue to stand together against their radical socialist agenda! Help disappoint the radical Left. Please chip in and help us today! Lindsey Graham | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Let me tell ya, this ain’t a typo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m told my reputation precedes me. So believe me when I say that I’m deeply concerned right now.
Folks - it's John Kennedy. [](http://links.right-red.com/u/click?_t=7f2cc7f35be547959fee68a54bdac0d9&_m=0a7ca686fff74561a0ce4c66478fb8be&_e=tA5LQLz2EE6XFy1qlGuvQuQMgRv9nIewi9KB-PYPKn-1M57ZaKlR86OJlPnfgGjTKaTZAWFKl1PFppKUQYrxEsAPOusutZT5LBF74_0vHCttQAi3PPHO3Y4lJnNYp37kPB0Cd3zuK_dj_yRpfdd1M4YBBMNqTARjjmbFQPWKOCPrlRCNkbef7MJfjtqfwGEz-LxrFfYNR4ogwxhvUdckF8WiYbGMWTSirK-C5cldbBtxe1fp8g8Zk5Rw_eo8mDSrte5RB1-a0HLX9cYDbtVQ9LpO0g4B6hvb3u8p3SwsKYLNwROBnFA3Aj3EV6k5PB6cXTmPEl72ApGTNpkyj7AG2yIaTIfRLAhDZVKffdkFwr-sZ5_J5QXi60mSqtkkZGhY0YoLcF48GGb-WJonVjbwfvUrMj7DxUYj_SE7ZINhg1xI93j8iiIJrH3W4hB204CnD2pnFv40RuLwwQTUiW5W8BWTIPXK8hOZrLiOL4tIGZgjUW7WQxidZaJIQX5EZB4NpFd8_9w1LWoFOq68peUHvkfeHgogdVQzRL6F9k3yug4DmjEbnTJR62_PeaBEtaYqwm45f-xur8-aQ-ySS9-uCksPDOQKUpzr1ME0XizfENiSEidBxWS3EE4vY5U27eMYEX6pr0ZObMe9HItPwPzO1DDw1u9zJEO2UL-pM50F4UZO9nwS-OFF_Tg2b3RFPI5Y) I'm told my reputation precedes me. I hope that's a good thing. I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart. So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now. My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before. That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives! _And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal._ _ _ It'll be a real disaster if they miss it. clean_body: I’m told my reputation precedes me. So believe me when I say that I’m deeply concerned right now. Folks - it's John Kennedy. I'm told my reputation precedes me. I hope that's a good thing. I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart. So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now. My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before. That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives! And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal. It'll be a real disaster if they miss it. With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. Conservatives control the House by the slimmest margins in 100 years. I know we still have the Senate and White House but it could all be over for us if we don't dig deep and help SAVE the House Majority. That's why: Newt Gingrich already reached out ... Steve Scalise already reached out ... And FOUR freshmen Members of Congress reached out too ... I hate being a pest but we don't have time to sit around - not if we want to win! God bless you, John Kennedy * We have spent weeks vetting and verifying the most committed MAGA Patriots from every corner of America. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Where things stand this Saturday
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)
Hi Peter, We’re so close to meeting our mid-November goal! I just checked in with my team, and they’re confident that we can hit our $100,000 target if we get one last surge of support tonight. **[Would you be able to pitch in $1 or more before midnight to close the gap?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2001?t=7&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)** Peter, I’m going to have to ask for your help a lot over the next year. I don’t enjoy asking and I know you probably don’t enjoy being asked, but this could be the first-ever U.S. Senate race to cost more than a billion dollars, and I’m relying on your help. Emails like this one are one of the best ways for me to reach folks who want to pitch in. Tonight’s goal is especially important because we’re heading into the holidays, and we have to account for donations slowing down then. I’d like to set us on a good track for this month and next by meeting our target now. **[If it fits in your budget, a donation of any size would go a long way.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2000?t=8&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)** Thanks so much, Roy Cooper [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2000?t=9&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=10&akid=46%2E124072%2EUPymBY)

I just checked in with my team, and they’re confident that we can hit our $100,000 target if we get one last surge of support tonight. Peter, I’m going to have to ask for your help a lot over the next year. I don’t enjoy asking and I know you probably don’t enjoy being asked, but this could be the first-ever U.S. Senate race to cost more than a billion dollars, and I’m relying on your help. Emails like this one are one of the best ways for me to reach folks who want to pitch in. Tonight’s goal is especially important because we’re heading into the holidays, and we have to account for donations slowing down then. I’d like to set us on a good track for this month and next by meeting our target now. Thanks so much, Roy Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. ** | mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper Victory Fund PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal. Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible. The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: If only you knew…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need your help to capitalize on our momentum.
| $10, friend.

That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to help us reach our $25,000 goal and win in Ohio. [**Can I count on you? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96598?t=6&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh) | [CHIP IN $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96598?t=7&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh)
---
If you knew that by giving $10 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?

If you knew that by giving $10 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?

If you knew that by giving $10 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $10 you ever spent?

I know that $10 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.

**But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $10 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.**

With a new poll showing me 1 point ahead of my opponent, we can flip this seat – but not unless we capitalize on our momentum and hit our critical grassroots fundraising goals.

[**So please, friend, will you chip in $10 or more to the Voter Protection Project and me today to help reach our $25,000 goal, power this campaign forward, and win in Ohio? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96598?t=8&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96599?t=9&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96600?t=10&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96601?t=11&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96602?t=12&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96598?t=13&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh)
Thank you,

Sherrod
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21857%2E878179%2EE6Z3Bh)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’ll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re still about $1,500 short of our goal.
Hi Peter, it's Pramila.
I’ll keep this quick, because I know the last thing you want to be doing on a Saturday is reading emails.
My campaign is approaching our mid-month deadline tonight, and we’re still about $1,500 short of our $16,000 goal.
Can I count on you to pitch in at this link to put us over the top before midnight?

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I never thought I'd run for office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This is a longer email about my story and how I came to fight for hardworking Coloradans in the Senate, and I hope you’ll read it until the end.
I'll be honest, Peter. I never saw myself serving in the U.S. Senate.
This is a longer email about my story and how I came to fight for hardworking Coloradans in the Senate, and I hope you’ll read it until the end. **[But if you don’t have time, please, take a moment and split a donation between Heartland Patriots and my campaign to help us defend our states and take back the Senate. →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09)**
Back in the mid-1980s, I was a geologist – until I was laid off for 27 months. Then, I took every scrap of savings in my bank account and took a gamble on opening my own business, Wynkoop Brewing Company, in downtown Denver.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09)
I remember working 80-hour weeks. I remember lying awake at night wondering how we were going to make it. And I remember being so angry that my government wasn't working for me.
So, I ran for Mayor. And once elected, I focused every day on making decisions based on what was best for Denver.
Then, I was elected Governor on the premise of uniting people, finding common ground, hashing things out, and getting things done.
And after we flipped Colorado’s Senate seat in 2020, I got my hands dirty working hard to deliver real change for Coloradans. We invested billions of dollars to confront the climate crisis, lowered prescription drug costs, made investments to rebuild our infrastructure, and brought thousands of good-paying manufacturing jobs back to America.
But Peter, I’ve also seen how broken Washington is. I see politicians who only listen to those who cut big campaign checks while ignoring the rest of us. And it’s clear we need more leaders who are willing to cut through the political deadlock and work to move this country forward.
Here's why I'm telling you this: **my story is the reason I remain grounded amid the nonsense and dysfunction that's happening in our government.**
Because with all the chaos in Washington, you need somebody who rolls up their sleeves and fights every day for all of us – not just those they agree with.
Like I said, I never thought I'd find myself in the U.S. Senate, but I’m running for re-election because Coloradans deserve a leader they can trust to do right by them. And I'm just a geologist-turned-brewer who entered public service to do what's right for the people of my state.
That’s why I don't take money from corporate PACs like your typical politician. Instead, I rely on grassroots folks like you. And it’s why I'm depending on your contribution today. Even just $5 here or $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
**[So I have to ask: will you split a donation of whatever is meaningful to you between Heartland Patriots and my campaign? Together, we can defend this seat we flipped back in 2020 and keep power in the hands of working people:](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to John Hickenlooper and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97487?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97486?refcode=em20251115-9714&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09)
---
Thanks for all your support,
John

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_heartland-patriots/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=12&akid=9714%2E614464%2Ej8sl09). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

clean_body: | | | | Remember me?DJ Daniel, one of President Trump’s top bodyguards? Jasmine Crockett can make fun of my brain surgery scars all she wants. I may be a 13-year-old kid, but defending the President is a grown man’s job. But today isn’t about me. It’s about my dad, Theodis. He’s running for Congress as a Republican. I’m worried like heck about him. The Democrats keep ripping up his campaign yard signs and throwing them all over the place! This is a CRIME , you know. Don’t worry, I’m on their bumper! If you happen to see one of my dad’s signs laying on the ground, please pick it back up. And if you don’t see any, could you please help him out in a different way today? As a Republican, my dad could really use your support getting his name out there. The Democrats are trying to silence and intimidate him. That’s why they keep vandalizing all of his campaign stuff! A quick donation of $5 or more would be a huge help. I know I’m a cop...but I promise I won’t go buy any donuts with it. In fact, your donation will go straight to my dad’s campaign – and he will use every penny to make sure he can defeat Democrats who are tearing our country apart! I gotta run, but I’ll be sure to talk to you later. Thank you again for your help! For America, Devarjaye “DJ” Daniel P.S. Patriot, before rushing over your $5 donation, please read the kind words President Trump said about my son DJ: "Joining us in the gallery tonight is a young man who truly loves our police...The doctors gave him five months at most to live. That was more than six years ago... Since that time, DJ and his dad have been on a quest to make his dream come true.” PAID FOR BY TEAM DANIEL FOR CONGRESS 3636 OLD SPANISH TRAILSTE B-1 #239HOUSTON, TX 77021

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18526419/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfbGEtbnlnX3JzXzIwMjUxMTA3Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMTU/LbmNsNFpMUzcxbg/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE4NThfd3I0/gaRkSfw/s6q046da7bb)

**_[Please join my campaign with your Day One Endorsement today](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18526419/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ob3VzZS1nb3AtYmF0dGxlZ3JvdW5kLWZ1bmQvaGdiZl9kb25fb21fZXJfbGEtbnlnX3JzXzIwMjUxMTA3Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMTU/LbmNsNFpMUzcxbg/qP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjE4NThfd3I0/gaRkSfw/s6q046da7bb)_.**
